name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: We have to put an END to this madness

body:
Val Demings and her far-Left Democrat friends are... | Friend,

**[The Left will do EVERYTHING possible to TURN Florida Blue, but we can’t let that happen.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c9e843ec896740fc88ef59c246733f29&_e=MVKLEnhLFuELzyPI-i-dlOIvpTuAYDszzsBqq16GQ9Rfj0FWcLqe8clxbgq0p5z9qHMOSPAfO6jJQGGudqt8pZ49wnGf6J9YeI_t--Hqym258aFa_BFeX3434N8_HpBj_qzKjivl0YFtSgwlEqkCNq2zxZeNOWYZLAcczUTwrd-ZJo26Z3mQnXvtITnRkl4_yaZXCpuSr5JJuFjAaD_McOIAyajLPi2-LEsfsg614McwlSNCo56Q_Fu1wT_41QsimEfPO6sOVjI00Sl1s_Qn2mV4UXdDaoeMyHvoVyZ0zkKLpxP0brTzzou8ziUtFu16IZuVmq5-tb2j8vsdp-b6C7lbe5psTcbRmPEn3CYNNREkkBz0nUXzxphHlozaGC6OVdY7KwTwZZTS7FYf4tWpGMNB1YDtf0Tcd1gYSl7vx7x_hjzZLOCjrHoNAVePYs4pgFNLroTkPXc7d-U4MsNZcy9AwRO7Ld4w8MAP_9up6Xm7B-YBEehRD3Ik_cx-HKb4)**

The radical Democrats want to anoint their next Pelosi Puppet and _"Squad"_ member, Val Demings, to represent the great state of Florida - which would be a disaster for the Sunshine State.

Val Demings is a far-Left progressive who votes with Pelosi 100% of the time and helps push through every single piece of Biden’s disastrous agenda. Let’s not forget that over the past two years, Democrats have...

**REFUSED TO ADDRESS THE CRISIS AT OUR SOUTHERN BORDER

COZIED UP TO COMMUNIST CHINA AND SOCIALIST VENEZUELA

PASSED OUTRAGEOUS SPENDING BILLS THAT DRIVE UP COSTS ON FAMILIES

INCREASED OUR DEPENDENCY ON FOREIGN OIL AND CUT CAPACITY AT HOME

AND WORSE. **
_Florida has been a beacon of Freedom while Biden and the Leftists took control in Washington, and now they want to bring their Socialist agenda here. This would be a disaster for Florida and the country._

**[That’s why I need your help. I’m not asking for a big check, but anything you can contribute will help us fight back and KEEP Florida and our other Battleground States Red>>](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c9e843ec896740fc88ef59c246733f29&_e=MVKLEnhLFuELzyPI-i-dlOIvpTuAYDszzsBqq16GQ9Rfj0FWcLqe8clxbgq0p5z9qHMOSPAfO6jJQGGudqt8pZ49wnGf6J9YeI_t--Hqym258aFa_BFeX3434N8_HpBj_qzKjivl0YFtSgwlEqkCNq2zxZeNOWYZLAcczUTwrd-ZJo26Z3mQnXvtITnRkl4_yaZXCpuSr5JJuFjAaD_McOIAyajLPi2-LEsfsg614McwlSNCo56Q_Fu1wT_41QsimEfPO6sOVjI00Sl1s_Qn2mV4UXdDaoeMyHvoVyZ0zkLLwB0rVa9s-nFsi9-x3CcdmwkbVRbHu4WeSx61CZ8aUulUj-dfdCozv20VjMNW5nfV3k4eRZdj2WzapV2oBwAzjLO24AY_Zw7n5Qh3sKZzP67IYaRwoh_qDcupIHxlXEsQzXSqzIvF-avCekAHEf_dgchMIqkf1sIDWO-IX8MMNq_u4MY2foLWSump94cUZA-wzmXDI5BpgJnpDzwohy3m)**

name: Beto HQ
subject: We’ll get right to it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Trump just hosted his third event in Texas of the year.
#
With a recent poll showing Beto and Greg Abbott statistically tied in the race for governor, Donald Trump just hosted a huge event in Austin to rally his supporters — his third event in Texas this year.
This is after his official endorsement of Greg Abbott, who follows Trump’s lead at every turn and wields hate and division as political tools.
Trump and Abbott are pulling out all the stops to drown us out. We can’t let them.
[**We have one request tonight: Will you chip in right away to show we won’t back down in the fight for the future of Texas? Trump and Abbott want to use their platforms to divide us, so let’s come together and show them our grassroots strength.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220514-2?refcode=ema20220514-189353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=189353_444211_OoWqW5&akid=189353%2E444211%2EOoWqW5)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220514-2?refcode=ema20220514-189353&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=189353_444211_OoWqW5&akid=189353%2E444211%2EOoWqW5)**
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220514-189353-footer&t=21&refcode2=189353_444211_OoWqW5&akid=189353%2E444211%2EOoWqW5)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=22&akid=189353%2E444211%2EOoWqW5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=189353%2E444211%2EOoWqW5)

name: Charity Barry
subject: Getting Across the Finish Line!
body:
We need more signatures
| | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
We are very proud to announce that we just acquired the minimum number of signatures needed to get on the ballot!!! And in less than four weeks!
Due to the hard work of a large team of volunteers, we have gotten signatures from voters in every county - at gun shows, the Dane County farmers' market, going door-to-door, at work and church, GOP events - and those from all political backgrounds - Republicans excited about taking the fight to Pocan, Independents ready for a representative of the people, and even Democrats willing to keep their options open because they have seen the fruits of the Far Left policies and they want change!
District Two is ready for something new, but to make that a reality, we need to get many more signatures to ensure that they cannot eliminate enough for any reason to keep us off the ballot, and we need to make a strong statement of enthusiasm from the people!

THIS WEEK, CAN YOU HELP US MAKE THE IMPACT THAT DISTRICT TWO NEEDS?
We still need to get more signatures to have a comfortable margin for the Wisconsin Elections Commission review. Please download our nomination form with the link below to tell District two that you are ready to retire Pocan! Simply print it (change the print setting to landscape), get as many signatures as you can, sign the circulator information at the bottom, and send it in. If you cannot circulate them, just sign as an elector and then as the circulator at the bottom. Mail to our office. If you are in Madison drop it off at our office. If we're out campaigning and not there, just slide it under the door.

Thank you for your continued support!

Charity Barry

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Buffalo
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Earlier today, a young man motivated by hate and enabled by easy access to weapons of war walked into a Buffalo supermarket and killed 10 people.
#

Earlier today, a young man motivated by hate and enabled by easy access to weapons of war walked into a Buffalo supermarket and killed 10 people.
He live-streamed it all.
The shooter was apprehended by the police. He was wearing body armor and tactical gear. Walk into an NRA convention and that’s exactly what you’ll find on display.
He posted a manifesto online about his racist worldview about “replacement theory.”
People sometimes use words like “unthinkable” or “unimaginable” about events like these, but the tragic reality is we are all too familiar with this type of terror. We know that the shooter in Buffalo was not alone in his worldview and commitment to violence.
And sometime, sooner or later, we will see more images of police clearing an area around a school, a church, a movie theater, or a shopping center, as families rush toward the scene desperate for information about their loved ones.
Once again, my heart breaks for the victims of this shooting, their families and their friends. But that will never be enough.
Once again, our anger is with those who know how to stop this but fail to act out of cowardice and fear of the gun lobby money that fuels their campaigns. Time and time again they consciously make the decision to prioritize the profits of gun manufacturers ahead of the safety of our communities.
We are the only industrialized country on the face of this Earth that forces our citizens to live this way.
We can change this.
We can save lives.
And if this Congress refuses to act, then we must elect one that will.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

* * *
**[Giffords PAC works to reduce gun violence and save lives by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. Please make a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220514-2-30&t=1&refcode2=2007_3935704_8K-crX&akid=2007%2E3935704%2E8K-crX)**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220514-2-30&t=2&refcode2=2007_3935704_8K-crX&akid=2007%2E3935704%2E8K-crX)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2007%2E3935704%2E8K-crX) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Now is the time to unify and continue this movement to defeat Tim Walz. He's NEVER been more vulnerable, and Matt Birk and I are ready to take the fight to his door step. We are going to win. We are going to heal Minnesota. And we are never going to look back. | | In Freedom, Dr. Scott Jensen Endorsed Republican Candidate for Governor | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Dr Scott Jensen for Governor, All rights reserved. name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: Take Courage!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
**>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq** With all that's going on in the world, it can be easy to lose sight of what we're truly up against. Factions continue to grow as wars abound creating an innumerable amount of distractions that cause us nothing but stress. In the midst of it all, we've entered a disappointing election cycle where career politicians have once again taken center stage and stooped to new lows sacrificing their moral compass just to win.

It's easy to throw in the towel and just give up on politics, but I'm begging you to stay with me. There's still time. We must keep our eyes on the prize as we navigate through these rough waters. I believe in America and what it stands for. We may not always be perfect, but it isn't perfection that makes us a great nation. It's our heart and desire to unify for the good despite differences.
**Take courage! **
Come November, let's unite in such a way that it sends a powerful message to that part of the country that seems spellbound on taking away the rights and freedoms prior generations once fought and died for. If hope is to be a motivator and not a crutch, it must be honest and not false. I will continue spreading this message of hope and with your help...I'm just getting started!
**Now, here's what I need you to do right now: **
* Forward this message to nine (9) of your friends and family. Choose three (3) of them to personally call and inform them that I meant what I said in the beginning of my campaign when I said I would run for the Senate until **_we_** won!
* Commit to my campaign now by [donating $9](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=48e6740e3d&e=a49cb82bb3) or more to keep this true grassroots campaign going.
* [Subscribe and follow me on social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=2055c03a3e&e=a49cb82bb3) where I'm active and live often. Share a post or two!

Visit [haneefahkhaaliq.org](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=d73bf6837b&e=a49cb82bb3), view my 33 national policies and agendas, and become a volunteer today! I am Indiana. You are Indiana. Together, we are Indiana!

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate
2022

### _What Do I Need? _
* Check your voter's registration right by clicking [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=5671c38b15&e=a49cb82bb3). You must be a registered voter in order to support me in the General Election. Set a goal to ask nine (9) other people this week if they are registered to vote in Indiana. We can't afford to wait until the last minute.
* **Have questions? Email hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592 right now! **
* Check out and share my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=355fb32297&e=a49cb82bb3) posts and [donate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=d57ce75385&e=a49cb82bb3) your first $9 or more to this grassroots campaign now!

If you believe in ONE PERSON, ONE VOTE -- this is the petition for you.
**[DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY >> ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391665:6XWU5JoNm:m:1:3299561967:EC7C5EAEF0DA89706942E278F32E00CB:r)**
Patriot,
Dinesh D'Souza's new documentary -- _2000 Mules_ \-- just sent shockwaves through the nation.
**He shined a spotlight on our need to defend election integrity.**
The shady processes like ballot harvesting, not requiring an ID to vote, and Democrats trying to force through H.R. 1 all undermine the election system that makes our country great.
Here's how YOU can help defend election integrity: we're asking every patriotic American to sign their name in support of election integrity. [**We 're hoping to collect 100,000 signatures before our Mid-Quarter deadline on 5/15/2022.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391665:6XWU5JoNm:m:1:3299561967:EC7C5EAEF0DA89706942E278F32E00CB:r)

If you believe in the principle of ONE PERSON, ONE VOTE -- this is the petition for you. Signing on means you believe in the rule of law and securing our elections.
Thanks,
Election Integrity Alerts

---
MESSAGE FROM KEN PAXTON

Peter,

The Liberal, unAmerican Establishment is pulling its dirtiest trick yet - they've enlisted the help of the Texas Bar to sue me just for fulfilling my obligation to the people that have chosen me to fight for them. | [ **JOIN THE FIGHT** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390873:JKFwUJo4N:m:1:3317145305:8D8DF21B2E125A0945759387D500D446:r)
---

The charade is over - the Texas Bar has finally exposed itself for what it really is, a leftist liberal group masquerading as a neutral professional association.

I need your help - In a surprise "coincidence," the Bar has chosen to go public with their months-long witch hunt in an attempt to influence the Primary Runoff. I need to stay competitive in this race, and you can help me stay on top.

**We need 100 new donors by MIDNIGHT, so we can show the leftist Establishment that Texans aren 't ignorant to their political theater.**

[ **RUSH A DONATION HERE** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390874:JKFwUJo4N:m:1:3317145305:8D8DF21B2E125A0945759387D500D446:r)

I will never stop fighting for you, and I won't be bullied and beaten by the Left. If there's anything you can contribute, please consider donating below.

name: Daniels For Congress
subject: We Have To Fight Back
body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60155204:sq_7YNhMN:m:1:2562995453:BCDCF6DC41EEDF4264C138A2112295EF:r)
Yesterday, I was proud to join with activists, elected officials, community leaders, and everyday people, men and women alike, in standing up for women's reproductive freedom at the Bans Off Our Bodies rally in Harrisburg, PA.
[**I'm asking you to join me in standing up for women's reproductive freedom by making a contribution today**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60155205:sq_7YNhMN:m:1:2562995453:BCDCF6DC41EEDF4264C138A2112295EF:r)
As we demonstrated on the steps of the State Capitol, similar rallies were taking place around our Commonwealth, and across the country. Making our voice heard is important, but if we want to get results, we need to elect good people who have a track record of standing up and defending a woman's right to choose.
In Congress, I will ALWAYS fight for the rights of women to make their own reproductive and healthcare decisions.
[**Can you donate $25, $50, $100, or more to help us defeat my anti-women's rights opponent Scott Perry, and send me to Washington to fight for all of us?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60155205:sq_7YNhMN:m:1:2562995453:BCDCF6DC41EEDF4264C138A2112295EF:r)
You see, this decision by the Supreme Court is about more than women's reproductive freedoms, it's about so many freedoms that we all take for granted everyday, like the right to love whom we choose, marry the person we love, make decisions about our children's education, and even our own medical care. If women lose our right to choose, many more rights and freedoms will follow. We need to make a stand here and now, and we need to send elected leaders to Washington who will stand up for us.
[**As an attorney and a member of City Council I've spent my career fighting for the rights of the people I represent, and in Congress, I'll do the same for my constituents and all Americans. Can you make a contribution now to help me fight for all of us?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60155205:sq_7YNhMN:m:1:2562995453:BCDCF6DC41EEDF4264C138A2112295EF:r)
Now, more than ever we need elected officials who will defend our rights. My record speaks for itself. I hope you'll join me in the fight!
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60155205:sq_7YNhMN:m:1:2562995453:BCDCF6DC41EEDF4264C138A2112295EF:r)
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: David Horowitz
subject: The radical Left wants to take all away from you
body:
Unless patriots like you and I unite to expose these frauds for who they are, and reveal their true intentions to the American people, we'll lose our country forever. |
We're on our way to a one-party state, and Big Tech is paving the way.

Twitter, Facebook and Instagram buried the Hunter Biden story right before the election, and banned the news organization that broke it, only to admit its validity months later.

They muzzled anyone that told the truth about coronavirus too early.

And now, Google is trying to bankrupt conservative organizations by making sure they can't communicate with their donors.

_And this should come as no surprise._

Because Silicon Valley hires directly from left wing organizations and campaigns.

Google, Twitter, Facebook, you name it. Every major tech company in the United States employees donate upwards of 80% to the Democratic Party.

That's no coincidence.

And now, they're using their power to wage an information war on the American people.

I have a plan, but I need your help.

[**Will you donate $35 or more to the David Horowitz Freedom Center today, and give us the ammunition we need to expose Big Tech and hold these companies accountable for their covert attacks on our democratic process?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391272:6p8bOJo_N:m:1:3317145305:A9193FBCD2A88773789D914D5F5099AA:r)

It's time for a formal investigation into Big Tech's hiring practices, and their internal protocols for determining what content the American people can access.

We've seen Congress do the same song and dance for years on end.

They hold their hearings, they get their soundbites, and nothing happens.

That's why we're putting our own researchers to use, and using our internal team of writers and investigators to reveal exactly what's happening in Silicon Valley.

**We have two major goals:**

1. Expose the Democratic National Committee to Silicon Valley pipeline

2. Break up monopolies like Apple and Google that think it's up to them to decide what information We, The People can access and how we're allowed to communicate

The truth is, the Left's agenda requires deception.

That's why they're so desperate to control what information you and I have access to, and why it's so crucial that you and I break down their propaganda machines.

They kicked the sitting President of the United States off of the internet, and claimed it's for "our safety."

But this has nothing to do with keeping you or me safe.

The Left finally has an excuse to do what they've always wanted: silence their political opposition by any means necessary.

These radical Democrats and their tech executive henchmen don't care who you are, if they think you're a threat to their agenda, they want to shut you up and shut you down.

That's why I'm writing to you today.

Because this is bigger than Twitter or Facebook -- or any one website.

This is about YOUR right to free speech, YOUR right to your opinion and YOUR right to exist.

**The radical Left wants to take all of that away from you** \-- _and they're using Big Tech to do exactly that._

So don't waste a moment: [**follow this link right away to make a generous emergency donation of $35 or more right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391272:6p8bOJo_N:m:1:3317145305:A9193FBCD2A88773789D914D5F5099AA:r)

Google, and other corporations like it, is filled with alums from major Democratic campaigns, committees and candidates.

They hire in droves from the Democratic Party.

**And they're using the cover of a "private company" with the manpower of the Swamp to crush their political opponents, and we must act now.**

I'm using the Freedom Center's Discover the Networks -- the largest and most extensive database on the Left -- to spearhead an investigation into the Big Tech decision makers and their ties to the Democratic party.

But I can't do it without you.

[**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation right away to help us fund this investigation and get the answers the American people deserve.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391272:6p8bOJo_N:m:1:3317145305:A9193FBCD2A88773789D914D5F5099AA:r)

I know what's at stake because when I was in my 20s, I was a radical Leftist.

I spent my time with the heads of the Black Panthers and edited Ramparts: the leading magazine in the far Left movement at the time.

I was deep in the trenches of the Left.

When I was 31, I finally realized how wrong they were, and how wrong I was.

We weren't making America a better place, we were destroying the greatest country in the world.

So in 1984 I cast my vote for Ronald Reagan and never looked back.

I dedicated the rest of my life to combatting the Left's twisted, Marxist vision and using my insider knowledge to expose them for who they really were.

**And unless patriots like you and I unite to expose these frauds for who they are, and reveal their true intentions to the American people, we'll lose our country forever.**

_What we're seeing now is just the beginning._

If they can get away with kicking the President of the United States off the internet, there's no telling what they'll do to folks like you and me.

The Left can't win without our silence, and that's why they've weaponized Big Tech against true American patriots.

So I need you to make your voice heard while you still can.

[**Donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center's Beat Big Tech project and help us show America, and the world, what these megacorporations and their Democratic decision makers are really after.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391272:6p8bOJo_N:m:1:3317145305:A9193FBCD2A88773789D914D5F5099AA:r)

The future of our country is hanging by a thread -- and it depends on Americans like you.

Sincerely,
David Horowitz

[ | [Donate to the Freedom Center](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391272:6p8bOJo_N:m:1:3317145305:A9193FBCD2A88773789D914D5F5099AA:r)
--- ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391272:6p8bOJo_N:m:1:3317145305:A9193FBCD2A88773789D914D5F5099AA:r)

| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391272:6p8bOJo_N:m:1:3317145305:A9193FBCD2A88773789D914D5F5099AA:r)

All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

You know me.
I'm not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you 'll listen to me when I tell you that I'm devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It's more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.
_So I 'll cut to the chase:_
I know it's a lot to ask, but we need a [**surge of donations**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391765:6br3OJo1N:m:1:3299561967:B84EB1CF1274C81F56DFC48801DF342E:r) ASAP if we're going to save President Trump's closest allies... tomorrow will be too late.
I'm hoping you'll rise to the occasion right now before the end of the day.
[**Help Save President Trump 's Top Allies >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391765:6br3OJo1N:m:1:3299561967:B84EB1CF1274C81F56DFC48801DF342E:r)
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
**The way I see it, you only have two choices:**
You can either delete this email, wave the white flag, and let the Democrats overwhelm ALL of President Trump's most loyal allies in Congress with their massive fundraising advantage...
[**... OR YOU CAN STAND WITH US, FIGHT BACK, AND WIN!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391765:6br3OJo1N:m:1:3299561967:B84EB1CF1274C81F56DFC48801DF342E:r)
I've made my decision. I'm standing with President Trump. _What about you?_
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

body:
I'm personally asking you to go on the record as ultra-MAGA:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp60lea6o7qoebpem42jh0o885p89n1qbidt8bm0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65stlmqq66db1m4obbdphmip3addhekoj2sj6ctj7ctpgsiqmepj5ccqn0s3l6urjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p34phh6spm8ptncdj30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
I'm personally asking you to go on the record as ultra-MAGA:
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zarra0ug11fi7cjobimntccp4a6ho95p2k1lfs4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cph2bs)
**This is Elise Stefanik. Let me make myself perfectly clear:_I am ultra-MAGA, and I 'm proud of it._**
******[CONFIRM IF YOU 'RE ULTRA-MAGA >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk5rpc7p423mjbjps9luauvg2v8k4qnjr67d5r88_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cph2bs)**
Friend -- Joe Biden just went on national TV to attack Conservatives as being "ultra-MAGA" \-- then like clockwork, the Liberal Media tried to shame me for supporting President Trump.
I don’t care what Joe Biden says. I don’t care what the Liberal Media says. **I stand with President Trump 100%.**
[**Now I 'm calling on every Trump supporter to stand with us. If you have the courage stick it to Joe Biden and the Liberal Media, I'm personally asking you to go on the record right here and right now:**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9g715dijv4u6l9omn870d34ato6u06r1cffp8lo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cph2bs)
******[CONFIRM IF YOU 'RE ULTRA-MAGA >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ab205g8en9k4vau67b4m3qp0mh52lk3ptvp0kg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cph2bs)**
I support President Trump because he cut taxes, helped our economy boom, kept inflation under control, exposed the Liberal Media, put America first, helped uncover CRT in our classrooms, rebuilt our military, took care of our veterans, and secured our borders.
Joe Biden is running our country into the ground, so he's resorting to comments that only the Liberal Media thinks is an insult.
**I set a goal of 10,000 Conservatives to go on the record in the first 48 hours of his comments.**
[**I 'm proud to be ultra-MAGA. Are you?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znlokj8fj7lpauvnn86c9jcjm78in1ocm0m1cji8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cph2bs)
For America,
Elise Stefanik,
House Republican Conference Chair

subject: We don't have to live like this!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICK DE GREGORIO FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Look, I decided to throw my hat in the ring and go straight to the belly of the beast-Congress-;because I know America needs pro
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z29thoe4p1sma2bnj6pprpn5ibd720v6v0180l48_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tll64obcdpgmeoe2ohledq70tjm69i78ppnmup61cr6ehqn7djhcjh64t9nmprjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33c5jcdjrco36ephb6p77m2qmash5u)

Look, I decided to throw my hat in the ring and go straight to the belly of the beast--Congress--because I know America needs protecting once again. Only this time, it's not terrorists in Afghanistan and I don't need to wear body armor.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmpkq2mlsu6si1l0tle0b1lglong4692b35hmei0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cjh2bs)
****

Friend, I'm nobody to write home about. I grew up with a family who instilled the values of freedom and hard work in my life.

I believe in God, and his guiding principles that have protected me in dangerous and uncertain times while I fought overseas to defend the freedoms I grew up with.

The one thing that always called to me was the thought of serving my country. That fateful day in September 2001 was the final straw that I needed, and I took action.

Even after fighting in two wars overseas, that calling to serve my country has never left me, and the passion I have for America will never leave me.

**But I 'm fed up with the way this country is being run by Washington swamp elites and hypocritical Liberals.**

[We Don't Have To Live This Way=Save America Now](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6dpjtt513b0m2salvskg08nsc7i564doip2lmm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cjh2bs)
****
****
Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden and their Democrats will stop at nothing to keep their hold over us, and conservatives like you and me are the last line of defense against their big Government takeover.

They hate people like you and me. Because we support personal freedoms, kneel before God, stand for the flag, support a culture of life, and just want what's best for our children--we're enemies in their eyes.

[Save America Now](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0qr5l80s1ni9pbfh1ok0u7i8kq9erv810rt8v88_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cjh2bs)

Look, I decided to throw my hat in the ring and go straight to the belly of the beast--Congress--because I know America needs protecting once again.

Only this time, it's not terrorists in Afghanistan and I don't need to wear body armor.

I know I can take on Pelosi and her Leftist goons because I'm a battle-tested combatant who won't back down from what I believe in.

BUT I CAN NOT DO IT ALONE. It will take more than just me to take on this regime controlling America--[I know times are tough, but we don't have to continue living like this. Would you consider backing my run for Congress today with a simple $8 gift?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zch04jo1b50b0it40j512144df1b61g21egmvd18_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cjh2bs)

[**Endorse this Veteran for Congress**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc7tabn2ir4go0c4haovhhn3td9uld6v9qkiil0o_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cjh2bs)

[**Chip in 8 Bucks**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf5fs6rebe8arjek9h3j2qtb04257ni3svmiteuo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cjh2bs)

[**Chip In 15 Bucks**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2jfnalo4tdg77vf006e8m9hscu5681o72ikldbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cjh2bs)

[**OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjek2bpea4vk7i10nbi3kdd7148hmlpchf8vad0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o76cjh2bs)

I'm graciously asking for your support today, as it will be the difference between winning and losing. American democracy or socialism.

God Bless America and all who defend her,

Nick De Gregorio

subject: 🚨Emergency Pro-Life Update
body:
The leak of Justice Alito’s draft majority opinion overturning Roe v. Wade was a blatant attack on our entire judicial system meant to intimidate the justices and every single American who believes in protecting unborn babies in the womb. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9085%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nrQj9G%2bnHL1GdB77KOiczA&sysid=1)

---
|
---
Friend,

The leak of Justice Alito’s draft majority opinion overturning _Roe v. Wade_ was a blatant attack on our entire judicial system meant to intimidate the justices and every single American who believes in protecting unborn babies in the womb.

Already the progressive Left’s political machine has ramped up the rhetoric and is threatening to end the filibuster, pack the Court, create a federal right to abortion-on-demand, and pour money into the states to make this the #1 voting issue in November.

**For those of us who believe in protecting life, we must not blink.** We must stand united because the lives of untold millions of our fellow human beings are worth fighting for.

As one of the largest and most influential Christian voter organizations in America, My Faith Votes will now be doubling down our efforts at the state level, and going on the offensive in Washington, D.C. with a focus on the U.S. Senate.

**[Please stand with us right now by making an EMERGENCY DONATION of whatever you can afford.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21237%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kchKtZoOjPiOBlrq7mns8Q&sysid=1)**

|
---
For many of us, this is the moment we’ve been praying for for much of our lives.

For decades, the pro-abortion extremists gained ground at the detriment of 62 million lives. But not anymore.

The whole ground just shifted, and we cannot get comfortable or let them intimidate us.

**[Thank you for your time, and I hope you will help with an emergency donation of any amount right now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c21230%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wbQ4GLfYzP2laVufRPwdBw&sysid=1)**

Mike Huckabee

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6ia94tsjou0t44hnsnming3oaai3nc33l88d5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o74cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf5dr2c9oj6t1jchqn2t1hmhpmas3268pb1ohlctjm1p32mpgn6t35mdh76shlm1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8p6cc9n6di6fdr1copb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvtpb82qodpn1pe25gd12f78vfv2kd9ljh0k8tv8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o74cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znn95qhl4lqavjts5npiiu8pio8ms4i1thq6if4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o74cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu1lsj4u46pmodre7shi8jr1fr192jk4v1ifri90_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdg61o74cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Mark Meadows
subject: Let's Grow State Freedom Caucuses
body:
Our newest initiative may be our most important yet: the State Freedom Caucus Foundation. Joe Biden and the Left are doing plenty of damage to our sovereignty, economy, and culture from Washington. And my friends in the House Freedom Caucus are fighting them every day on every front. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6907%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=GSJ2Rwc5soc3D8MNE0eAMw&sysid=1)
| | |
---
Fellow Conservative: Our newest initiative may be our most important yet: the [**State Freedom Caucus Foundation**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61002%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XS8D7wXz0cx0JfEoEdGs%2fw&sysid=1).
Joe Biden and the Left are doing plenty of damage to our sovereignty, economy, and culture from Washington. And my friends in the House Freedom Caucus are fighting them every day on every front.
But look at some of the biggest issues we face. Election integrity. Critical race theory. Boys in girls' bathrooms and sports. Law enforcement. Defending babies. These may be national debates, but they are _**state and local issues**_.
**That's why we don't just need a Freedom Caucus in Congress but in every state legislature across the country. **
Look at how Texas has countered Biden's criminal negligence on our Southern border. Or how Florida conservatives fought back against Disney. State legislatures can make a big difference in the fight for America's future.
The **State Freedom Caucus Foundation** is how we win it.
We're helping conservative lawmakers organize their own Freedom Caucuses, find staff, recruit members, and set strategies to make America great again, _one state at a time_.
We're already supporting freedom caucuses in four states - Nevada, Mississippi, Georgia, and as of April 20, South Carolina. Governors, speakers, and leaders are now on notice: a new sheriff is in town. And we won't rest until there is a Freedom Caucus in all 50 states.
**[Today, I'm asking you to help us take this critical project - this fight - nationwide.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61003%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wFELyG39xPvLSH4lT371HQ&sysid=1)**
I helped found the House Freedom Caucus in 2015 because, to be frank, America was losing. No matter which party controlled which branch of government - the budget and the debt got bigger, and traditional values and the Constitution were on the carving block. For too long, so-called conservatives in Washington complained but never did anything.
No more. We're done taking scraps from the Left, corporations, and insiders. Conservatives are going on offense - working together to expose the lies of the Left and the truths we all hold dear. With your support, that's what state freedom caucuses will do.
**[Please help us support a freedom caucus in all 50 states!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61004%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zE0S8rhEZWUf70TK%2bRIFRw&sysid=1)**
From now on, the Right will fight - for the rights of parents and children and the unborn, for less government and more freedom. These are fights we can win. The Left is in disarray - ruining their reputations along with the country.
**Now is the time to build our own network of razor-sharp, battle-tested leaders to take the fight to the Left.**
**[Please help us go on offense today!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61015%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6k5atQeBvglOmyddpWuYLQ&sysid=1)**
Thank you for being part of our team and helping make CPI the place conservatives go to win. For Freedom,
---
---
Mark Meadows
CPI Senior Partner
---
---
|
---
---
**CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE**
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
(202) 742-8988 Tel (202) 595-0282 Fax
CPI.org
---
[**DONATE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61016%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xcRvtV0uIz6SmIU2En2VFw&sysid=1)
---

---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6907%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=GSJ2Rwc5soc3D8MNE0eAMw&sysid=1)

May 15, 2022 | Issue XVIII
---
| |
---
| | Ortt and Norris Seek State Traffic Safety Study For South Transit Street
---
LOCKPORT, NY - On Wednesday, New York State Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt and Assemblyman Mike Norris penned a letter to the New York State Department of Transportation calling for a traffic safety study of South Transit Street in the City of Lockport.
"For a second time in as many months, we have seen yet another devastating incident involving motorists and a pedestrian crossing South Transit Street. Because of these tragedies, I am joining with local and state elected officials to call on our state's Department of Transportation to conduct a traffic safety study of South Transit Street, and I will continue to work with my colleagues to ensure the safety of drivers, pedestrians, and all residents in our community, " said Leader Ortt.
This unified call from Lockport state elected officials comes days after a second fatality occurred involving a pedestrian crossing South Transit Street. The letter was sent yesterday to the New York State Department of Transportation officially requesting a traffic safety study to be completed around the areas of these prior incidents on South Transit Street.

Lowering the overtime threshold will hurt New York's family farms, farm workers and economy.
We need to stay at 60 to:
🔸Support family farms across our state 🔸Protect good paying jobs for farmworkers 🔸Provide affordable, quality food for New Yorkers 🔸Ensure these critical economic engines & food providers are available in our communities
Agriculture is the economic engine of the 62nd district. Senator Rob Ortt is proud to stand with the New York State Senate Republicans and [Grow NY Farms](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NepkNmEpVL8nd1KdqL79F7U71S0hptXoZ_kA40XE3x9AOteVWpw2orOTEJZBCWYfPExYYIPVieXyhK2RBlARl-x7pN_YYlfkIq5waNo9H_D_GPvjR4u2gXeQ_BIwGzU1tWSFQovRfUuOt6UGkCiJ3A==&c=pCi8hzaRXqf0LwhdI-lVtaZDrkpHvozxG0ogBkF6ZgzpjFGZ02WLQw==&ch=RliR1ex14NQyLO8AXAsS1y9Wnnm-e2f3TXl7rlk0iR01P8qcxhyWHg==) to fight to stay at 60.

| | Dennis Pelletier Youth Hall of Fame Wednesday, May 11, 2022
---
| |
---|---
|
Congratulations to four incredible high schoolers: Caridad, Cora, Kelsea, and Ashlinn, for their strong perseverance through difficult life challenges. These brave young women demonstrated leadership, community spirit, exceptional personal achievements, and employment despite facing challenges that no high schooler should have to bear.

Caridad, Cora, Kelsea, and Ashlinn were inducted into the 2022 Dennis Pelletier Youth Hall of Fame this week. Their perseverance is inspiring, and I know each one of them will continue to be bright lights in our community & succeed at whatever they pursue in years to come.
| |
---
|
---
To all the brave men and women who protect and serve our communities: Thank you today, and every day.

Hello,
I was a three-star admiral, but when Donald Trump was elected, I voted with my feet and retired after 36 years in the U.S. Navy. Life is about choices, and I was not going to work for a demagogue such as Trump.
**Because here’s something you won’t hear anyone on Fox ‘Entertainment’ News admit: Donald J. Trump was – and is – a national security threat.**
Trump wanted to withdraw from NATO, cozied up to our enemies, and alienated our allies. He attacked our democracy and incited an armed insurrection on our Capitol. He tried to hold military aid to Ukraine hostage, and who knows what kind of _kompromat_ Russia has on him...
Twice Donald Trump was impeached. And twice Chuck Grassley stood by his side. **It’s time for my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley to stand on a bit of principle and finally repudiate any affiliation with Donald Trump. If you don't stand against him, then you stand with him.**
I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs. They’ll do nothing to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street. And when I defeat Chuck Grassley, Iowa will be represented by the most senior military person ever-elected to the U.S. Senate. That sounds fitting right about now.
The polls show Chuck Grassley can be beaten. His approval ratings are lower than they’ve ever been. **But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me with lie-filled ads, so if I’m going to win, I need grassroots donors like you to give now.**
**We’re facing a federally-mandated FEC fundraising deadline in just three days, and right now we’re still very short of our $400,000 goal and what we need to win and turn Iowa blue.**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45326857/345472909/-42398318?refcode=em20220515am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGVlNzY5NC00NmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=23F4BYgZmL0vyUI190cLd9EAZyxYAQo1lya8O1sLUKk=)

It's finally happening.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs3odhoc6030htd4nk52kh2ib3guu8k57ehumr5o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf7cj4e6rj8cb4mgqbedlm61j75c72c1r73djl61h7bd9m63ir2d1mm3gj9o73c3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor1cr3c1r6cphkcipm8ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdim4or4cdg68o724no)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2gutc4nugun1kr1bkrq0h97jjl8rc3is54i5rc8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o34c3h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z70s37vbapmpls7rbq1iukc3plbfs25frars4sog_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o34c3h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! This year I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl1vkdpik4vj55q5p58kjbvjhrqsof4bu6b1m5sg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o34c3h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkaq76eaed4c2nle2nfq5q982h57d36f464dsvdo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o34c3h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: American Defense News
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis o
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8crnd3s7dnkqtmnmv9h81okc9juuhdopalmt44o_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o32c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr5mcpm1pjk6lr7ac3lclhb8stlm2q66tb5m3gneo3ieqq73c9ic1hm4crl6grjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p34phh6ipm6ptmc9j39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc6tv8h1nuohge5n6gc8bpoendg6sprellc042kg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o32c9h2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztgrquot79nqals3psb3vlv0j0bj3hoh616fsdo8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o32c9h2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1423mha81eevvi7ec3ndojf3mcjsf9m9gapdda0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o32c9h2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5anua3tam36qmdtv1m3647aahgrcbv0ttrba1ho_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o32c9h2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z10mlecr5fs39s2id4os6jvmjj2oqi33jqdrkjag).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6fcne143vm1tbo7mrlkgki4esqkunnq4267ebag_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5c9hm8or0c9h649fg)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeq6knv0r3qhtll7rq9i66rgdoogoil296fasevg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o32cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t74ehhb0sbmc9pr2t726qo68oj2caqr4dj4mqpb6tlkmlgmcob0ciqm4s9m6arrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p34phh6ipm6ptmc9j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbhhe14ssib2ohv7ov8nom21450345lht0mj87ko_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o32cph2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2mfidb1l7fk6iiv7dpcl94e0ns8kudl6670rs70_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o32cph2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo73m91qn5k4jdossrr59d95pkbun9nn5n2q8nm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdi66o32cph2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? He earned an appointment to the United States Military Academy in West Point, where he was a four-time letterman and co-captain.

In the military, Dave served as an Army paratrooper and received the Bronze Star for his service to our country.

Just like President Trump, Dave stood up to China and never backed down. As a businessman, Dave knows what it is like to have a real job, and he will never let America become a sociliast nation.

Dave knows that America is under attack from Big Tech, the Woke Left, and dumb government. He is tough enough to take on the Democrat establishment and WIN!

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Biden wants to DESTROY free speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
His end game is a totalitarian Marxist state.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390976:6GmugJoNj:m:1:3317145305:D26EC831AD456799AC4EEF2B1DB8969D:r)
---
Peter,
---
Joe Biden is running America off the rails. Consumer prices for goods and services have spiked 11% from last year, and we're facing unprecedented supply-chain and energy crises.
---
**Families should not be worried about how they're going to feed their babies or buy basic goods. This is America, not Venezuela!**
---
But instead of addressing these crises, Biden and his cronies are doubling down on their failed agenda by silencing dissent and cracking down on our right to free speech.
---
_The administration is creating a "Disinformation Governance Board" that will work in conjunction with big tech companies to censor content they deem "disinformation"._
---
**_Translation: they want to cancel any speech they deem harmful to their subjective and almost always blatantly false conception of truth._**
---
[**Please make a contribution to help us take back the House majority from the radical Left before they destroy free speech and turn America into a totalitarian Marxist state.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390976:6GmugJoNj:m:1:3317145305:D26EC831AD456799AC4EEF2B1DB8969D:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390976:6GmugJoNj:m:1:3317145305:D26EC831AD456799AC4EEF2B1DB8969D:r)**
---
Today's Democrat party is on an Orwellian blitz to further their control over the American public and force them to submit to their radical ideology.
---
Look no further than their outrage when Elon Musk announced his plan to purchase Twitter and turn it into a free-speech platform. _They 're furious he's upending their safe zone!_
---
Today's liberals don't want a free exchange of ideas and information. They don't want a country with a diverse array of opinions and political positions.
---
They want a subservient public that unquestioningly obeys everything that comes from the mouth of this "ministry of truth" they're creating.
---
Biden has even selected a radical liberal who supports critical race theory and labels anyone who opposes it as a "disinformer" to be its executive director.
---
_**_Peter, the First Amendment protects ALL speech, even speech we don 't like. _**_
---
The Democrats are taking our country down a dangerous road where alternative viewpoints are silenced and the only "truth" is the liberal talking points being pushed by a state-run media.
---
_November 8th is our last chance to stop them._
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help us take back the House majority from the radical Left before they destroy free speech and turn America into a totalitarian Marxist state.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60390976:6GmugJoNj:m:1:3317145305:D26EC831AD456799AC4EEF2B1DB8969D:r)

Peter – I'm reaching out to my top supporters to ask for $5 today, and I just need one moment to explain why:
* I haven't been able to fundraise for MOST of 2022 due to regulations around legislative sessions so our team has a lot of ground to make up for.

* I've worked tirelessly to bring bold, progressive policies to New Mexicans, but the GOP is now hoping to walk back all the progress we've made.

* **I need your help to raise $75,000 for our mid-month goal. If you donate $5 right now, I can make up for the time we've lost and defend myself from GOP attack ads.**

| | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45328327/345479048/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1283-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTFmNTlhYi00ZmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U5SY08p65MKHTcW1KrqJFLhuLE-GKl-EDJEBcrMmHSw=)
---
If I don't reach my mid-month goal, I'll have to make drastic budget cuts – which just isn't an option when the GOP is pushing harder than ever to replace me with a far-right extremist.
**[I can't keep New Mexico blue without your help, so please: Donate $5 before midnight tonight to help me reach my critical mid-month goal and continue building a brighter future.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45328330/345479052/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1283-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTFmNTlhYi00ZmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U5SY08p65MKHTcW1KrqJFLhuLE-GKl-EDJEBcrMmHSw=)**

name: Andy Biggs
subject: Leftists are trying to kick me off November’s ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
I’m fighting for my political life and I need your help. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6900%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=EHUTfLs8uk8ybkPUs0yT%2fg&sysid=1)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61018%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dlrY7yXDEjrP4Il6SVafCA&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
I recently won a lawsuit by a Far-Left activist group to remove me from the ballot in November.
**But I’m not out of the woods yet!**
You see, the radical Left are continuing their anti-democratic assault by appealing the decision to the Arizona Supreme Court.
That’s why [I need the support of patriots like you](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61019%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tfgQiUbqiv8kSoyn4Z1xDQ&sysid=1) to fund my legal fees and defeat this insidious, extremist plot.
**[So, can I count on you to stand with me now and help me fight back against this un-American attack on me by the open border socialist Left?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61010%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nb5L4HVnLsr68v9AIuz4Bw&sysid=1)** | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61011%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jwW91%2fIYxDvZ9OX4S8Ie4g&sysid=1)
---
| Let me be clear...the Left is targeting me because I’m an America First conservative who opposes their devastating open border agenda.
And they’re terrified because they know that if Republicans retake the majority in Congress next year, as a member of the House Oversight Committee...
**I’LL LEAD THE CHARGE to hold the Biden Crime Family accountable!**
Americans DESERVE to know if **“President-In-Name-Only” Joe Biden**...
* Is **compromised by Hunter Biden’s outrageous business dealings** with America’s enemies, including the Chinese Communist Party.

* **Illegally intervened in a criminal probe of Ukrainian gas company Burisma** , which paid Hunter 50K/mo to serve on its Board of Directors.

* Is **implicated in the countless other scandals involving Hunter and other Biden family members** who sold access to Joe!

But before any of this can happen, I first need to defeat the Left’s attack on me and return to Congress next year by winning re-election in November.
That’s why [I NEED your help!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61012%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZA7Vl4%2bTKKXkJrWsOkgbDg&sysid=1)
**[I hope you’ll stand with me today by rushing your most generous donation immediately.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61013%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v7vuQBBddmP0tUkpoU338A&sysid=1)** | | | | [HELP ME DEFEAT THE RADICAL LEFT!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61014%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VzZ6sWANcq9ygh6r8FGfag&sysid=1)
---
I’m grateful to be endorsed by the NRA. And I’m proud of my America-First, conservative record:

**Heritage Action = 98% Rating**

**FreedomWorks = 100% Rating**

**Club for Growth = 100% Rating**

**American Conservative Union = 100% Rating**

[And with the generous support of you and fellow patriots](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61025%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vFUWtWTWQvMjPQ%2fMvMnTKQ&sysid=1), I’ll continue fighting to defend the Constitution and preserve America’s timeless founding values.

**[So, please support my crucial fight to defeat the radical Left’s effort to kill my political career by chipping in your best gift of support today!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61026%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Uc%2fu12z7M58lIJWNguu5aw&sysid=1)**
| | | [DONATE $25](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61027%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rh%2foE5%2bwc5Woa7KgpfiK8A&sysid=1)
---
| | | [DONATE $50](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61028%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6d1WFZBlaincQiyvx1G30g&sysid=1)
---
| | | [DONATE $100](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61029%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bGrp1ioQfJi%2bLfykMb%2ft6g&sysid=1)
---
Thank you in advance for supporting me in this critical fight!

Yours in the fight for liberty,

Andy Biggs
Congressman (AZ-5)
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61020%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BPScsF9ffY0jRMm0hTa80Q&sysid=1)

body:
Polls show us neck and neck, in a race that experts are saying could decide Senate control.
| | |
---
**This is urgent, friend:****I'm running neck and neck in the polls with Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying could decide Senate control –**** and I'm falling short of my ****mid-month goal at a critical moment.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45332919/345498046/1948590133?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1781-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTVjMDlmMi01NWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DIiaMctZHLkOC1ydJjaqaOctCyvtsfzphei6FSwGcI=)
I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to close this polling gap and flip Florida blue – **but** **if we don't see a surge in support by midnight tonight, we won't have a shot. Let me explain:**
* Republicans know that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.

* Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records, and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to crush our momentum.

* **Now, with polls showing us neck and neck, Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me.**

**This is a critical moment for our campaign – and I urgently need your grassroots support to fight back immediately.** It's the only way to defend our Democratic majority and protect our democracy from the GOP.
Florida's last Senate election came down to only _0.12 points,_ so every single dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing. **Your donation could be the one that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians, and reach out to just enough voters to win.**
**[That's why I'm personally asking, friend: Please, will you rush $5 or more now – split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's – to help me close this gap, flip Florida blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority? We can deliver a meaningful win for Florida and our country – but only if we all pitch in at critical moments like these.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45332920/345498047/1948590133?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1781-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTVjMDlmMi01NWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DIiaMctZHLkOC1ydJjaqaOctCyvtsfzphei6FSwGcI=)**

clean_body: Polls show us neck and neck, in a race that experts are saying could decide Senate control. | | | This is urgent, friend:I'm running neck and neck in the polls with Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying could decide Senate control – and I'm falling short of my mid-month goal at a critical moment. = I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to close this polling gap and flip Florida blue – but if we don't see a surge in support by midnight tonight, we won't have a shot. Let me explain: Republicans know that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority. Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records, and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to crush our momentum. Now, with polls showing us neck and neck, Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me. This is a critical moment for our campaign – and I urgently need your grassroots support to fight back immediately. It's the only way to defend our Democratic majority and protect our democracy from the GOP. Florida's last Senate election came down to only 0.12 points, so every single dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing. Your donation could be the one that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians, and reach out to just enough voters to win. =** If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Val Demings and Jacky Rosen: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Val Demings | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada PO BOX 27195 LAS VEGAS, NV 89126 United States

My team is sending me an updated list of 600%-IMPACT Donors soon and I’ll be looking for your name. Thank you, Donald J. Friends,
This is Arizona Secretary of State Katie Hobbs, and I have an important message for you about our work here at DASS.
But first, one quick note – we have a crucial $60,000 mid-quarter deadline [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_051522_B1_AC_30D] coming up tomorrow at midnight, and I would really appreciate your help to get us over the finish line.
I’m coming to you directly, team. Will you chip in $10 or more right now and help fuel our people-powered movement? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_051522_B1_AC_30D]
CHIP IN $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_051522_B1_AC_30D]
We’re all working hard day in and day out to protect our elections and make sure pro-voter Secretaries of State win in November.
But the Big Lie brings in big money for the extremists trying to control your vote. For us to succeed in the midterms, we need to counter their massive spending. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_051522_B1_AC_30D]
We really need your help to close the gap and hit this goal. It could make or break the entire fight. Please, team: chip in $10 if you’re able and let’s hit this $60,000 mid-quarter goal together! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_051522_B1_AC_30D]

RUSH $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EM_FR_051522_B1_AC_30D]
Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may22?refcode=EM_FR_051522_B1_AC_30D&amount=5]
Thank you,
Katie Hobbs
Arizona Secretary of State
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
