name: Nan Whaley
subject: let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
Together, I know that we can come back from these crises and build a stronger future for our state.

Do you have a moment? I wanted to explain why it’s so important we hit our mid-month goals – **[and ask you to chip in to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45341881/345537664/704197326?refcode=nw_em_220515_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjg1ZmQzNi02YWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-e_r1gzWrUtPys0u3vWsPntbk_xbUdnRZslwQ-z6PY=)**
You’ve heard me say it before: I’m not a millionaire. I grew up in a hard-working union family just like the ones across the state that make Ohio so great.
This means I know a thing or two about strength and resilience, and I know what our families need to be successful: jobs that pay enough to support us, lower bills, and a government that works for us. But it also means I can’t pour my own millions into this race – unlike Mike DeWine.
**[I’m counting on supporters like you to help me. We still need 118 more grassroots supporters to step up and donate whatever they can. Will you be one of them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45341883/345537666/704197326?refcode=nw_em_220515_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjg1ZmQzNi02YWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-e_r1gzWrUtPys0u3vWsPntbk_xbUdnRZslwQ-z6PY=)**
I believe Ohio deserves better than another four years of DeWine’s out of touch and corrupt leadership. We’ve already had 46 years of DeWine in Ohio politics, and the result is that our state is falling behind. That and we’ve become home to the biggest corruption scandal the FBI has ever seen.
From the work we did to address the opioid crisis to the COVID-19 pandemic to a mass shooting in our city, I’ve worked hard to lead Dayton’s response to these issues and while there is more work to do, we’ve come out on the other side stronger than we were before. But these issues aren’t unique to Dayton – so many communities are experiencing them across the state.
**[Together, I know that we can come back from these crises and build a stronger future for our state – but I can’t do it without you. Pitch in $5.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45341884/345537667/704197326?refcode=nw_em_220515_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjg1ZmQzNi02YWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v-e_r1gzWrUtPys0u3vWsPntbk_xbUdnRZslwQ-z6PY=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

** **

name: Freedom First Project
subject: C.S. Lewis on Christianity
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Young people today grow up being told that their perception of reality is a matter of perspective. Recently, they are even told that women can choose to be men and men women. This denial of objective reality-including a denial of an objective good-is destructive of proper education, of religious faith, and of free government. Largely as an antidote to this destructive force, Hillsdale College is releasing its latest free online course,**"C.S. Lewis on Christianity."** Taught by Michael Ward, a visiting distinguished fellow at Hillsdale and a professor of theology at Oxford University, this seven-lecture course covers Lewis's philosophical defense of an objective good and his demonstration of its fulfillment in Christianity. **I am writing today to ask if you would consider****pre-registering for this free online course. You can do so at this secure link:********[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-preregister/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-R3QswX2LKfn2oERnyqF5Q)********After pre-registering for****"C.S. Lewis on Christianity," please help us****meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on May 16 to promote this new online course effectively, especially to young people.****** Hillsdale produces its free online courses, as it does all its work, while refusing to accept government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. We are entirely dependent on private donations. With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of young people in this new free online course and expand Hillsdale's other outreach efforts. Thank you for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: First GOP Debate – Major Momentum!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Michigan State Police Captain Michael Brown distinguished himself as the candidate who is best positioned to defeat Gretchen Whitmer in November. | | | |
---
| | |
#### Breaking News
# Michael Brown Shines in First Republican Debate
---
|
---
|
---
| In a wide-ranging debate Thursday night featuring eight Republican gubernatorial candidates, _Michigan State Police Captain Michael Brown distinguished himself as the candidate who is best positioned to defeat Gretchen Whitmer in November_.

Brown revealed one of the key reasons he decided to run for Governor.

When asked about his reaction to Governor Whitmer utilizing the state police to enforce her lockdown orders, Brown was passionate. He talked about the young men and women under his command who had to struggle with the enforcement orders, and how public respect for law enforcement throughout the state has declined as a result of the Governor's actions.

_"No Governor should ever do that," Brown stated. "And that's a big part of why I'm in this race today."_
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=0ea0b3e23c&e=0636b97700)
---
Lots of good press coverage of the debate.
|
---
| Brown, _the top crime fighter in the race_ , pointed out he was the only candidate who has released [a comprehensive pubic safety plan to reduce crime and protect our communities](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=dee75fc6e5&e=0636b97700).

Beyond public safety, he displayed a depth of knowledge on issues ranging from education to economics. He strongly advocated for trade school education alongside traditional college education, and promoted access to financial aid for trade schools.

"You can take out hundreds of thousands of dollars in loans to go to U of M," Brown stated. "But you can't get financial aid to go to a trade school. This must change."

Michael Brown is a US Marine Corps veteran having served under President Ronald Reagan. He has a distinguished 34-year career with the Michigan State Police where he currently serves as captain of the southwest division. Throughout his career, Captain Brown helped remove drugs and violent offenders from the streets, working to make communities safer.

He has excelled at developing high performing teams to tackle difficult situations and find solutions. This is the experience he will bring to Michigan as Governor.

It is Brown's thoughtful, common sense, personality that resonates with voters hungry for honest leadership in the Governor's office.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=c4365e27f1&e=0636b97700)
---
|
---
| **Peter:**

Now is the time to get onboard. We've got great momentum. Our[ latest campaign spot](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=3faf0f3572&e=0636b97700) is getting great response, I was well received at the debate Thursday night night, I'm getting more and more press coverage, we've got large signs going up all over the state, and I'm about to kick off another big campaign road trip.

Can you make a donation today to help? $25, $50, $100 or more?

We'll put it to great use promoting the campaign.

Thank you for your support!

Michael Brown
The Common Sense Conservative for Governor
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=b7f041c73e&e=0636b97700)
---

name: Lavern Spicer
subject: they act like I don’t exist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spicer for Congress |
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
Peter, Last week, Sunny Hostin made a ridiculous remark on "The View," saying she thought it was "an oxymoron" for a Black person to be a Republican.
Since she was _so confused_ about how anyone could _possibly_ be Black _and_ Republican, I offered to explain it to her.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
[**WATCH THE CLIP**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
**I even told Sunny to stop talking trash and to call me when she wants to debate a _real_ Black Republican woman. **
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
She must be scared because her _only_ response was to block me.
---
[**JOIN LAVERN SPICER**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
So I'll say what I would have told her directly to her face. Sunny, it's not necessarily the politics we appreciate. It's the conservative values that we love.
---
[**FIGHT FOR CONSERVATIVE VALUES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
We believe in... \- getting Big Government out of our lives and unlocking prosperity for _all_ Americans, regardless of the color of their skin. \- obeying the rule of law and respecting other people.
**But Sunny, you obviously don't mind crime and drugs destroying the Black community, but**** _we_****do, ****_and that's the difference!_**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
[**SAVE BLACK AMERICA**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
**Democrats have tricked you into thinking they care about you when you can plainly see they don't. ** _And it's the same mistake so many other Black folks continue making._
---
[**STOP THE DEMOCRATS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
I worked my way up and out of poverty by becoming a proud, independent businesswoman, **_and I lifted my community up along the way._** Let me tell you a little bit about myself.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
**My name is Lavern Spicer. I'm a proud patriot, business owner, and someone that believes in giving back to my community.** Twenty years ago, I started Curley's House of Style, a food bank in Miami, where we feed the people that the Democrats let starve.
Every month, we feed and clothe over 5,000 families, making us one of South Florida's _largest_ food banks.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
[**SUPPORT LAVERN SPICER**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
We're feeding them real food, not the same tired, broken promises. And it doesn't matter to us if you're white, Black, straight, gay, Republican or Democrat. We help __everyone__ in need. **No one gets turned away.**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
[**SAVE OUR NATION**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
Peter, the Democrats constantly dupe Black people into believing we can't _possibly_ be conservatives or Republicans. My life and my story prove that Black conservatives can, and DO, exist! **I'm running for Congress because I'll tell it like it is and I will****NEVER****stop fighting for the conservative values I hold dear.** [**Will you join me in showing the Democrats that being a Black Republican is not an "oxymoron"?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
[**DONATE $100**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391158:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
[**DONATE $75**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391159:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
[**DONATE $50**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391160:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
[**DONATE $25**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391161:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
Thank you for fighting alongside me,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391157:JS-qQaobN:m:1:3317145305:37B846D6FAB680ADA4B2F08F385C99EC:r)
---
Lavern Spicer Candidate, FL-24
---
|
---
|

| |

name: Roe v. Wade defense network (via unitedemocrats.org)
subject: Republicans are merciless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
Peter, we were wrong.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45342669/345541516/2029933579?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NjAwODdlLTcwZDQtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mM1NbOBIIXBUT7RzrT0bZFHxfq8VzhlbwSZjQSRAm90=)
---
**WHEN WE TOLD YOU** that Republicans were mercilessly attacking Senator Mark Kelly for his heroic defense of _Roe v. Wade_ , we thought Good Democrats like you would spring into action.

**WHEN WE TOLD YOU** that Democrats like Senator Kelly were the KEY to defending our razor-thin Senate Majority, we were positive that we would hit our $10,000 mid-month goal in no time.

**Peter, we were wrong.**

name: Team Kilmer
subject: In a 49-51 vote, the Senate has failed to codify Roe into federal law.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
"Every single person--in every single state--needs to realize this impacts you"
**" I am furious at the idea that Republicans are going to take us backward - that this will be the first generation of women with fewer rights than their mothers." ** _**- Senator Patty Murray**_
---
Peter,

In a 49-51 vote, the Senate failed to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law by not passing the Women's Health Protection Act.
In a matter of days or weeks, we could be living in a country where millions of people no longer have access to safe and legal abortion.

**The need for Democratic, pro-choice candidates to defend our House majority could not be more clear.** If the Supreme Court goes through with its plan to eliminate the constitutional right to abortion, a nationwide abortion ban may follow.

Let's be clear: Overturning _Roe_ won't mean the end of abortion - it will only mean the end of safe and life-saving reproductive care.

A champion for reproductive rights, Senator Patty Murray has helped secure $4.5 million in Title X funding for Washington and has been a fierce leader for reproductive justice ever since she was elected as the first woman senator to represent Washington.

**[Both Patty and Derek are ready to continue fighting for reproductive freedom, but they rely on support from grassroots teams like ours. Patty and Derek are coming up on an important mid-month deadline. Will you chip in $10, $5, or whatever you can so that they can continue to champion reproductive rights in Congress?](https://act.myngp.com/el/aDYOSU9hCpEAo06tE0_2Nxp2IT62frnzAWVk9Ffz-yQ=/ySZphgq-EQWF42jS2wgvGB4UEcbucjv4TafnLmZqC5Q=?refcode=em22_220515_mm2tan_fndt_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220515_mm2tan_fndt_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})**

Peter, in her own words, Patty remembers a time before _Roe_. She knows what it was like to live in a country where women didn't have somewhere safe to turn for an abortion and the consequences that inevitably ensued when women didn't have autonomy over their own bodies and health.

Patty and Derek know that the fight is far from over. And no matter what decision the Supreme Court comes to, they will never back down from championing the right to choose.

**[Will you split a donation between their two campaigns to help them defend the Senate and House majorities this November?](https://act.myngp.com/el/aDYOSU9hCpEAo06tE0_2Nxp2IT62frnzAWVk9Ffz-yQ=/ySZphgq-EQWF42jS2wgvGB4UEcbucjv4TafnLmZqC5Q=?refcode=em22_220515_mm2tan_fndt_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220515_mm2tan_fndt_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})**

Thanks for all that you do,

Team Kilmer

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/aDYOSU9hCpEAo06tE0_2Nxp2IT62frnzAWVk9Ffz-yQ=/ySZphgq-EQWF42jS2wgvGB4UEcbucjv4TafnLmZqC5Q=?refcode=em22_220515_mm2tan_fndt_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220515_mm2tan_fndt_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})

name: =?utf-8?q?PA_GOV_ALERTS_=F0=9F=9A=A8?=
subject: Berks County Commissioners Christian Leinbach and Michael Rivera endorse Barletta for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
---
**Berks County Commissioners Christian Leinbach and Michael Rivera endorse Barletta for Governor**
---
Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today announced the formal endorsement of Berks County Commissioners Christian Leinbach and Michael Rivera. Leinbach and Rivera's endorsement comes as Barletta's surging campaign is consolidating support across the Commonwealth at an unprecedented level over the last several days as Pennsylvania conservatives have begun to coalesce behind Barletta as the best candidate to defeat Josh Shapiro in November.
"The GOP race for Governor is unprecedented at least in my lifetime," said **Berks County Commissioner Christian Leinbach.** "There are so many candidates in this race and the various claims and counterclaims are confusing Republican voters. I know Lou Barletta. He listens to people, and he listens to county leaders. He understands that governance is about leadership and that leadership is about knowing and understanding the people, the counties and the Commonwealth you are to lead. We need a common sense conservative candidate for Governor and Lou is the only person in this race that I can support and that I believe can win the primary and defeat Josh Shapiro in the general election. We need to take back Pennsylvania and I believe Lou Barletta is the right candidate to do the job that’s why I’m endorsing Lou Barletta for Governor.”
“Lou Barletta jumps out as a great candidate for governor because he’s served at the local level, as mayor of Hazleton, and served in Congress, plus he’s run a successful small business," said **Berks County Commissioner Michael Rivera. "** As local leaders, we always want a governor who understands what our own citizens are experiencing. I’m supporting Lou Barletta because he’s a common sense conservative who is the only one in the Republican field who can bring victory in November. We have a chance to accomplish great things, but it will take a candidate who can actually win. That’s Lou Barletta.”

---

name: Governor Barbara Roberts
subject: Crossroads
body:
I’m asking you to vote for my friend Tobias Read to be our next Governor.
---
| | Dear Peter,

With just a couple of days left in this primary election, I’m asking you to vote for my friend Tobias Read to be our next Governor. Oregon is at a crossroads, with crisis after crisis wracking the hard working people of our great state. **We have a competitive primary for Governor for the first time in a generation, and I’m voting for Tobias because his vision is comprehensive and achievable.**

[**Make sure to return your ballot by this Tuesday. You can drop it in the mail or click here to find the nearest drop box.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45343553/345544607/719410068?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDhmN2EwZC03MmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=13hvdpKS3XKICy9EQKNlKStuKd3yAXOavNAWCzcMnJY=&emci=e0f60b06-72d4-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=3d8f7a0d-72d4-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=30662126)

Right now, as you’re reading this, thousands of our neighbors are living on the streets of our cities and towns in every county in the state. In Portland alone this year 34 of our fellow Oregonians have been shot dead. And our children are less likely to graduate high school than they were just a few years ago. These are challenging times.

I know Tobias, and I know that when he tackles a problem he does it with unparalleled focus and zeal. He’s the kind of leader I’ll be proud to have working for all of us in the Governor’s office. **Plus Tobias is the kind of leader who can bring people together.** His leadership experience will bring positive results for Oregon.

That’s especially important this year, with Republicans looking to govern Oregon for the first time in forty years. Make no mistake: Republicans in every state in America, including Oregon, are ready and willing to turn back the clock on women’s rights, LGBT rights, and so much more. That’s why it’s essential that our party put forward a candidate with broad appeal, who can reach disaffected people and address their grievances.

There’s no room in Salem for bomb lobbers and power brokers. The decisions the next Governor will need to make are too consequential for that. I’m looking to the next Governor for thoughtful, decisive action. Oregon deserves no less. **That’s why I’m asking you to join me in voting for Tobias Read.**

Together we can change our future for the better. That’s worth fighting for.

Thank you,
Governor Barbara Roberts
---

clean_body: I’m asking you to vote for my friend Tobias Read to be our next Governor. | | Dear Peter, With just a couple of days left in this primary election, I’m asking you to vote for my friend Tobias Read to be our next Governor. Oregon is at a crossroads, with crisis after crisis wracking the hard working people of our great state. We have a competitive primary for Governor for the first time in a generation, and I’m voting for Tobias because his vision is comprehensive and achievable. Right now, as you’re reading this, thousands of our neighbors are living on the streets of our cities and towns in every county in the state. In Portland alone this year 34 of our fellow Oregonians have been shot dead. And our children are less likely to graduate high school than they were just a few years ago. These are challenging times. I know Tobias, and I know that when he tackles a problem he does it with unparalleled focus and zeal. He’s the kind of leader I’ll be proud to have working for all of us in the Governor’s office. Plus Tobias is the kind of leader who can bring people together. His leadership experience will bring positive results for Oregon. That’s especially important this year, with Republicans looking to govern Oregon for the first time in forty years. Make no mistake: Republicans in every state in America, including Oregon, are ready and willing to turn back the clock on women’s rights, LGBT rights, and so much more. That’s why it’s essential that our party put forward a candidate with broad appeal, who can reach disaffected people and address their grievances. There’s no room in Salem for bomb lobbers and power brokers. The decisions the next Governor will need to make are too consequential for that. I’m looking to the next Governor for thoughtful, decisive action. Oregon deserves no less. That’s why I’m asking you to join me in voting for Tobias Read. Together we can change our future for the better. That’s worth fighting for. Thank you, Governor Barbara Roberts * | = | | | | | | | | | Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States

subject: Running for Congress certainly isn’t easy, but Wisconsin is worth it.

Peter, I’m no stranger to going above and beyond when it comes to serving our nation. Early in my Army career, I signed up for airborne training because I wanted to be deployable to our nation’s toughest assignments. I was the only woman in my class of 140 soldiers - and when it was time for the first jump out of the plane, the sergeants placed me first in line to lead.

When I had the option of serving in Japan or on the Demilitarized Zone in Korea, I didn’t choose the “safer” place. Being a woman on the DMZ wasn’t easy, but the 2nd Infantry Unit on the DMZ was where the Army needed me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45343756/345545341/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.65baf396-72d4-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.65baf396-72d4-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWJhZjM5Ni03MmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQq3wh-H66gE4xfbRlhkKHumQjcC5S_UAT1RqQE9S5k=)
_Picture of me on the DMZ - only woman in leadership_
My father, Al Baldus, my husband, Kevin, and our son, Daniel, and I all served in that same Army unit - the 2nd Infantry Division - on the DMZ. We went above and beyond to serve where needed. My father was awarded the Bronze Star for valor in the Korean Conflict. Kevin was a Special Forces (Green Beret) Army Ranger. Daniel is an Army Ranger Airborne Sapper. And I earned Airborne wings.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45343758/345545343/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.65baf396-72d4-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.65baf396-72d4-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWJhZjM5Ni03MmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WQq3wh-H66gE4xfbRlhkKHumQjcC5S_UAT1RqQE9S5k=)
_On the left, my husband Kevin and my son Daniel, and on right, my father Al Baldus._
Then, following the horrific events of 9/11, I knew I had to step up to serve again. I joined the CIA as a direct consequence of the attacks, where I worked in covert operations in some of the world’s most hostile environments and conflict zones.

Throughout my life, I continued to further my education so I could empower others and lead strategically. At the U.S. Army War College, I was a Distinguished Graduate. And I was often the only woman in a class of men.

Peter, running for Congress may not require me to work under cover, carry a Glock, or jump out of planes, but it presents challenges of its own. Still, I relish the opportunity to do what I can to deliver real leadership and real results for my hometown community.

**Ours is one of the most competitive House races in the nation, and the Republican House campaign arm is already targeting WI-03 as a pick-up opportunity. If we’re going to succeed in holding this district for Democrats, we ALL have to join together and be ready to do whatever it takes.

[Right now, I need you to contribute $25 (or any amount that’s right for you) to help hit our mid-month fundraising goal of $2,000. We can’t run a winning campaign without the funds we need to compete. clean_body: America deserves all we can give. | Peter, I knew from long before I entered this race that running for Congress wouldn’t be easy. But in my family, we take on the toughest challenges and go the extra mile in service to our country - I firmly believe that America deserves all we can give. I’m running for office not because it’s an easy way to make a difference, but precisely because it is a difficult, worthwhile way to serve. Before I share more, I need to ask for your support for our campaign. Our mid-month fundraising deadline is just hours away, and my finance team let me know that we’re $1,200 short of our $2,000 goal.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Peter, I’m no stranger to going above and beyond when it comes to serving our nation. Early in my Army career, I signed up for airborne training because I wanted to be deployable to our nation’s toughest assignments. I was the only woman in my class of 140 soldiers - and when it was time for the first jump out of the plane, the sergeants placed me first in line to lead. When I had the option of serving in Japan or on the Demilitarized Zone in Korea, I didn’t choose the “safer” place. Being a woman on the DMZ wasn’t easy, but the 2nd Infantry Unit on the DMZ was where the Army needed me. = Picture of me on the DMZ - only woman in leadership My father, Al Baldus, my husband, Kevin, and our son, Daniel, and I all served in that same Army unit - the 2nd Infantry Division - on the DMZ. We went above and beyond to serve where needed. My father was awarded the Bronze Star for valor in the Korean Conflict. Kevin was a Special Forces (Green Beret) Army Ranger. Daniel is an Army Ranger Airborne Sapper. And I earned Airborne wings. = On the left, my husband Kevin and my son Daniel, and on right, my father Al Baldus. Then, following the horrific events of 9/11, I knew I had to step up to serve again. I joined the CIA as a direct consequence of the attacks, where I worked in covert operations in some of the world’s most hostile environments and conflict zones. Throughout my life, I continued to further my education so I could empower others and lead strategically. At the U.S. Army War College, I was a Distinguished Graduate. And I was often the only woman in a class of men. Peter, running for Congress may not require me to work under cover, carry a Glock, or jump out of planes, but it presents challenges of its own. Still, I relish the opportunity to do what I can to deliver real leadership and real results for my hometown community. Ours is one of the most competitive House races in the nation, and the Republican House campaign arm is already targeting WI-03 as a pick-up opportunity. If we’re going to succeed in holding this district for Democrats, we ALL have to join together and be ready to do whatever it takes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Together, we can make a real difference in the future of our country. Thank you, Deb | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. This campaign runs on the support from folks like you. = | **=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 41, Menomonie, WI 54751 Use of Deb McGrath's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform (or that of others) does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, the Central Intelligence Agency, or any other branch of government. Friend, we're SO close to hitting our mid-month fundraising goal and powering this movement to defeat the extremist Arizona GOP. Here's where things stand:
**FIRST: **Experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight rated our race a TOSS-UP – meaning we have a real chance of winning what POLITICO calls the most competitive open-seat race in the entire country.
**THEN:** The GOP realized this wasn't an easy race, so they started spiraling in response to our momentum. They had to bring out their biggest threats (including _Donald Trump himself_) to prop up our extremist likely opponent and are ponying up MILLIONS to keep Arizona red.
**NOW: With time running out before our mid-month fundraising deadline, it's clear we're making an impact – but we're also falling just $649 short of what we need to keep up our fight. **
**Experts at The Washington Post say the best ****way to protect our democracy from extremism is by flipping more governor's seats blue – and here in Arizona, Marco Lopez (D) is the one to do it. But he can only win if we hit _every_ goal.**

**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45346974/345547981/1927938479?refcode=220513_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODU1NTEwZC03N2Q0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1tfT52wC_9V1AOcmCES3Ksd6XsrgDK81kPVjRoFU5Y4=)
Team — [**I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $25 or whatever you can afford split between my campaign and Seth Moulton — to help counter the $1,000,000 NRSC attack ad that is on the air now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45346975/345547982/1927938479?refcode=220513_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODU1NTEwZC03N2Q0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1tfT52wC_9V1AOcmCES3Ksd6XsrgDK81kPVjRoFU5Y4=) Here’s the truth: This is the biggest attack on our campaign so far. The NRSC put $1,000,000 behind this ad in one week alone, and they won’t stop there. But we’ve seen tough times before. And thanks to you, we’ve always come out the other side stronger. So, we need a BIG response to show them that it’s going to take a lot more than a few attack ads to stop this team and our momentum. **And friend, it’s critical that we have everyone with us if we’re going to hit our $1,000,000 goal by midnight and set the record straight. Even splitting $25 can make a difference if everyone is pitching in.** We’ve had a good start so far, and while our opponents may have super PACs and outside groups spending millions of dollars in attack ads against us, we have each other. And that’s how we’ll win. Which is why I’m humbly asking: [**Can you please split a donation of $25 or more today between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us hit our $1,000,000 goal and counter the flood of outside spending pouring into this race? clean_body: we’ve got the receipts to prove it. | = | | Can you believe it? With just days until the May 17th deadline to return ballots, = This seat in Congress is not for sale. We can’t let their corrupt electoral games go unanswered! We’re about to tell you the whole story but first: = | | | = | | = The GOP-linked super PAC backing my Democratic opponent is trying to hide the source of their money but we have the receipts. = = Why would a conservative super PAC spend half a million dollars in a Democratic primary? = We knew our grassroots, people-centered campaign would draw the ire of fossil fuel companies and powerful interests —= Why would a crypto super PAC spend half a million dollars in dark money on a Democratic primary in small town Oregon? It's simple: = This is the way of Washington, and they know full well that Doyle can’t be bought by billionaires and is going to join Senator Warren in taking them on. Doyle has spent her career taking on billionaires like Warren Buffett and Jeff Bezos and she will keep on fighting for us in Congress. Crypto billionaires really don’t want her to win - and they know this race is close. That’s why they are spending more at the last minute! Now, we need your help more than ever. Oregon’s voters have ballots in hand and we can’t let our opponent’s super PAC backers go unanswered. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. We will keep updated on these rapidly evolving developments! | Peter,
I don't have much time, so I'll get straight to the point.
The Swamp is trying to destroy me!
You see, with less than a week left until my primary election, the Swamp's most vile creatures are launching an all-out assault against me.
**RINOs, radical Leftists and Fake News Media propagandists have joined forces to kick me out of Congress!**
This team of Establishment political assassins are sparing no expense in their effort to replace me a spineless, do-nothing RINO.
And I'm reaching out today because next Tuesday's election will be decided by a razor-thin margin, and [I urgently NEED your support right now](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391185:6finsaoNd:m:1:3317145305:B3618999FFA0897A7FE56F8AEFC1F6D6:r).

During my first term in Congress, I made MANY powerful enemies because since day one, I've been **100% committed to Making America Great Again** , and...
**...defending our nation 's Founding heritage of liberty and limited government and putting our many great patriots like you FIRST!**
It gives me tremendous pride to know that my principled conservative record has earned me the distinct honor of being **The DC Swamp 's #1 Target!**
I know you agree it's critically important that we defeat the Establishment's effort to replace conservatives like me with cowardly RINOs, so I hope you'll:
**[Pitch in your best gift of any amount now to help me defeat my Swamp-ENDORSED opponent in next Tuesday's critical primary election!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391185:6finsaoNd:m:1:3317145305:B3618999FFA0897A7FE56F8AEFC1F6D6:r)** | | | | [DONATE $10](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60391186:6finsaoNd:m:1:3317145305:B3618999FFA0897A7FE56F8AEFC1F6D6:r)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45348661/345549348/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmExOWFlMi03OGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aRVE-Ulw86cxnP--t6pPeiUNRGGs9f2anPUngYghy0c=)

| | It’s officially primary election week, Peter! Before polls open in 48 hours, we want to take a step back and reflect on how much we’ve accomplished together since we launched this campaign 14 months ago. We’re building something special on the ground here in Western North Carolina. With over 30,000 grassroots donors on our side, we’re rejecting the notion that corporate donors get to call the shots. Instead, we’re running a campaign that is by and for the people. We have raised more than $1.6 million with an average donation under $37 and 97% of our contributions coming in at $100 or less. **Our fundraising numbers say it all: people believe in our campaign and our momentum has never been stronger.** We have been organizing in every county across the district and you can feel the energy on the ground - people are sick and tired of Cawthorn’s extremism, feeling the urgency of fighting to protect the right to choose, and fired up to join our campaign. With our cash on hand advantage over Cawthorn, we have the resources to invest immediately in organizing, launching new ads online and on TV, and doing everything we can to share Jasmine’s message with voters across Western North Carolina. [**We just have two days left to reach as many voters as we can and prove that Jasmine is the best candidate to lead us forward. clean_body: | = | | It’s officially primary election week, Peter! Before polls open in 48 hours, we want to take a step back and reflect on how much we’ve accomplished together since we launched this campaign 14 months ago. We’re building something special on the ground here in Western North Carolina. With over 30,000 grassroots donors on our side, we’re rejecting the notion that corporate donors get to call the shots. Instead, we’re running a campaign that is by and for the people. We have raised more than $1.6 million with an average donation under $37 and 97% of our contributions coming in at $100 or less. Our fundraising numbers say it all: people believe in our campaign and our momentum has never been stronger. We have been organizing in every county across the district and you can feel the energy on the ground - people are sick and tired of Cawthorn’s extremism, feeling the urgency of fighting to protect the right to choose, and fired up to join our campaign. With our cash on hand advantage over Cawthorn, we have the resources to invest immediately in organizing, launching new ads online and on TV, and doing everything we can to share Jasmine’s message with voters across Western North Carolina. = | | | = | | = – Beach-Ferrara HQ | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. [You can do so here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45348737/345549442/1689635918?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220515midmonth2_jtm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWRiMDEwNS03OWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KV-wwchD-ebju_MEkqnVpglCjwFd4905aysm7kLlMo=) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45348738/345549443/1689635918?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220515midmonth2_jtm_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWRiMDEwNS03OWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KV-wwchD-ebju_MEkqnVpglCjwFd4905aysm7kLlMo=)

Wes and I had a chance to sit down and reflect on his journey leading up to his gubernatorial campaign. Wes’ father passed when Wes was only 3 years old, a devastating loss for all of us. I went on to raise Wes and his two sisters as a single mother, trying to steer Wes on a positive path in life.
When he lost his way, I sent him to military school, and he ultimately went on to serve his country in Afghanistan as a Captain in the U.S. Army, became a Rhodes Scholar, and served as CEO at one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations. I couldn’t be more proud.
One of the most important things Wes learned in the Army and kept in mind since is the simple but critical motto: **“leave nobody behind.”**
_Right now, too many are being left behind here in Maryland, which is exactly why Wes is running for governor._
Maryland’s primary election to determine the Democratic nominee for governor is just over two months away, and Wes’ team tells me that tomorrow is an important mid-month fundraising deadline to ensure we have the resources to win.
**[I hope you’ll join me and chip in what you can to support my son, Wes. I believe that together we can build a state that leaves nobody behind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45348739/345549444/1689635918?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220515midmonth2_jtm_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWRiMDEwNS03OWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KV-wwchD-ebju_MEkqnVpglCjwFd4905aysm7kLlMo=)**

clean_body: | = Hi friend, On Mother’s Day, our campaign to elect my son Wes the next Governor of Maryland released our newest ad. Have you had a chance to watch it yet? = | = Wes and I had a chance to sit down and reflect on his journey leading up to his gubernatorial campaign. Wes’ father passed when Wes was only 3 years old, a devastating loss for all of us. I went on to raise Wes and his two sisters as a single mother, trying to steer Wes on a positive path in life. When he lost his way, I sent him to military school, and he ultimately went on to serve his country in Afghanistan as a Captain in the U.S. Army, became a Rhodes Scholar, and served as CEO at one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations. I couldn’t be more proud. One of the most important things Wes learned in the Army and kept in mind since is the simple but critical motto: “leave nobody behind.” Right now, too many are being left behind here in Maryland, which is exactly why Wes is running for governor. Maryland’s primary election to determine the Democratic nominee for governor is just over two months away, and Wes’ team tells me that tomorrow is an important mid-month fundraising deadline to ensure we have the resources to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for everything, Joy | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

clean_body: If Ron Hanks flips this seat, he will have a national platform to wage his assault on our democracy and our rights. | = = Ron Hanks might be the frontrunner in the GOP primary, but he doesn’t reflect Colorado’s values, team. He’s an insurrectionist who loudly champions Trump’s Big Lie while trying to make it harder to vote here in Colorado. He announced he would repeal the ACA which would strip 500,000 Coloradans of their health care coverage. And he tried to outright ban abortions without exceptions for cases involving rape or incest. And while Republicans attempt to distract from last week’s leaked Supreme Court decision that would overturn Roe v. Wade and nearly half a century of reproductive freedom, their campaign arm is targeting seats like mine with their massive $43 million warchest. If Ron Hanks flips this seat, he will have a national platform to wage his assault on our democracy and our rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thank you for your support, Michael P.S. Ron Hanks doesn’t represent Coloradans’ interests, but a recent poll shows me down just 1% to a GOP opponent. Folks, I won my last re-election race by 1.7%. We simply can’t afford to take this race for granted. = Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

subject: Chairman of Beaver County Commissioners Dan Camp endorses Barletta for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
---
**Chairman of Beaver County Commissioners Dan Camp endorses Barletta for Governor**
---
Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today announced the formal endorsement of the Chairman of the Beaver County Board of Commissioners Dan Camp. Camp becomes the latest prominent Pennsylvania conservative to throw his support behind Barletta's surging campaign over the last several days as Pennsylvania conservatives have rallied behind Barletta as the best candidate to defeat Josh Shapiro in November.
“Western PA deserves a seat at the table and with Lou Barletta as governor, we’ll get one,” said **Beaver County Commissioner Dan Camp.** “We have a fantastic opportunity to reverse Gov. Wolf’s policies and access our vast energy resources, but it will take electing a Republican in November. That means we must nominate a Republican candidate who can actually beat Democrat Josh Shapiro. In my view, that candidate is Lou Barletta, and I endorse him completely.”
---

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Cheri’s story (photos)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Lou Beasley raised her daughter to know the value of hard work and service to others.
#

Lou Beasley raised her daughter in a home steeped in faith, teaching her daughter Cheri the value of hard work and a commitment to service. And Lou taught her that with those values of hard work and faith, Cheri could accomplish anything.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220515-1-ma&refcode2=876.357359.mG3UZh&t=1&akid=876%2E357359%2EmG3UZh)
Cheri took those values to heart and dedicated her life to fighting for the people. After graduating from law school, she went to work as a public defender in Fayetteville, North Carolina.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220515-1-ma&refcode2=876.357359.mG3UZh&t=2&akid=876%2E357359%2EmG3UZh)
But that was just the start. As a young mom, Cheri took the leap to run for office and give back more to her community. When her opponent said that a mom couldn’t win, she worked even harder to beat him by almost 30 points in her first campaign for district judge.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220515-1-ma&refcode2=876.357359.mG3UZh&t=3&akid=876%2E357359%2EmG3UZh)
Cheri dedicated the next 20 years to fairness and justice for all North Carolinians. She went on to win statewide twice and became the first Black woman to serve as Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220515-1-ma&refcode2=876.357359.mG3UZh&t=4&akid=876%2E357359%2EmG3UZh)
And she’s still not done fighting to be a voice for the people and justice. Now, she’s running to be North Carolina’s next U.S. Senator — to flip this seat and deliver meaningful change and progress on the issues that matter most to our families. This is her toughest challenge yet, so she needs all of us behind her.
[**Can you please make a donation to our historic campaign to help us elect Lou Beasley’s daughter as North Carolina’s next senator? Cheri will do exactly what her mom taught her in the U.S. Senate — work hard and serve others.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220515-1-ma&refcode2=876.357359.mG3UZh&t=5&akid=876%2E357359%2EmG3UZh)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

As a young mom, Cheri took the leap to run for office and give back more to her community. When her opponent said that a mom couldn’t win, she worked even harder to beat him by almost 30 points in her first campaign for district judge. Cheri dedicated the next 20 years to fairness and justice for all North Carolinians. She went on to win statewide twice and became the first Black woman to serve as Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court. And she’s still not done fighting to be a voice for the people and justice. Now, she’s running to be North Carolina’s next U.S. Senator — to flip this seat and deliver meaningful change and progress on the issues that matter most to our families. This is her toughest challenge yet, so she needs all of us behind her. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** — Team Beasley Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611

[I’m just a concerned citizen who’s running for Congress because I know good people need to stand up for their communities. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45351490/345554729/-1262028889?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220515_FR_COMEDY_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDhhYmM5Yy03ZWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gm111QHFdQvaQNe1MJhwYiQ1IZrTfvFeOtOf9icsQvo=)

[I may not be your typical politician but I know that my creative background will serve me well in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45351491/345554730/-1262028889?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220515_FR_COMEDY_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDhhYmM5Yy03ZWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gm111QHFdQvaQNe1MJhwYiQ1IZrTfvFeOtOf9icsQvo=)

name: Izzi Levy
subject: smug smiles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ][IMG]

No matter where I go, I can’t seem to escape JD Vance and his disingenuous
smile.

He’s there when I turn on the TV or when I log into Twitter. Whenever I
open my email, boom—guess who? Yep. You hate to see it.

The thing is, folks, I’ve got to figure out how to cut through
all the noise and media attention swirling around JD—not just because I
can’t stand the sight of him, but because that’s actually my job.

Thanks to his big tech billionaire buddies, the guy’s face is plastered
everywhere, and it’s literally my responsibility to figure out how to get
Tim’s message in front of as many voters as possible.

That’s where you come in—this $200,000 Mid-Quarter goal is a big deal,
because hitting it would mean landing a big counterpunch to JD’s limitless
money printer. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]I’m looking to you, folks, to chip in a quick
$25 if you can.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1015&amount=25&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1016&amount=50&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1017&amount=100&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1018&amount=200&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1019&amount=250&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1020&amount=30&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Other Amount

If you’re as tired as I am of seeing JD winning the battle on the
airwaves, here’s your chance to hit the “mute” button (and trust me, he
deserves it).

He’s got money, and lots of it—but he’s got absolutely zero interest in
improving the lives of folks in Ohio.

Our polling shows that getting Tim’s message in front of Ohio voters is
our best chance of defeating JD this fall, and hitting this goal would
give us the resources to make that happen.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1021&amount=25&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]So folks, will you chip in a few bucks ASAP to help us hit
our Mid-Quarter goal and wipe that smug smile right off JD’s face?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1009&amount=50&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1010&amount=100&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1011&amount=200&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1012&amount=250&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12518?t=1013&amount=30&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Other Amount

Thanks!

Izzi Levy

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=3756%2E3611125%2ER1qN3F ]Donate Monthly

name: Peter Franchot
subject: URGENT: Fundraising Deadline Hours Away
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
We’re just hours away from our critical mid-May fundraising deadline. While many of our grassroots supporters have stepped up to help us meet our goal, we still need a little help to reach our $10,000 target. A flood of grassroots donations in these final hours can easily get us there, so now is the time to maximize the impact of your contribution.
RUSH $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0515?amount=10]
RUSH $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0515?amount=20.22]
RUSH $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0515?amount=50]
RUSH $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0515?amount=100]
RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0515]
Recent polls have consistently shown that our team is the frontrunner in this crowded field. And in these final weeks before the July 19 primary, we continue to gain momentum. We have more endorsements than any other candidate, and we’re expanding our coalition of support with new endorsement announcements every week. We were one of the first campaigns to go live on TV, and we have more ads to come.
We’re closer to the finish line than any other team in the race – and it’s all thanks to the Marylanders who continue to power this movement from the grassroots up. I am so proud that the majority of our grassroots donations have come from right here within our state. As the Local Candidate for Governor in 2022, the people of Maryland know me, and I know them. I can’t wait to bring my trusted brand of proven, honest leadership to deliver the concrete results and bold solutions that our neighbors need.
Together, let’s get it done. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0515?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0515?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0515?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthmay_0515?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, We’re just hours away from our critical mid-May fundraising deadline. While many of our grassroots supporters have stepped up to help us meet our goal, we still need a little help to reach our $10,000 target. A flood of grassroots donations in these final hours can easily get us there, so now is the time to maximize the impact of your contribution. RUSH $10 [] RUSH $20.22 [] RUSH $50 [] RUSH $100 [] RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Recent polls have consistently shown that our team is the frontrunner in this crowded field. And in these final weeks before the July 19 primary, we continue to gain momentum. We have more endorsements than any other candidate, and we’re expanding our coalition of support with new endorsement announcements every week. We were one of the first campaigns to go live on TV, and we have more ads to come. We’re closer to the finish line than any other team in the race – and it’s all thanks to the Marylanders who continue to power this movement from the grassroots up. I am so proud that the majority of our grassroots donations have come from right here within our state. As the Local Candidate for Governor in 2022, the people of Maryland know me, and I know them. I can’t wait to bring my trusted brand of proven, honest leadership to deliver the concrete results and bold solutions that our neighbors need. Together, let’s get it done. [] Thank you, [] [] CHIP IN [] By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer. Emails like this are where almost all of our donations come from, and we’re hoping the response to this one is big.

body:

| | |
---
Friend,

I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. **And right now, grassroots donations have slowed down _just _before my Mid Month fundraising deadline. **
A poll of my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just a few points behind Marco Rubio!). I need to surge _ahead_ , friend – _ _ and the only way to do it is by hitting my $75,000 Mid Month fundraising goal.
Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (_10,033 votes_), so every dollar will make a difference. With Rubio and the GOP having more than $43 million at their disposal, **missing****my goal**** could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win.**
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. _Your_ support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio.
So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I _trust_ you and _believe_ that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation toward my Mid Month goal before midnight tomorrow to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: we can't give Mitch McConnell another "yes" vote for his anti-choice agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Mitch McConnell's decades-long quest to undo a woman's fundamental freedom is before us, and the time to act is now.
| | |
---
We're on the verge of _Roe v. Wade_ being overturned, folks.
**Mitch McConnell's decades-long quest to undo a woman's fundamental freedom is before us, and the time to act is now.**
**[Before I go any further, can I ask you to rush a contribution before today's mid-month deadline to help protect and expand our pro-choice Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45352440/345559109/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1007-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmJkZDZmNy04MWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mYX9LU7pwBmIRjf90Sdjri7oXOSZoNnAHMmFdiBNa40=)**
With Roe hanging on by a thread, we can't give Mitch McConnell another "yes" vote for his anti-choice agenda.
But here's the deal: The Senate is split 50-50, and political experts are calling my seat one of the most likely to flip this November. The NRSC just announced a $9 million ad buy against me. Even Rachel Maddow is sounding the alarm, saying I have "a difficult reelection fight ahead of [me]."
**I'll be blunt: If I lose, we'll lose our Democratic majority and any chance we have at protecting access to abortion across the country.**
The stakes of this election have never been higher. Every single one of my opponents – and yes, they're all men – would vote to criminalize abortion.
**[That's why I need your support now more than ever. Please, help my team and me protect and expand our pro-choice Senate majority by donating $3 or whatever you can before today's mid-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45352441/345559110/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1007-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmJkZDZmNy04MWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mYX9LU7pwBmIRjf90Sdjri7oXOSZoNnAHMmFdiBNa40=)**

clean_body: Mitch McConnell's decades-long quest to undo a woman's fundamental freedom is before us, and the time to act is now. | | | We're on the verge of Roe v. Wade being overturned, folks. Mitch McConnell's decades-long quest to undo a woman's fundamental freedom is before us, and the time to act is now. = With Roe hanging on by a thread, we can't give Mitch McConnell another "yes" vote for his anti-choice agenda. But here's the deal: The Senate is split 50-50, and political experts are calling my seat one of the most likely to flip this November. The NRSC just announced a $9 million ad buy against me. Even Rachel Maddow is sounding the alarm, saying I have "a difficult reelection fight ahead of [me]." I'll be blunt: If I lose, we'll lose our Democratic majority and any chance we have at protecting access to abortion across the country. The stakes of this election have never been higher. clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | | | | Volunteers are FLOODING into our campaign offices from now until November to help turn out the vote for Dr. Raul Ruiz and keep the House blue. But as of now, we don’t have enough money to pay for more yard signs to give them so they can show their support for Dr. Ruiz!! Yard signs only cost a couple of dollars each, but they will make an INCREDIBLE difference. | | | | | | We appreciate your support, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress , please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: Take Courage!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
**>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq** With all that's going on in the world, it can be easy to lose sight of what we're truly up against. Factions continue to grow as wars abound creating an innumerable amount of distractions that cause us nothing but stress. In the midst of it all, we've entered a disappointing election cycle where career politicians have once again taken center stage and stooped to new lows sacrificing their moral compass just to win.

It's easy to throw in the towel and just give up on politics, but I'm begging you to stay with me. There's still time. We must keep our eyes on the prize as we navigate through these rough waters. I believe in America and what it stands for. We may not always be perfect, but it isn't perfection that makes us a great nation. It's our heart and desire to unify for the good despite differences.
**Take courage! **
Come November, let's unite in such a way that it sends a powerful message to that part of the country that seems spellbound on taking away the rights and freedoms prior generations once fought and died for. If hope is to be a motivator and not a crutch, it must be honest and not false. I will continue spreading this message of hope and with your help...I'm just getting started!
**Now, here's what I need you to do right now: **
* Forward this message to nine (9) of your friends and family. Choose three (3) of them to personally call and inform them that I meant what I said in the beginning of my campaign when I said I would run for the Senate until **_we_** won!
* Commit to my campaign now by [donating $9](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=6f2a4d5a64&e=a49cb82bb3) or more to keep this true grassroots campaign going.
* [Subscribe and follow me on social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=862212cf03&e=a49cb82bb3) where I'm active and live often. Share a post or two!

Visit [haneefahkhaaliq.org](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=6b66e80851&e=a49cb82bb3), view my 33 national policies and agendas, and become a volunteer today! I am Indiana. You are Indiana. Together, we are Indiana!

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate
2022

We can't afford to wait until the last minute.

| I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but my re-election campaign has an important fundraising deadline tonight and I wanted to take a moment to let you know what we’re up against. **The reality is that Republicans are eager to get me out of Congress, and they’re ready to pull out all the stops to do it.**

I understand their opposition. After all, I am a strong progressive advocate on issues like making the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, passing the Green New Deal, and lowering prescription drug prices. They want to replace me with someone who will be a rubber stamp for their extremist agenda — but I won’t let them. They want to replace me with someone who will be a rubber stamp for their extremist agenda — but I won’t let them. = | = | = I want to send a strong message to Republicans that I am here to advocate for my constituents, and I’m not going anywhere. body:
My primary is in TWO days and we're throwing things at a wall to see what sticks right now. We're running out of time and we need help. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=ef7f62e6fc5f40a7927f1171b15d2da1&_e=1fYyNyzrx2omASqjeMWdm_YWyj_79cIcSCHv4OXZj28VrA9aHGb9LyT_ywFS0DE6EJqQDe5ZFczloJhuS7q0nSZBlm9fxyWg-7-ZH83gyWD8C3GIsXL8oobMG_OidDKmn9laJnPephKGJ3lKGg1P-gfjxT8W1JaCgGRQwIlgA_13GrQ4zor4-WEq4XmsEwAKsS92f8qZubdOsZYCrjjEwL0a-eIyAPOplIqDdUOAlCzTflSp14_ZN2amOTVlitbisyCkA2gMIvqUrUycA3dV0bvhVgdItTSwxNQ6pgxwXgIJl5rwhdnXmxrLqyzUdVMmHPjWkKku-X4vn4Fvk5QhrZvBhbWg90VaP9yeqk6OxSfnWSvFGtnLm20hI7v0Gmh3puLUFDicVK4NjRMp5mDkeJGxUamGCeTr-a_ctCRytjMIg01vGn11yFO47fM1jHHLy33vTGb9JJYvtFUiDA32gbe8A-WLdNnz6JHKdz7l09so6mXPBep1DOZ6NnNQDqPc)
---
Peter,

Over the weekend I was sorting through old(er) emails that I’ve sent out to you over the past year and came across one message that seemed to resonate particularly well with you – so I wanted to take this opportunity, TWO days from Primary Day here in Oregon, to remind you just exactly what is at stake here.

In March I was officially inducted into the “Young Guns” program, run by the National Republican Congressional Committee. In an email in September, I wrote to you that “ _**membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C**_.”

Well, you probably know that once something is given it can just as easily be taken away – and I’m worried that if our fundraising doesn’t pick up soon, I’m going to lose this top tier candidate status. Our fundraising has been extremely sluggish the last several months. **I’m not sure how to get us out of the bind that we’re in, so I’m coming to you once again asking for help**.

I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Over the weekend I was sorting through old(er) emails that I’ve sent out to you over the past year and came across one message that seemed to resonate particularly well with you – so I wanted to take this opportunity, TWO days from Primary Day here in Oregon, to remind you just exactly what is at stake here. In March I was officially inducted into the “Young Guns” program, run by the National Republican Congressional Committee. In an email in September, I wrote to you that “ membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.” Well, you probably know that once something is given it can just as easily be taken away – and I’m worried that if our fundraising doesn’t pick up soon, I’m going to lose this top tier candidate status. Our fundraising has been extremely sluggish the last several months. I’m not sure how to get us out of the bind that we’re in, so I’m coming to you once again asking for help. body:
As one of my top supporters, I wanted to reach out and thank you for your continued support throughout this race.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45352862/345560922/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220515-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmY0NGNmYi04NmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P3HhxuhHcmnprHY1PWHH2tqnt5QJ4852ou7MeeQ4ksE=)
---
| Peter,

As one of my top supporters, I wanted to reach out and thank you for your continued support throughout this race.

Despite everything going on in the crazy political world around us, including our district lines changing once again, I want to make sure I’m staying connected with the people who matter the most.

Because if there’s one thing we’ve learned this year, it’s that the district lines may change again and again, but the issues facing families in Upstate New York remain the same.

**So, Peter, I’ll be directly calling any of my top supporters that pitch in a few dollars through this email to personally thank you and talk about your vision for the future of Upstate New York.**
