name: Kina Collins
subject: Our leaders must step up and act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://click
body:
A devastating display of racism, white supremacy, hate, and gun violence | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk6YuioN491C7X2XXRPUzpk_eDgCt_hiCe9MCDMSVMouzus3VCo4Fdh37_yqbfriYagk0fVc3X7zNOMlplGyiZC2FubfJgkDxV8VMWkSHvlumVjzTLnbSTGBENhqgrXkXm3mJrNnQqyAmUl3-VJou_D-t7SsUT6m2sIF6atfCgQ2aVgKDxBbBepAuXxNpXaiUn_Vi0LceX7iFc_GDafrya6l11ywHGrei-dgYpIbfTrDdFDZ4qLe_U2y5AL9SwrVLM0/3m2/jlkf1nAdSqalzZJeoq_o0A/h0/vJV5uNegE2_yjq0U3VP-NbrZP2DpTRXou5wk4uol-x0) Team, Yesterday, a white supremacist wearing tactical gear opened fire at a grocery store in a predominantly Black neighborhood in Buffalo. Ten people were killed and three more were injured. This mass shooting was a devastating and sickening display of the racism, white supremacy, hate, and gun violence that plague this country. Black people in Buffalo were targeted for no reason other than that they are Black. This was an act of terrorism and it should be treated as such. It is another reminder that white supremacy has and will always be America's greatest threat. White supremacy has infiltrated our military and police departments. It was also on display on January 6th last year as insurrectionists, fueled by white supremacy, attacked our Capitol and threatened the lives of sitting members of Congress. Media outlets like Fox News have emboldened white supremacists by spewing propaganda and racist stereotypes. Less than 24 hours after my campaign announcement last year, Fox News [released an article](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC3Lzh03DbBL_T3yoEqiUvj29IqvMoEy84Qqt4aOWQ4o7HaaPR9ZSNdSY0M0Z7I_nFL-XZrKfe7Ahgxj7bSfCPg5dcafJX5vvf96oJFoxdi1YwyWh2M3Kfo7L63z3hkxy4qolVhy3wWhQLgYd2rbzfAP_W4lxAG3RSFKcvZjiQIuMEulaAq5s5Ndn54J3cA3GgAeypz5FVOjroGB5yczLFhPpujGRRheCyXMU5LMFwrEuXKSxfpBWKSZaT9YvjPVzhxBeP9uVR9zU4Ns72X5J7c7oq-71mHSGWrEiSycILyOCnLf0deuRBNrBpcncFVGrrkbFB3aqUH5E0_Srg5LvLI/3m2/jlkf1nAdSqalzZJeoq_o0A/h1/4cjlyNCIcwJ54Wq2ItV1SNrQiK7tyjWjGArM2k9jxtw) about me. These types of bullying tactics put a target on my back as a candidate, and also on the backs of my family members and my entire community.

The fact that an eighteen-year-old white supremacist could get his hands on a military-grade weapon is not just reprehensible and devastating — it is a fatal failure of our leaders. The fact that the police apprehended him alive after he committed a violent act is a double standard, privilege, and a level of grace that police have not given to unarmed Black civilians who have been gunned down in police interactions for significantly less. Our leaders failed the victims and their families. They failed the people of Buffalo and the people of the East Side community. Every year that goes by with hundreds of mass shootings they fail all of us. I am sick and tired of these statements, I am tired of the tweets and of the news cycles that follow each and every mass shooting. Our leaders must step up and act. We need gun safety legislation now. We must dismantle white supremacy. We must end this gun violence epidemic in this country. We must take this crisis seriously. It is long past time that our leaders finally act. In Solidarity, Kina Collins

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: A devastating display of racism, white supremacy, hate, and gun violence | | | Team, Yesterday, a white supremacist wearing tactical gear opened fire at a grocery store in a predominantly Black neighborhood in Buffalo. Ten people were killed and three more were injured. This mass shooting was a devastating and sickening display of the racism, white supremacy, hate, and gun violence that plague this country. Black people in Buffalo were targeted for no reason other than that they are Black. This was an act of terrorism and it should be treated as such. It is another reminder that white supremacy has and will always be America's greatest threat. White supremacy has infiltrated our military and police departments. It was also on display on January 6th last year as insurrectionists, fueled by white supremacy, attacked our Capitol and threatened the lives of sitting members of Congress. Media outlets like Fox News have emboldened white supremacists by spewing propaganda and racist stereotypes. Less than 24 hours after my campaign announcement last year, Fox News about me. These types of bullying tactics put a target on my back as a candidate, and also on the backs of my family members and my entire community. The fact that an eighteen-year-old white supremacist could get his hands on a military-grade weapon is not just reprehensible and devastating — it is a fatal failure of our leaders. The fact that the police apprehended him alive after he committed a violent act is a double standard, privilege, and a level of grace that police have not given to unarmed Black civilians who have been gunned down in police interactions for significantly less. Our leaders failed the victims and their families. They failed the people of Buffalo and the people of the East Side community. Every year that goes by with hundreds of mass shootings they fail all of us. I am sick and tired of these statements, I am tired of the tweets and of the news cycles that follow each and every mass shooting. Our leaders must step up and act. We need gun safety legislation now. We must dismantle white supremacy. We must end this gun violence epidemic in this country. We must take this crisis seriously. It is long past time that our leaders finally act. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hello,
**$5,800.** That’s the maximum amount that a person can give to a candidate running for Senate. And a lot of candidates, like my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley, wile away their time calling millionaires and flying to fancy dinners around the country to ask wealthy donors to cut them that $5,800 check.
**$25.85.** That’s OUR average contribution this month. And that’s what sets the people-powered campaign we’re building apart from Chuck Grassley’s. Grassley has a $3.7 million campaign war chest thanks to special interests. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. **My campaign is funded entirely by people like you, from across the country, giving what they can, when they can.**
So how does $25.85 compete with $5,800? By doing it together. I know in my bones that 250 people giving $25.85 is a lot stronger than one person giving $5,800. And a grassroots campaign is the only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley, take on the NRA, and rein in Wall Street.
**I’m facing a critical FEC fundraising deadline on Wednesday, and we’ve set a huge goal to raise $400,000 from grassroots donors like you before this federally-mandated deadline, after which our fundraising numbers will become public.**
**We’ve still got $90,617 left to raise, but if you and thousands of others chip in right now, we will crush our goal and send Chuck Grassley packing this November:** [**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before our critical FEC deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45352986/345563392/-42398318?refcode=em20220515pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjkxMDJhNi04OWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHN0h4bkEcRWogJvEDrELURCH4vprJuPEULx9APmMAs=)

clean_body: Hello, $5,800. That’s the maximum amount that a person can give to a candidate running for Senate. And a lot of candidates, like my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley, wile away their time calling millionaires and flying to fancy dinners around the country to ask wealthy donors to cut them that $5,800 check. $25.85. That’s OUR average contribution this month. And that’s what sets the people-powered campaign we’re building apart from Chuck Grassley’s. Grassley has a $3.7 million campaign war chest thanks to special interests. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. My campaign is funded entirely by people like you, from across the country, giving what they can, when they can. So how does $25.85 compete with $5,800? By doing it together. I know in my bones that 250 people giving $25.85 is a lot stronger than one person giving $5,800. And a grassroots campaign is the only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley, take on the NRA, and rein in Wall Street. I’m facing a critical FEC fundraising deadline on Wednesday, and we’ve set a huge goal to raise $400,000 from grassroots donors like you before this federally-mandated deadline, after which our fundraising numbers will become public. We’ve still got $90,617 left to raise, but if you and thousands of others chip in right now, we will crush our goal and send Chuck Grassley packing this November: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s show the power of grassroots-funded campaigns like ours. Thank you for your support, Mike Franken, Vice Admiral, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

body:
I wouldn’t reach out on a Sunday unless absolutely necessary.
| Friend – I apologize for reaching out like this on a Sunday, but we’re currently pacing thousands of dollars behind for tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline.
---
Which is why I wanted to personally contact you as one of my campaign’s most loyal supporters and ask if you’d please consider making a vital contribution at this critical moment in our race to help ensure we crush our goal (_see below_).
---
**[Contribute via secure private link by 11:59 PM: wesleyfortexas.com/donate/5-15deadline/dpwillis67@gmail.com>> ](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=053770fa3ea6427a98bd6af5c7c3f674&_e=KXxQXHk6RrOuk3FOcnO6B-mJ99MIJpE4XuXGHFIDKGrnoSCSRz73kuWsxyROL4eC84fny8UIx-IRi5OG2dCRTRjNYZ0pRp5OIyDPvj3maBWpBkbdjh8U5ebzWbvRIaTWY7SwehM9ytux1_o10cmVNEuR9BfC9XLF8v5JwzW0VkRAT9KNFWASBGKKz_U1nW2Eacy5z-NXKWzYZ9wFl_Kk_Zop_J0qZI-tTAbMZvyH55qXmSBfQzB2loonPGmkrPRjX2U6hObEnYC_sZUfPsJIpnCTkKmaLbAEzvDAkx_LvitalrHOYzZwzqXFD9madENsdL2DpuPku061apiqD75dJW50MrTFJL5LEIn5ktWQ9CA20cscI2PfwtbZyN2pWxKsKiT-rtSw8oTIt5eBC3Fu51AYD3lmnuZtu6XRjEQ3ebVVFuaGxkcdtyizcgZOPWR6BOUSj8AuxAyfrphVdcbw0K04eL_7V-H0OgXy_dhhh6mz9u-5IelBf-u6xmE0j0aY)**
---
**5/15 goal-to-go: $12,890**
---
With Texas’ new 38th district now the last of the 5 congressional seats we need to take back the House from Pelosi’s control, the stakes of this race have never been higher, Friend.
---
But that's also put a bullseye on my back.
---
You and I both know that Pelosi is willing to do whatever it takes to hold onto power...
---
From ad spends of more than $100 million attacking me to endless redistricting lawsuits, she will not give up this fight quietly.
---
_And neither will we!_
---

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: URGENT request for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We missed our fundraising goals in March and April, and May can’t be the same.
#

[**We are writing with an URGENT request: Can you PLEASE make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline comes to an end at midnight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220515-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2842_6688874_FTJa8v&akid=2842%2E6688874%2EFTJa8v)
What a campaign.
**FIRST:**
Multiple dark money groups, a Mitch McConnell-connected group, and a $10 million super PAC all started spending money to defeat us.
**THEN:**
Donald Trump came to town talking about how the most important thing his supporters can do to take back America is to defeat Mark Kelly in this re-election campaign.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220515-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2842_6688874_FTJa8v&akid=2842%2E6688874%2EFTJa8v)
**NOW:**
We missed our fundraising goals in March and April, and May can’t be the same. The timing is not great at all and we really need to reach this mid-month goal before we fall so far behind that we can’t catch up.
**PLEASE:**
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few hours?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220515-1-7&t=3&refcode2=2842_6688874_FTJa8v&akid=2842%2E6688874%2EFTJa8v)
Thank you in advance for chipping in here. This is so important.
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2842%2E6688874%2EFTJa8v).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Jason Lee, Beto for Texas
subject: Just 3 donations from 18326
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
I’m hoping we can close the gap today.
#
Hey, it’s Jason, Beto’s deputy campaign manager.
Yesterday, thousands of our grassroots donors stepped up to boost our campaign and help us counter Trump’s rally in Texas. Honestly, it was incredible to watch.
But I want to be transparent with you: **we ended up falling just $31,290 short of our $250,000 grassroots goal.**
It was an ambitious goal, so I’m hoping we can finish the job and close the gap today. In fact, if just three folks from 18326 each chip in, we’ll blow right past it. _So I’m reaching out to ask:_
[**Will you be one of the three folks from 18326 who we need to make a contribution today? Whether you can afford to donate $3 or a little bit more, every single donation will make a difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220515-1?refcode=ema20220515-189450&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=189450_444211_MP-HDF&akid=189450%2E444211%2EMP-HDF)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220515-1?refcode=ema20220515-189450&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=189450_444211_MP-HDF&akid=189450%2E444211%2EMP-HDF)**
The stakes couldn’t be higher. Abbott isn’t fighting for the best interests of Texans. Much like Trump, he prefers to spend his time on radical political stunts and distractions, instead of tackling real problems that keep people up at night.

Beto has what it takes to win. But that means this is shaping up to be the most expensive — and competitive — gubernatorial election in Texas history. And Abbott’s team has said that they plan to spend $100,000,000 against Beto.
[**We can’t have Greg Abbott as governor for another term. Please, help us elect Beto in November by being one of the three folks from 18326 who we need to make a contribution before midnight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220515-1?refcode=ema20220515-189450&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=189450_444211_MP-HDF&akid=189450%2E444211%2EMP-HDF)
With your support, we can hit this fundraising goal and stay on track to defeat Abbott. Let’s close the gap!
Thanks,
Jason Lee
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220515-189450-footer&t=22&refcode2=189450_444211_MP-HDF&akid=189450%2E444211%2EMP-HDF)**
---

clean_body: I wouldn’t reach out on a Sunday unless absolutely critical. | Friend – I apologize for abruptly reaching out like this on a Sunday, but as it stands, we’re pacing thousands of dollars behind with tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline just hours away. I wanted to personally contact you and ask if you’d please consider making a vital contribution at this critical moment in our governor's race to help ensure we crush our goal (see below). 5/15 goal-to-go: $9,175 With millions pouring into Tony Evers’ coffers left and right from out-of-state Democrats, we can’t afford to fall this far behind before even hitting the halfway point of the month. I’m counting on the help of my most ardent supporters to cut through the attacks, the smears, and the lies Evers will blast on the airwaves with his multimillion-dollar war chest. Because come November, I’ll owe it all to grassroots conservatives like YOU when we win this toss-up governor’s race and take back the battleground state of Wisconsin from the radical Left. Thank you for your continued support! \- Rebecca Sent from my iPhone Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

**Kelly's Parental Bill of Rights is about empowering parents and protecting students.**
As a young mother, Kelly was involved in her local PTA and knows just how critical parental involvement is in their child's education because they are the #1 stakeholder in their success.
There is nothing more important than our children. They deserve the best education and opportunity that Maryland can help to provide.

clean_body: | | | | Friend, Beacause of supporters like you, Kelly is up statewide with her first . This first ad discusses Kelly's Parental Bill of Rights and her commitment to empowering parents and ensuring all children have the opportunity to receive a world-class education. That means providing real school choice, record funding, and accountability -- with education transparency. Kelly's Parental Bill of Rights is about empowering parents and protecting students. As a young mother, Kelly was involved in her local PTA and knows just how critical parental involvement is in their child's education because they are the #1 stakeholder in their success. There is nothing more important than our children. They deserve the best education and opportunity that Maryland can help to provide. Thank you, Allison (Team Schulz) | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Allison P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zefnanc3nummp5tae2vveq57tkvdaebqou2h7q4g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm2o76clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcs36ciqbacb0e5hrep7669oj6c31e1g74t3im4om1dj466pr5d5jedrjcd9l61jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8p6cc9n6mp6fdr3coor1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)

---

Folks,

It seems like there’s a serious crisis happening right now at our Southern Border and I don’t think Joe Biden is taking it seriously, **so if you have two seconds to answer either of the questions below, it will go a long way to help me out.**

1.) Do you think there’s a Southern Border Crisis happening right now?
| [**YES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zduvf1pk99opj0tgrsk4tjvf6ctd64ipb089h4u0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm2o76clh2bs)
---

[**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn3u5j9n1r4f6uuhs3dv2r7spj8quei1m782rhdg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm2o76clh2bs)
---

2.) If yes, is Joe Biden doing anything to solve that crisis?
[**YES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z18c0lvjkj3plvndpvdjgttvugmncnup4r6th7lo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm2o76clh2bs)
---

[**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znpoopm14ud50g2b9b6slgeidm2euautknftb11o_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm2o76clh2bs)
---

I always appreciate your opinion and the time you take to share it.

**I hope you’ll choose to answer at least one of the questions above.**

Thank you,

Senator John Kennedy

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsifku1kvoa23fb20jfj83slc45okqgp4q4bs0h0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm2o76clh2bs)

subject: BREAKING: Gansler Beats Franchot 7 to 1 in MarylandDemocrats’ First Official Contest
body:
Gansler takes second in crowded field, far outpacing next-place finishers at Western Maryland Democratic Summit | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuvW1nAXIWT5cAqNstsp56-gxDwqCUXO-4lxKqjxG9Lm1tewygM72LUjE8YUawxUzzgDkF2cYGfoXtY0lcXa4AGyN2UIl589H_GWDOsD8wo92T873dmysYpJH9XInDnMHQKvYIsyiASdqBW-92AYXWzvSQxHRKWAo_CGrvcjT2tVvz1sL7rXlSqWTYXMqFzACUY29qLXTsu7h2S0ympY_F9LO9NrT6i4QoUYKLZcccCj6DOM7ak3FUGufIs2LFZq5LnvenMwb71x76_kYv1Gf8hnO5j7xieDk6Oefm87cqqWPY3N1_39gkqnGdbsLInehaqPjVCHtGKsx3yYJOzPws4BHOmWThtnXl2PKtNNy0x8i/3m2/Rl9hphRhTM-A56Wx6fkhfg/h0/pnP5YQvWbkrrzQlM5mrnTLkGYZuBLMFKZ-fYmWpJPuA)

Gansler Beats Franchot 7 to 1 in Maryland Democrats' First Official Contest
_Gansler takes second in crowded field, far outpacing next-place finishers at Western Maryland Democratic Summit_
---
**ROCKY GAP, Md.** - In a crowded field of nine candidates, former Attorney General Doug Gansler and former Hyattsville Mayor Candace Hollingsworth today took second place in the Western Maryland Democratic Summit's straw poll held at the Rocky Gap Casino Resort. "I'm grateful to all the Western Maryland Democrats who cast their vote for Candace and me in today's straw poll, and as governor I will make sure the rural parts of Maryland help lead the way as we build a better, safer and **[greener future for our state](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDP4gl7UWAEqfzdVSINFu_oSw1tJp3LQg1_Q1ZoS9abLZtjF9yaf488ZTkL0LhwvgSiX_HIrFMvr4hlYGtpbriioT67LCUv9eByqUkFeq9VgRJxv3bZ7Gw3CSTYHoOPrK5dsExNnr0oybhlC19F8wwe_Ppzn5dM1l3EK_j9d5AX5aFMv1lD75DvD_u5bo6SwusH9nJIe9T2AIHSj3uuy6DKVeXGzbJiNjht32rPVe69Q2I-Us2xzmiRUdRdmS2wfDZVpynV3zTRrHtTZSftVfTjYlikIaZj4B2_-hvdCfDsfe3mfUW00r7glFjMg-qsZdy_qcGYXNu467U3SyymvVMegEC12_23Q15RbFEo-JB60OmRWtgFF3D20P7rpzSywTwdXb4XzR_bVfjR39swdMmh7nsN689ns8kYUQnJAdgzQNfeZ1I6ij3WgYS5Dl4i2M1lFbdiSrabex8UtXuQ2lbwg/3m2/Rl9hphRhTM-A56Wx6fkhfg/h1/RtDeXBphPw6XY3492gnnAADc_GNLH6ehT4zfhejm8EM)** ," said **Gansler**. "This is a two-person race, and crime is the number one issue voters care about. As a former prosecutor and attorney general, I am the candidate best-equipped -- in fact, I am the only candidate at all equipped -- to address the massive rise in crime across our state and make Maryland safe." "Doug and I clearly prevailed as the local choice among attendees from the region's five counties today, and we are honored that so many Western Maryland Democrats trust us to serve as the next governor and lieutenant governor of Maryland," said **Hollingsworth**. "Peter Franchot's entire rationale for his candidacy just completely fell apart; he is not the candidate who runs strongest statewide. Doug beat Franchot 7 to 1 in a region of the state where Franchot himself claims to be strong," said **Gansler 's campaign manager Shaun Daniels**. "This is the first public poll where Democrats put pen to paper to publicly declare their choices. Doug Gansler placed second, far outpacing the next place finishers. It is obvious the field is narrowing. We have more than a million dollars on hand and every Democrat in Maryland is going to know that Doug and Candace are the best candidates, not just to take on Kelly Schulz in November, but to keep us safe." The **[Cumberland Times-News Editorial Board has noted](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDP4gl7UWAEqfzdVSINFu_oQ-dRg64seUswStZ3udp4d619aV1PiT7cB52kXRen2FgqttPR2sCi64yj2zdvxUyri2ZmKNjNxW_KtWDWMNgD5nZy-xZyUalC_Ncc3iXn2WYOktCrUFufJKvRBNf5UG7GrxhL0itZAO27wGSk90GENUOskD-LNs_gSfycBGTW1wVfTBRW9aouS9wd7N1NH24aIT2SowP-Q5Wf8jNdb-i3uNFjS_YlnCgO4_JrnT1mvVlXHhF0hrkckynMShWcJ8ODhoa87O_ql7dKgiDvXJRHPSotjIk1sHWWcXosuQN_nWcVCw3ityIoKONe70Hzz-aCnwDQsjeIJfhcMc1hDfGmfSRMnOGO5a9e3zMXt8tgMNKV1g3uIavYcTkqzUk57k8FbVRq34cZrq7I2q5i21zbAS2ZJFG2jxPT4APoX_Chcy8cFY6OcYpTyaY5aqXcAfSdqXXkqEpShRYVrSqx295LtnWs_5FO-MCq396Excc4vxqg/3m2/Rl9hphRhTM-A56Wx6fkhfg/h2/SqmEiuv0dfVQ-GCDanuNkomN47piok3uORi-JS7g1kM)** that "candidates like former Maryland Attorney General Doug Gansler, a Democrat, and Kelly M. Schulz, a Republican, former state delegate and labor secretary under Gov. Larry Hogan, have come through the region during the course of the campaign" while "most [candidates] have been ghosts, relegated to the eastern half of the state, more a series of pictures and words than person." Gansler has been endorsed by Western Maryland's only Democratic Senator, Sen. Ron Young. ### _Former Attorney General Doug Gansler is running to be the next Governor of Maryland. Gansler has 22 years of experience fighting crime - first as a federal prosecutor, then as Montgomery County State's Attorney, and finally as Attorney General. In addition to prosecuting some of the state's most high-profile cases, including the Beltway Sniper, Gansler has a record of launching innovative and successful programs to protect the public while instituting progressive reforms to the criminal justice system._ _Former Hyattsville Mayor Candace Hollingsworth was the city 's youngest and first Black mayor. After a combined nine years of service on City Council and as mayor, Candace founded the national organization Our Black Party to wake folks up and fortify a change-making relationship between the Black community and the political system. As mayor, Candace focused on making Hyattsville a safe and just community through expanding education, economic opportunities and civic engagement for young people while supporting the long-term sustainability of her city._
---
By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair.

---
Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States

name: America First Alerts
subject: We can’t let this RINO Win!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Honor Pennsylvania, Inc
body:
Biden and his Democrat cronies have spent almost 2 years kicking the tar out of America.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvk7tav3s63vtail2ai4cqu2vb2nl4qkgjmiihp0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr32c37mph34o3jc9g7aslje5pbaor2mpoj1dbhe5iefcb76ppn1c9km1qjad37mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i69j32dplmdjr4sb66hgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clh66ob3cdi60oh5u)

|
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvv36j3i31qborka0l85p6538n5l7s4h3aovud1g_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm6or4c1h2bs)
---

Biden and his Democrat cronies have spent almost 2 years kicking the tar out of America. Now, we're facing an even bigger threat: Republicans who claim to be conservative, but really have the same beliefs as Obama, Clinton, Pelosi and all the rest...

**RINO Mehmet Oz spent years espousing liberal beliefs** , but now that he's trying to become a Senator, he claims that he's a conservative. Not so fast! Let's look at his track record:

_**Abortion?**_ Oz is "really concerned" about pro-life legislation and efforts to protect the unborn!

_**" Red Flag" Anti-Gun Laws?**_ Go right ahead he says!

_**Gender transitions for kids?**_ Just what the doctor ordered!

_**Hillary Clinton?**_ One of the "smartest people" he's ever met!

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg3olvejliuuiap02fk4i5uj3gcsmaf8t7pea4b0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm6or4c1h2bs)
---

The record is clear: Dr. Oz is the textbook definition of a RINO: Republican In Name Only. We cannot afford to allow liberal RINOs to keep holding America back. _**We need real AMERICA FIRST conservatives to stand up and FIGHT HARD for what Americans need.**_

_**Thankfully, there is a real America First candidate in this race: Dave McCormick, a proven conservative, a native Pennsylvanian, and a battle-tested veteran, and[he needs our urgent help to defeat this RINO!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9d29t082spfnkfdl9pd3ftbet2kcrlpcok3ebq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm6or4c1h2bs "he needs our urgent help to defeat this RINO!")**_

In the military, Dave served as an Army paratrooper and received the Bronze Star for his service to our country. He's got a clear conservative record, and he's fighting to be Pennsylvania's next Senator.

Pennsylvania and America need proven conservative leaders, NOT fake Republicans who sing the praises of Hillary Clinton. If you agree and want to help save America from fake Republicans, _**[we need you to send an EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION to push Dave to victory in this key swing state.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbjcntl0kclhtta4v26acuhi9sukcljjh0pgo808_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm6or4c1h2bs "we need you to send an EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION to push Dave to victory in this key swing state.")**_

Let's be perfectly clear: if Oz wins, Republicans are DOOMED! Democrats will flip this seat BLUE in November, and our efforts to take control of the Senate will fail. We cannot allow Mehmet Oz to win, and we need your urgent support to push the real conservative - Dave McCormick - to victory!

We're running out of time to make a difference with the election just a few days away, but any dollar you send can tip the scales back to the America First movement! _**[So please, rush a donation while we still have time!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf6if5h8qj3fn7mo8ptsv73be96agdlkprsoeb10_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm6or4c1h2bs "So please, rush a donation while we still have time!")**_

clean_body: Biden and his Democrat cronies have spent almost 2 years kicking the tar out of America. | | | | | Biden and his Democrat cronies have spent almost 2 years kicking the tar out of America. Now, we're facing an even bigger threat: Republicans who claim to be conservative, but really have the same beliefs as Obama, Clinton, Pelosi and all the rest... RINO Mehmet Oz spent years espousing liberal beliefs , but now that he's trying to become a Senator, he claims that he's a conservative. Not so fast! Let's look at his track record: Abortion? Oz is "really concerned" about pro-life legislation and efforts to protect the unborn! " Red Flag" Anti-Gun Laws? Go right ahead he says! Gender transitions for kids? Just what the doctor ordered! Hillary Clinton? One of the "smartest people" he's ever met! | The record is clear: Dr. Oz is the textbook definition of a RINO: Republican In Name Only. We cannot afford to allow liberal RINOs to keep holding America back. We need real AMERICA FIRST conservatives to stand up and FIGHT HARD for what Americans need. Thankfully, there is a real America First candidate in this race: Dave McCormick, a proven conservative, a native Pennsylvanian, and a battle-tested veteran, and "he needs our urgent help to defeat this RINO!" In the military, Dave served as an Army paratrooper and received the Bronze Star for his service to our country. He's got a clear conservative record, and he's fighting to be Pennsylvania's next Senator. Pennsylvania and America need proven conservative leaders, NOT fake Republicans who sing the praises of Hillary Clinton. If you agree and want to help save America from fake Republicans, "we need you to send an EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION to push Dave to victory in this key swing state." Let's be perfectly clear: if Oz wins, Republicans are DOOMED! Democrats will flip this seat BLUE in November, and our efforts to take control of the Senate will fail. We cannot allow Mehmet Oz to win, and we need your urgent support to push the real conservative - Dave McCormick - to victory! We're running out of time to make a difference with the election just a few days away, but any dollar you send can tip the scales back to the America First movement! "So please, rush a donation while we still have time!" | | Paid for by Honor Pennsylvania, Inc., 1305 W 11th Street, #213, Houston, TX 77008, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Gavin Newsom for Governor
subject: You probably didn’t wake up thinking you’d contribute $3 to Gavin Newsom today. But we hope you will. Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
we hope you’ll give us a chance to convince you why it’s important today IS that day.

Friends -
You probably didn’t wake up thinking “today is the day I am going to make my first $3 donation to Gavin Newsom’s re-election,” but we hope you’ll give us a chance to convince you why it’s important today IS that day.
Here’s the truth:
The Republican-endorsed candidate in the governor’s race is an anti-choice extremist who would be a Trump acolyte if elected.
Every vote we turn out will likely be a vote for Democrats running for the House of Representatives. And with control of Congress on the line, that matters.
We’ll also be driving votes for the constitutional amendment enshrining the right to choose in California.
Campaigns are expensive. Especially campaigns in California. That means we need people who want to keep California blue to chip in from time-to-time.
And we hope today is that day for you.
[**Can Gavin Newsom count on you to make a $3 contribution before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close at midnight tonight? It would mean a lot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcn-em-may22?refcode=em-220515-1-30&refcode2=827_4767699_UbXImr&akid=827%2E4767699%2EUbXImr)
[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcn-em-may22?refcode=em-220515-1-30&refcode2=827_4767699_UbXImr&akid=827%2E4767699%2EUbXImr)
Thank you for your continued support, and especially for your donation today. It’s important.
Team Newsom

PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Fear.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
That fear must be nothing like the fear people at that supermarket in Buffalo felt yesterday
#

Friends -
As we grieve for the victims of yesterday’s tragic mass shooting in Buffalo, I want to take a moment to tell you that I believe in my heart that we are one day closer to federal legislation that will save lives from this kind of senseless gun violence.
If you ask politicians in swing districts about why they’ve voted against similar bills in the past, despite knowing the importance of the legislation, some will privately tell you it’s because of fear of the gun lobby.
But that fear must be nothing like the fear people at that supermarket in Buffalo felt yesterday—or the fear their families felt as they raced to the scene for more information about their loved ones.
That fear must be nothing like the fear parents feel when they receive news about a shooting at their child’s school.
That fear must be nothing like the fear a woman feels when her domestic abuser shows up at her home knocking on the door armed and angry.
Every day politicians choose fear of the gun lobby over the courage to act, they choose to accept the epidemic levels of gun violence plaguing our country.
But the truth is, that cycle can come to an end. I believe it IS coming to an end, because legislators are realizing they have more to fear from us, than they do the gun lobby.
We WILL pass legislation making our communities safer from gun violence. I believe that to my core.
I'm going to keep fighting until that happens. But my team and I cannot do it alone—I need your help to get it done.
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC before our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight? We’ll take that contribution and put it right to work passing legislation that will make our communities safer from gun violence.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220515-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2009_3935704_TEH26q&akid=2009%2E3935704%2ETEH26q)**
We can no longer tolerate politicians who fail to acknowledge our national gun violence crisis. We can no longer let the heartbreaking status quo triumph over action and courage.
Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Gabby

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2009%2E3935704%2ETEH26q) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: That fear must be nothing like the fear people at that supermarket in Buffalo felt yesterday Friends - As we grieve for the victims of yesterday’s tragic mass shooting in Buffalo, I want to take a moment to tell you that I believe in my heart that we are one day closer to federal legislation that will save lives from this kind of senseless gun violence. If you ask politicians in swing districts about why they’ve voted against similar bills in the past, despite knowing the importance of the legislation, some will privately tell you it’s because of fear of the gun lobby. But that fear must be nothing like the fear people at that supermarket in Buffalo felt yesterday—or the fear their families felt as they raced to the scene for more information about their loved ones. That fear must be nothing like the fear parents feel when they receive news about a shooting at their child’s school. That fear must be nothing like the fear a woman feels when her domestic abuser shows up at her home knocking on the door armed and angry. Every day politicians choose fear of the gun lobby over the courage to act, they choose to accept the epidemic levels of gun violence plaguing our country. But the truth is, that cycle can come to an end. I believe it IS coming to an end, because legislators are realizing they have more to fear from us, than they do the gun lobby. We WILL pass legislation making our communities safer from gun violence. I believe that to my core. I'm going to keep fighting until that happens. But my team and I cannot do it alone—I need your help to get it done. ** We can no longer tolerate politicians who fail to acknowledge our national gun violence crisis. We can no longer let the heartbreaking status quo triumph over action and courage. Thank you for standing with me in this fight. Gabby Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

subject: Only one week to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
I need your help in this final push to secure the nomination - we're poised to defeat Jennifer Wexton this November, but I can't do it without you ... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=fc83fb200d&u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=89452b4d75)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=89c51f2fcd&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

With just one week left until our May 21st primary, I'm reaching out to ask for your help in the final stages of this nomination contest.

Having served on the Board of Supervisors in Prince William County for nearly eight years, I've demonstrated my commitment to our conservative values.

I've opposed countless Democrat tax increases on hard-working families in my district. I've fought for the Second Amendment and opposed Governor Northam's unconstitutional gun control laws. I've backed our law enforcement by providing funding for more law enforcement officers, pay increases, and supporting Prince William's program to work with ICE to deport illegal immigrants convicted of violent crimes. I've taken a stand to protect unborn babies my entire life, including as a founding board member for a crisis pregnancy center.

The radical left has come after me for it, but I've won re-election twice in my Northern Virginia district.

Now I'm running for Congress because Virginia's 10th district deserves a representative who stands up for our values. Not a representative like Jennifer Wexton who votes for Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's progressive agenda every single time.

In just one week, voters will select their Republican nominee. While any candidate in this race would be better than Jennifer Wexton, I believe that I am the only candidate who can beat her this November. I've beat the Democrats before here in Northern Virginia, and I'll do it again this year.

[With just one week to go, please consider making](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=50faa72cfd&e=fc83fb200d)[ a contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=3d61b4aa9d&e=fc83fb200d)[to help us secure the nomination and turn our attention to defeating Jennifer Wexton.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=e63f8f8497&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=ce684e4d72&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=10440c0b1b&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=3c2a673608&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=526fc15150&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=e5a70e178f&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
Please make a contribution today to help us get across the finish line and turn our attention to defeating Jennifer Wexton and taking back Virginia's 10th district..

Thank you for your support. I'm looking forward to working side-by-side to take back our district this November!

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District
---
|
---
|
---
| [JeanineLawson.com](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=55b07e1531&e=fc83fb200d "JeanineLawson.com")
---
| | **_FIND YOUR MAY 21ST VOTING LOCATION_**
On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at [www.JeanineLawson.com/Voting](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=89fe82efaf&e=fc83fb200d)

For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com) and we can help you determine where to vote.

**Prince William County: **your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district.

If you live in **Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson** , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville.

If you live in **Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland**, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville.

If you live in **Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District**, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas.

**Loudoun County: **Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district _unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington._

If you live in **Blue Ridge district** , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the [State Board of Elections website](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d94e1d4cb3&e=fc83fb200d).
Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School.
Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School.

If you live in **Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge** districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville.

If you live in **Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run** districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn.

If you live in **Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge **districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie.

**Fauquier County:** Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton.

**Rappahannock County** : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington.

**Fairfax County** : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton.

**Manassas City** : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas.

**Manassas Park City** : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park.

If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com)and we can help you determine where to vote.

| I am proud to endorse fellow veteran and staunch supporter of Law enforcement Delegate John McGuire for State Senate District 10. Please join me in my support of Delegate John McGuire as our next State Senator. -Karl Leonard Chesterfield County Sheriff

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Reflecting on the days ahead.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
When I woke up this morning, I was filled with gratitude. Fighting for a better country alongside all of you has been an honor, and I know we are all ready to take that fight to Congress.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45353883/345568253/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.15_b1_cd_all-nd&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTMwMTJjMy05MGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaITkHAwn5gjLXQB-HaJSpUkmyK8szDZQXKHU0l6Q2U=) Hi Derek,

I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from us over the past few weeks, but it’s all because of how important Tuesday’s primary election is. That’s why I have to ask: **[The primary election is only 2 days away, and we still need to raise $550 to power our campaign through Tuesday night. Can you chip in just $2 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45353884/345568254/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.15_b1_cd_all-nd&amount=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTMwMTJjMy05MGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaITkHAwn5gjLXQB-HaJSpUkmyK8szDZQXKHU0l6Q2U=)**

When I woke up this morning, I was filled with gratitude. Fighting for a better country alongside all of you has been an honor, **and I know we are ready to take that fight to Congress.**

Our campaign for the common good resonates with western Pennsylvania families because we’re fighting for the things that matter most – **making healthcare a reality for everybody, stronger protection for workers and unions, taking on unchecked corporate power, making billionaires and big corporations pay their fair share, protecting our right to vote, ensuring that women across the country have access to legal abortion, and more.**

Derek, our next hurdle is the primary election this Tuesday. **This is our moment to shine, and I know that together, we will win this primary and defeat the radical right in November.**

**[This is a grassroots-funded campaign, so will you chip in a few dollars to help us get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45353885/345568255/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.15_b1_cd_all-nd&amount=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTMwMTJjMy05MGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaITkHAwn5gjLXQB-HaJSpUkmyK8szDZQXKHU0l6Q2U=)**

Thank you so much for your support,

Chris Deluzio __ | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. [Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45353886/345568256/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.15_b1_cd_all-nd&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTMwMTJjMy05MGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaITkHAwn5gjLXQB-HaJSpUkmyK8szDZQXKHU0l6Q2U=)

name: Team ODP
subject: A 50/50 Senate is not enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
McConnell says a nation wide abortion ban "is possible"
| Team,

This week, Senate Republicans blocked the Women's Health Protection Act from becoming law, legislation that would have codified _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law.

**It's clear that a 50/50 Senate is not enough, and expanding our majority is the only way forward. That's why it's crucial we elect Tim Ryan in November.**

Tim Ryan will ensure that Ohioans have the right to safe and legal abortion. His opponent, J.D. Vance, has relentlessly attacked reproductive rights – and even called rape "inconvenient" when asked if he would support prohibiting abortion in cases of rape and incest.

**[Electing pro-choice Democratic leaders will decide the fate of reproductive freedom in our state and our country. Wade into federal law. It's clear that a 50/50 Senate is not enough, and expanding our majority is the only way forward. That's why it's crucial we elect Tim Ryan in November. Tim Ryan will ensure that Ohioans have the right to safe and legal abortion. His opponent, J.D. Vance, has relentlessly attacked reproductive rights – and even called rape "inconvenient" when asked if he would support prohibiting abortion in cases of rape and incest. clean_body: There are some huge differences between Odessa and our opponent. | | | Hey Peter, There are some huge differences between Odessa and our opponent, the far-right Representative Mark Green. You know Odessa’s for putting power back in the hands of working people, protecting the right to an abortion, and Medicare for All. Our opponent Mark Green is for banning abortion, persecuting immigrants, and cutting taxes for his fellow multi-millionaires. But there’s another difference, and that’s in how Odessa is running this campaign. Mark Green is running for re-election with money from sources like: Corporate PACs Defense Contractors Pro-insurrection Representative Jim Jordan His own $20 million+ bank account Odessa Kelly is powering this campaign with donations like: $5 from Greg in Nashville $25 from Dorothy in Memphis $7 from William in Jonesborough $50 from Elise in Nashville When we say this movement is people-powered, we mean it. Our average donation is just over $37. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Together, we’re going to be able to stand up to Mark Green’s millions with a MOVEMENT. Thanks, y'all! Team Odessa | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

| | | The most recent polling suggests that Carla is now in 3rd place.... At first, I thought that meant the race was over. But then I looked further into the data, and I realized that a HUGE number of voters still don’t trust EITHER of the two frontrunners. name: John Papola
subject: America’s next superhero REVEALED!
body:
Kids today are told the world is a scary place, despite today being the safest time for kids growing up.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z343ojf36se6g3aci3l5qi6500h29veoq75m4kmg_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm1ob4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcttic1q31ojm6lp66d9nm9im6pbickqn0opkslo7aopnm6omecbgshq3appi61jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor1cr3cup30pjlcipmcdtgmlin49fg)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq4hqsbf7l6vjk08ni9jlrjefir0hgsdo2thptd0_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm1ob4cph2bs)

Friend,

Kids today are told the world is a scary place, despite today being the safest time for kids growing up. They are told danger is always just around the corner, every stranger is a potential threat, and it's not safe to be alone.

Fear has paralyzed our kids and made them afraid to explore and take risks.

I believe this fear is driven by what I like to call the Fear Industrial Complex. It is turning kids into victims and pushing them away from their dreams.

It's why I believe the American Dream is in danger.

People who took risks in pursuit of the American dream built our country. The drive to venture into the unknown and try new things is why America became great.

Today our country is facing significant challenges. We are dealing with financial instability, the pandemic, a broken school system, and a mental health crisis.

_**Can our country overcome these challenges? What kind of country will our children inherit? Who can we count on to save our country?**_

Luckily, we found America's pro-liberty superhero: **Dads!**

**Dad Saves America** believes fathers will save our country from victimhood culture. Our new media channel is dedicated to inspiring active and engaged fatherhood.

**I 've made this special video to discuss why dads are the heroes who can save this country and what inspired me to create Dad Saves America. Click below to watch the video: **

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjn2n9b6jsjq4to13qrdrfvumk027ohtem4d1rmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm1ob4cph2bs)

[_**Can you donate $10, $35, $100, or more to help us spread our message and create more powerful pro-dad, pro-liberty stories? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt0kcpd39nhe6anjriqqq1plfea63o1k9392nrqo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm1ob4cph2bs)

The media, politicians, corporations, teachers, and even over-protective parents are bombarding kids with a message of fear. They created a Fear Industrial Complex that robs kids of their independence to keep them "safe."

But this Fear Industrial Complex is the enemy of freedom, making it the enemy of the American spirit.

You don't often find inspiring father figures in the media anymore. You rarely see examples of positive fathers who are competent, loving and serve their families and community.

But**dads are the frontline superheroes who protect the American liberties** that allow our country, and all of us who make it up, to be the benefactors of a unique, free, and prosperous path to the future.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfo2l50pnpeg46p13jnqo09uuhlhet8g1i6crpuo_rp22sh2s8i66pb2cdgm1ob4cph2bs)

Dads teach kids to overcome their fears and take risks. We prepare our kids to have grit and resilience so they can survive the inevitable setbacks of life and thrive.

_This is essential to save the American spirit of freedom and independence_.

We need to celebrate dads! Your support helps Dad Saves America do so in the best way we can: by creating a steady stream of dad-centric liberty-minded content that can help our audience and our country.

**Our goal this month is to raise $50,000 online. Will you donate today and help us reach our goal? Please select an amount below to rush your support today. **

clean_body: Kids today are told the world is a scary place, despite today being the safest time for kids growing up. Friend, Kids today are told the world is a scary place, despite today being the safest time for kids growing up. They are told danger is always just around the corner, every stranger is a potential threat, and it's not safe to be alone. Fear has paralyzed our kids and made them afraid to explore and take risks. I believe this fear is driven by what I like to call the Fear Industrial Complex. It is turning kids into victims and pushing them away from their dreams. It's why I believe the American Dream is in danger. People who took risks in pursuit of the American dream built our country. The drive to venture into the unknown and try new things is why America became great. Today our country is facing significant challenges. We are dealing with financial instability, the pandemic, a broken school system, and a mental health crisis. Can our country overcome these challenges? What kind of country will our children inherit? Who can we count on to save our country? Luckily, we found America's pro-liberty superhero: Dads! Dad Saves America believes fathers will save our country from victimhood culture. Our new media channel is dedicated to inspiring active and engaged fatherhood. I 've made this special video to discuss why dads are the heroes who can save this country and what inspired me to create Dad Saves America. Click below to watch the video: The media, politicians, corporations, teachers, and even over-protective parents are bombarding kids with a message of fear. They created a Fear Industrial Complex that robs kids of their independence to keep them "safe." But this Fear Industrial Complex is the enemy of freedom, making it the enemy of the American spirit. You don't often find inspiring father figures in the media anymore. You rarely see examples of positive fathers who are competent, loving and serve their families and community. Butdads are the frontline superheroes who protect the American liberties that allow our country, and all of us who make it up, to be the benefactors of a unique, free, and prosperous path to the future. Dads teach kids to overcome their fears and take risks. We prepare our kids to have grit and resilience so they can survive the inevitable setbacks of life and thrive. This is essential to save the American spirit of freedom and independence. We need to celebrate dads! Your support helps Dad Saves America do so in the best way we can: by creating a steady stream of dad-centric liberty-minded content that can help our audience and our country. Our goal this month is to raise $50,000 online. Will you donate today and help us reach our goal? Please select an amount below to rush your support today. The Dad Saves America team has over 80 years of collective experience in Hollywood. Our team has worked at multiple major network brands, including Nickelodeon, MTV, MTV2, Comedy Central, Spike, VH1, and Paramount. Dad Saves America creates new stories online and on YouTube. These stories focus on telling heroic stories aimed at Dads. We want to make them aware of resources and get them actively engaged in their kids' lives. Ever since Pennsylvania completed our redistricting process, experts have been crunching the numbers on what the new maps mean for our race. **I won’t sugarcoat it: we are in real trouble.**

Everyone from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call to Sabato’s Crystal Ball is calling this race a toss-up, and we were recently ranked in the top 10 most competitive seats in the country. **Republicans think they have a real shot at defeating me and flipping this seat red, and they’re spending big in an effort to do it.**

I’m not afraid of a tough fight — after all, I won one of the closest House races in the country in 2020. But to do it again, we need serious resources, and that starts with grassroots supporters like you.

[_**Can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare right away to ensure I defend my seat again and stay in Congress advocating for American families and workers?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45354583/345571759/278639227?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220515-2-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDkzMDVjNC05NmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PM1oV8QbpPfVpHvBi7-fBVdvUV2_lpSY9OGQNhp0Gbk=)

clean_body: Republicans think they have a real shot at defeating me | = | Peter, I’ll explain more in a moment, but first, = | = Ever since Pennsylvania completed our redistricting process, experts have been crunching the numbers on what the new maps mean for our race. I won’t sugarcoat it: we are in real trouble. Everyone from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call to Sabato’s Crystal Ball is calling this race a toss-up, and we were recently ranked in the top 10 most competitive seats in the country. Republicans think they have a real shot at defeating me and flipping this seat red, and they’re spending big in an effort to do it. I’m not afraid of a tough fight — after all, I won one of the closest House races in the country in 2020. But to do it again, we need serious resources, and that starts with grassroots supporters like you. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With appreciation for folks like you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. subject: Sen. Scott Martin endorses Lou Barletta for governor
body:
| | | |
---
---
**Sen. Scott Martin endorses Lou Barletta for governor**
---
---
_State Sen. Scott Martin endorses Lou Barletta for governor of Pennsylvania_
---
State Sen. Scott Martin (13th District), former candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today endorsed Lou Barletta in the Republican gubernatorial primary as the best candidate to beat Democrat Josh Shapiro in the November election. Barletta, a former mayor and congressman, has been at or near the top of every public poll released during the campaign. The Republican primary is Tuesday, May 17.

Martin joins state Sen. Jake Corman (President Pro Tempore, 34th District) and former Congresswoman Melissa Hart as Republican candidates who have dropped out of the race and are now supporting Barletta.

At a press conference in Lancaster on Sunday, Sen. Martin said that Barletta is the best hope Republicans have to unite the party and produce a candidate who can bring victory in the fall.

“We all entered the race for governor because we believed we could make a difference in the direction Pennsylvania was headed,” Martin said. “As a former candidate myself, I’m endorsing Lou Barletta because I believe he is the best prepared to unite Republicans, lead us to victory over Josh Shapiro in November, and put our state back on a path to prosperity. As we approach Primary Day on Tuesday, I have carefully examined all the candidates and I am proud to endorse Lou Barletta. I encourage all Republicans to do the same so we can take back Pennsylvania this Fall.”

Barletta thanked Martin for his support and said Tuesday’s primary is a chance for Republicans to take the fight to Shapiro.

“I am grateful for Sen. Martin’s support because he had the courage of his convictions to enter the arena,” Barletta said. “We all agreed on so many issues during the campaign, and the common goal now ought to be nominating the candidate who can beat Josh Shapiro in the fall. I have a history of beating Democrats in tough elections and the people of Pennsylvania know me. We must move forward as a party, united behind a candidate who can actually win.”

clean_body: | | | | Sen. Scott Martin endorses Lou Barletta for governor State Sen. Scott Martin endorses Lou Barletta for governor of Pennsylvania State Sen. Scott Martin (13th District), former candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today endorsed Lou Barletta in the Republican gubernatorial primary as the best candidate to beat Democrat Josh Shapiro in the November election. Barletta, a former mayor and congressman, has been at or near the top of every public poll released during the campaign. The Republican primary is Tuesday, May 17. Martin joins state Sen. Jake Corman (President Pro Tempore, 34th District) and former Congresswoman Melissa Hart as Republican candidates who have dropped out of the race and are now supporting Barletta. At a press conference in Lancaster on Sunday, Sen. Martin said that Barletta is the best hope Republicans have to unite the party and produce a candidate who can bring victory in the fall. “We all entered the race for governor because we believed we could make a difference in the direction Pennsylvania was headed,” Martin said. “As a former candidate myself, I’m endorsing Lou Barletta because I believe he is the best prepared to unite Republicans, lead us to victory over Josh Shapiro in November, and put our state back on a path to prosperity. As we approach Primary Day on Tuesday, I have carefully examined all the candidates and I am proud to endorse Lou Barletta. I encourage all Republicans to do the same so we can take back Pennsylvania this Fall.” Barletta thanked Martin for his support and said Tuesday’s primary is a chance for Republicans to take the fight to Shapiro. “I am grateful for Sen. Martin’s support because he had the courage of his convictions to enter the arena,” Barletta said. “We all agreed on so many issues during the campaign, and the common goal now ought to be nominating the candidate who can beat Josh Shapiro in the fall. I have a history of beating Democrats in tough elections and the people of Pennsylvania know me. We must move forward as a party, united behind a candidate who can actually win.” | | | | =

body:
A donation from you today will prove our movement’s values have strong support from across the country.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220515-3028-header&t=1&akid=3028%2E2526796%2EVkbtzU)
**340.**
That’s how many contributions we need to reach before midnight tonight in order to hit our mid-month target.
How did we get that number? Based on our average gift this month ($16.68) and how much we’ve raised so far, we need 340 more contributions by midnight tonight in order to stay on track toward hitting our overall targets for May.
**340 is an important number to us because each donation – no matter the amount – shows that our values from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal have strong support in your state and across the country.**
[Can you be one of the 340 people we need to chip in within the next 12 hours to meet our goal and allow us to carry out all the programs Alexandria has planned?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220515?refcode=em20220515-3028-P_FND_MMF_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=3028_2526796_VkbtzU&akid=3028%2E2526796%2EVkbtzU)

Each donation we receive directly translates into growing our movement.
Thank you for making all of this possible.
Team AOC

But progressive leaders like Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and AOC are stepping up to help me fight back. With only 2 days to go, I need your help too. This race is a test for Democratic Party. A test of our values, and a test of who we are actually fighting for.

This is a safe Democratic district. It is the most blue seat in North Carolina.

**And this outpouring of funding from right wing super PACS and crypto billionaires shouldn’t be what our Democratic Party is about as a whole.** [**_Our grassroots movement is going to be more powerful than their big bucks. This avalanche of super PAC funds is going to be hard to beat.

But I have an amazing team of people who are helping me fight back:
* Ground-breaking leaders **Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Rashida Tlaib, and Ilhan Omar.**
* The _24,000 grassroots donors_ that have stepped up to power my campaign– _$27 at a time._

**We could lose this seat and our majority unless folks like you rush your immediate grassroots support:[Rush $5 or more now – split between Rev. name: =?utf-8?q?PA_GOV_ALERTS_=F0=9F=9A=A8?=
subject: Barletta releases impressive list of endorsements as GOP primary approaches
body:
| | | |
---
---
**Barletta releases impressive list of endorsements as GOP primary approaches**
---
Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today released a lengthy list of endorsements as the GOP gubernatorial primary approaches on Tuesday, May 17, 2022. Barletta has been at or near the top of every public poll since he entered the race, exactly one year before Primary Day.

Barletta has been endorsed by three former Republican candidates for governor – Jake Corman, Melissa Hart, and Scott Martin – and has the support of more members of the Pennsylvania Congressional delegation than any other candidate. Barletta has been endorsed by a wide variety of state and local officials and Republican Party committees.

“We have a tremendous opportunity to change course and accomplish great things for Pennsylvania, but it will take nominating a Republican candidate who can beat Democrat Josh Shapiro in November. I am honored and grateful for all of the support we have gathered,” Barletta said. “As Republicans, we must unite behind one candidate who can actually win the general election, and my record and my campaign show that I am best positioned to bring victory in the fall."
_**Barletta Endorsements**_

Former U.S. Senator Rick Santorum
Congressman Dan Meuser (PA-09)

clean_body: | | | | Barletta releases impressive list of endorsements as GOP primary approaches Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today released a lengthy list of endorsements as the GOP gubernatorial primary approaches on Tuesday, May 17, 2022. Barletta has been at or near the top of every public poll since he entered the race, exactly one year before Primary Day. Barletta has been endorsed by three former Republican candidates for governor – Jake Corman, Melissa Hart, and Scott Martin – and has the support of more members of the Pennsylvania Congressional delegation than any other candidate. Barletta has been endorsed by a wide variety of state and local officials and Republican Party committees. “We have a tremendous opportunity to change course and accomplish great things for Pennsylvania, but it will take nominating a Republican candidate who can beat Democrat Josh Shapiro in November. I am honored and grateful for all of the support we have gathered,” Barletta said. “As Republicans, we must unite behind one candidate who can actually win the general election, and my record and my campaign show that I am best positioned to bring victory in the fall." Barletta Endorsements Former U.S. Senator Rick Santorum Congressman Dan Meuser (PA-09) Congressman Fred Keller (PA-12) Congressman Ronny Jackson (TX-13) Former Congresswoman Melissa Hart Former Congressman Keith Rothfus Former Congressman & 2016 Donald J . subject: The choice on Tuesday, May 24th has never been more clear...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
body:
I served as a fiscal hawk in the state legislature because I know how hard Minnesotans work for their money. It is the hardworking middleclass | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremymunson/breaking-i-am-running-for-congress-in-minnesotas-1st-district-9017129?e=f4c2e54596)
---
|
---
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=121b2feb71&e=f4c2e54596)
Peter,Washington is on a reckless spending spree. Congress just approved an additional $40 BILLION in aid to Ukraine last week, bringing the grand total to $54 billion in the past two months.As usual Democrats continue to spend taxpayer money without solutions to the real problems in this country. Americans are facing crippling inflation, soaring gas prices, and a baby formula shortage, yet we continue to spend spend spend.It is time we solve our problems at home. That is why we need a **Proven Conservative Fighter** to push back on corrupt government spending. Washington doesn’t have an income problem - they certainly take enough of our money - it has a spending problem.We cannot afford to **print $40 billion** to send overseas when we have baby formula and food shortages, crumbling infrastructure, soaring inflation, and a crippling economy that our representatives in D.C. are refusing to address.They told us $5 Billion dollars to build the wall and protect our southern border was too much money, but **sending $440 per American household to Ukraine** for a total of $54 Billion is just fine to the corrupt Washington Swamp. When we can burden taxpayers to pay for someone else’ border instead of protecting our own, we have our priorities all messed up.Peter, while in Minnesota’s State House, I fought so hardworking Minnesotans didn’t have their wallets raided to fund Democrat and Republican boondoggles which benefits no one but special interest groups. Our families don’t spend money they don’t have and neither should our government!
|
---
|
---
[**Join me in restoring fiscal responsibility in Washington by making a contribution of $20.22 or more to my campaign today >>>**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=102e96ecec&e=f4c2e54596)
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=bfa74ab01b&e=f4c2e54596)
|
---
Every Republican in this race wants you to believe that our crippling economy can be solely blamed on Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden’s failed leadership.Republicans and Democrats TOGETHER have added $30 Trillion to our national debt under pressure from the main stream media and the corrupt political establishment.Sen. Rand Paul, who continues to serve as a fiscal hawk in the Senate, **endorsed my campaign** because he knows my record proves that I am the candidate in this race who will join him in restoring fiscal sanity in Washington.We cannot risk electing Republicans on **Tuesday, May 24th** who will reach across the aisle to compromise away our paychecks. If we do not address the spending crisis in Washington, our children will never have the same opportunities to pursue the American dream that we had because they will be faced with a far worse crippling debt.Peter, when I say it is going to take Proven Conservative Fighters to change the course of American history, I am not just engaging in Republican political rhetoric. We need to elect leaders who have the courage to do what is right regardless of the political blowback. [**Please help our campaign with your generous grassroots donation of $150 to fund our door knockers.**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=ed8e9f1218&e=f4c2e54596) Instead of donating money, if you would like to donate a day or a few hours going door-to-door talking with voters, please visit [**jeremymunson.com/volunteer**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=935f74b916&e=f4c2e54596) to sign up. If you live outside the district and want to help make phone calls to primary voters - you can volunteer your time using the same link.We have **9 days** to reach as many voters as possible before the Tuesday, May 24th primary, and I am going to need your support to protect Minnesota’s 1st Congressional district from milquetoast Republican representation.The choice has never been more clear, Peter. I will take our fight in Minnesota to Washington and protect our country from the radical socialists seeking to spend away our children’s future. For Liberty,
Jeremy Munson
Candidate for Congress
Personal cell: (507) 200-8448
| [Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
