clean_body: I served as a fiscal hawk in the state legislature because I know how hard Minnesotans work for their money. It is the hardworking middleclass | | | | Peter,Washington is on a reckless spending spree. Congress just approved an additional $40 BILLION in aid to Ukraine last week, bringing the grand total to $54 billion in the past two months.As usual Democrats continue to spend taxpayer money without solutions to the real problems in this country. Americans are facing crippling inflation, soaring gas prices, and a baby formula shortage, yet we continue to spend spend spend.It is time we solve our problems at home. That is why we need a Proven Conservative Fighter to push back on corrupt government spending. Washington doesn’t have an income problem - they certainly take enough of our money - it has a spending problem.We cannot afford to print $40 billion to send overseas when we have baby formula and food shortages, crumbling infrastructure, soaring inflation, and a crippling economy that our representatives in D.C. are refusing to address.They told us $5 Billion dollars to build the wall and protect our southern border was too much money, but sending $440 per American household to Ukraine for a total of $54 Billion is just fine to the corrupt Washington Swamp. When we can burden taxpayers to pay for someone else’ border instead of protecting our own, we have our priorities all messed up.Peter, while in Minnesota’s State House, I fought so hardworking Minnesotans didn’t have their wallets raided to fund Democrat and Republican boondoggles which benefits no one but special interest groups. Our families don’t spend money they don’t have and neither should our government! | | | Every Republican in this race wants you to believe that our crippling economy can be solely blamed on Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden’s failed leadership.Republicans and Democrats TOGETHER have added $30 Trillion to our national debt under pressure from the main stream media and the corrupt political establishment.Sen. Rand Paul, who continues to serve as a fiscal hawk in the Senate, endorsed my campaign because he knows my record proves that I am the candidate in this race who will join him in restoring fiscal sanity in Washington.We cannot risk electing Republicans on Tuesday, May 24th who will reach across the aisle to compromise away our paychecks. If we do not address the spending crisis in Washington, our children will never have the same opportunities to pursue the American dream that we had because they will be faced with a far worse crippling debt.Peter, when I say it is going to take Proven Conservative Fighters to change the course of American history, I am not just engaging in Republican political rhetoric. We need to elect leaders who have the courage to do what is right regardless of the political blowback. Instead of donating money, if you would like to donate a day or a few hours going door-to-door talking with voters, please visit to sign up. If you live outside the district and want to help make phone calls to primary voters - you can volunteer your time using the same link.We have 9 days to reach as many voters as possible before the Tuesday, May 24th primary, and I am going to need your support to protect Minnesota’s 1st Congressional district from milquetoast Republican representation.The choice has never been more clear, Peter. I will take our fight in Minnesota to Washington and protect our country from the radical socialists seeking to spend away our children’s future. For Liberty, Jeremy Munson Candidate for Congress Personal cell: (507) 200-8448 | [Paid for by Munson for Congress]() | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Munson for Congress. All rights reserved.

Dan

subject: re: Reach out to dpwillis67@gmail.com today

body:
My finance team says you're one of our biggest supporter
| | |
---
Hi, friend, I know it’s a Sunday, so I’ll get right to it:
**The Senate is likely to become the next battleground for reproductive rights – so winning this race has never been more important.**** ** But grassroots donations have drastically slowed just ahead of my Mid Month fundraising deadline.
My finance team says you're one of our biggest supporters. And with my Senate race shaping up to be the most expensive _ever_ , I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support. It means everything.

But the truth is, if I fall short on fundraising, the GOP and its allies will use their massive resources to destroy our momentum and take a lead that we won't be able to overcome. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, friend. Can you please make a donation right now to help get my fundraising back on track? I need to stay _strong, _and I'm counting on you _._
**Here’s the best link to give: ****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355032/345574111/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250}&refcode=jtk3118-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzY3Yzg2OC05YWQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dY25KjKuC6bVS0TMSkCiMHNMSC3ZCxahYzoDFwkxU2U=) **
Thank you,

Val Demings

Can you add this supporter to your list? They've been engaged in our race, and I'm sure they would appreciate hearing from you personally. Top Supporter Contact info: dpwillis67@gmail.com Let me know if you need anything else. Thanks! Alex M. Finance Team | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

Did you see my last message, Peter? I have to hit my $75,000 mid-month goal before Tuesday at midnight, and I'm behind.
For several months this year, I wasn't able to raise a single dollar. That's because I was leading two legislative sessions, and my team wasn't allowed to raise campaign funds due to state regulations.
With Election Day just under six months away, it's critical that I reach every single goal: **[Will you donate $5 now to help me defend New Mexico from the GOP?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355091/345574533/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1282-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjIzNGMxOS05YmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NtfgrIeBABDu1FUFuPkDXVi0rYztY8KzKtIORYcdsp4=)**

Peter – I'm reaching out to my top supporters to ask for $5 today, and I just need one moment to explain why:
* I haven't been able to fundraise for MOST of 2022 due to regulations around legislative sessions so our team has a lot of ground to make up for.

* I've worked tirelessly to bring bold, progressive policies to New Mexicans, but the GOP is now hoping to walk back all the progress we've made.

* **I need your help to raise $75,000 for our mid-month goal. If you donate $5 right now, I can make up for the time we've lost and defend myself from GOP attack ads.**

| | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355093/345574535/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1282-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjIzNGMxOS05YmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NtfgrIeBABDu1FUFuPkDXVi0rYztY8KzKtIORYcdsp4=)

If I don't reach my mid-month goal, I'll have to make drastic budget cuts – which just isn't an option when the GOP is pushing harder than ever to replace me with a far-right extremist.
**[I can't keep New Mexico blue without your help, so please: Donate $5 before midnight tonight to help me reach my critical mid-month goal and continue building a brighter future.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355094/345574536/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1282-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjIzNGMxOS05YmQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NtfgrIeBABDu1FUFuPkDXVi0rYztY8KzKtIORYcdsp4=)**

Michelle Lujan Grisham

# Local leaders discuss rural broadband funding heading to WNC, and I was there to learn how to best help you!
###

To spend funds effectively and efficiently, NC Broadband Division is creating detailed maps, and they need your help to know where the nearly 800 million dollars are!

Take the 5-minute survey to bring these dollars to your area.

The survey can be taken online for users with internet access and by phone for users without service and will be available in both English and Spanish.

Participants can take the survey by phone to report locations without internet service.

Residents without internet service but with phones capable of text messaging can text "internet" to 919-750-0553
Standard text messaging rates will apply.

name: Conor Lamb
subject: Showing up for every voter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355321/345575532/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIzMjY3Yi05ZGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uif0qNaJhp5UKZ9B08hEMdPHYsaYG7bpJq_UyFiG5TE=)

Hey friend,

I've been out on the road with my team all weekend, and it’s been incredible to see the energy and the support from folks all over Pennsylvania.

Months ago, I told you how we were going to run this campaign, _not_ with millions of dark money, but with the respect of showing up for the community. **With so much on the line in November, Pennsylvanians deserve a candidate willing to show up everywhere and answer every question.**

With your help, our campaign _has_ been showing up. Here's a look at what we've been up to:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355322/345575533/-863248123?refcode=em22_220515_2days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIzMjY3Yi05ZGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uif0qNaJhp5UKZ9B08hEMdPHYsaYG7bpJq_UyFiG5TE=)
---
Knocking on doors in Wilkinsburg, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355323/345575534/-863248123?refcode=em22_220515_2days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIzMjY3Yi05ZGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uif0qNaJhp5UKZ9B08hEMdPHYsaYG7bpJq_UyFiG5TE=)
---
Visiting a senior center in Westmoreland County, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355324/345575535/-863248123?refcode=em22_220515_2days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIzMjY3Yi05ZGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uif0qNaJhp5UKZ9B08hEMdPHYsaYG7bpJq_UyFiG5TE=)
---
Talking with voters in Cheltenham, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355325/345575536/-863248123?refcode=em22_220515_2days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIzMjY3Yi05ZGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uif0qNaJhp5UKZ9B08hEMdPHYsaYG7bpJq_UyFiG5TE=)
---
Holding a Q&A with voters in Allegheny County, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355326/345575537/-863248123?refcode=em22_220515_2days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIzMjY3Yi05ZGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uif0qNaJhp5UKZ9B08hEMdPHYsaYG7bpJq_UyFiG5TE=)
---
And visiting a supporter's home in Delaware County.
Wherever folks are in PA, that's where I'll meet them. And there may only be _**2 days left,**_ but this work isn't done when the election is over — _that's_ when the real work starts.

[**So while I'm out on the road today, will you support our grassroots movement for democracy, reproductive rights, and working families?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355327/345575538/-863248123?refcode=em22_220515_2days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIzMjY3Yi05ZGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uif0qNaJhp5UKZ9B08hEMdPHYsaYG7bpJq_UyFiG5TE=)

Thank you for taking the time to catch up with me today. Your support is what makes all this possible, and I couldn't be more excited for what we're going to achieve together.

Sincerely,

Conor Lamb

[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45355328/345575539/-863248123?refcode=em22_220515_2days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDIzMjY3Yi05ZGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uif0qNaJhp5UKZ9B08hEMdPHYsaYG7bpJq_UyFiG5TE=)

Thanks, Team DSCC | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. subject: Carrjr4Senate - May 17th - Time to Take a Stand!
body:
Hello All,

All of you at one time or another have reached out to my campaign. So first
let me tell you how much I appreciate you giving me the opportunity to share
my vision with you.

With May 17th right around the corner, I have a big favor to ask. Can you
once again help me share my vision? My closing argument is that it's Time
to Take a Stand. I believe that the following videos express what I mean by
this statement:

Taking a Stand - James L. Carr Jr. For US Senate - My Closing Argument

<https://youtu.be/3Rg4ycXdqc8> https://youtu.be/3Rg4ycXdqc8

May 17th - Time to Take a Stand with James L. Carr Jr, US Senate Candidate
from NC

<https://youtu.be/RjoQTWbvqpo> https://youtu.be/RjoQTWbvqpo

Also, here's a video which clearly outlines my alternative vision for our
great state.

James L. Carr Jr., Official Campaign Video

<https://youtu.be/HY_h0Hm5zKE> https://youtu.be/HY_h0Hm5zKE

Can you please share the videos on your social media platforms or via any
other means at your disposal. I believe that to truly represent the people,
you must earn, since it can't be given, the trust of the people. I'm
willing to put my trust in you and I hope that I have earned your trust in
me. So anything you can do to assist in getting my information out to
others would be greatly appreciated.

During my travels across the state and via social media, I have listened, I
have prepared, and now I'm willing to take a stand for a better North
Carolina. If you agree, please vote for me and share my information with
others so that we can make it happen.

Thanks and God Bless!

<https://docs.google.com/uc?export=download&id=1MMLFIAnvoyUxgPlc6XLHkgGX9g9e
ZLDs&revid=0B-HPKouwh-0DOEZyRDhLRklpRm11YTd0WnFnWmhSWW1xblY0PQ>

subject: Is she really this dumb?
body:
Marge is Putin's parrot | |
---
Peter, Senate Republicans made headlines this weekend as images were released of a delegation, led by Senator Mitch McConnell, visiting with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky in Kyiv. ** ** Marjorie Taylor Greene, evidently as familiar with geography as she is with the Constitution, quipped that the situation in Ukraine must not be that dire if McConnell and the others were visiting the capital city without protective gear.
---
|
---
Last week, Marge voted against a $40B aid package for Ukraine and in so doing angered some of her Republican colleagues by seemingly parroting Putin's propaganda while speaking on the floor of the House. ** ** Marjorie Taylor Greene is an embarrassment to the United States. She's an embarrassment to Congress. She's an embarrassment to Northwest Georgia. ** ** That's why I'm running to defeat her in November - we need to return common sense to the Capitol. ** ** With just over a week until our primary, it's all hands on deck. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Maxwell Alejandro Frost, Sydney Kamlager, Kesha Ram, Erica Smith, Andrea Salinas, and Michelle Vallejo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
I’m excited to announce my latest slate of congressional endorsements for the 2022 midterm election cycle.
As we head into one of the most consequential midterm elections ever, and Democrats prepare to make their case to the American people on why we deserve to retain our majorities in Congress, it’s important that we have strong progressives who are unafraid to stand up to corporate greed and fight hard on behalf of the people. **I’m so proud to endorse:**
* Maxwell Alejandro Frost, running for FL-10;
* Sydney Kamlager, running for CA-37;
* Kesha Ram, running for VT-AL;
* Erica Smith, running for NC-01;
* Andrea Salinas, running for OR-06;
* Michelle Vallejo, running for TX-15.

Peter, what we’re able to accomplish in the next two years depends on growing our progressive coalition in Congress. [**Will you rush a contribution of $3 or any amount today to help us elect these people-first leaders so we can hold our Democratic majority in the House and expand our movement for progress? We need to raise $3,421 more to hit our $25,000 mid-month goal before tomorrow at 11:59 p.m. to fully fund our electoral work!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13741?refcode=em20220515-1260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1260%2E420207%2EeIp0X7)
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13741?refcode=em20220515-1260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1260%2E420207%2EeIp0X7)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13741?refcode=em20220515-1260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1260%2E420207%2EeIp0X7)**
Maxwell, Sydney, Kesha, Erica, Andrea, and Michelle represent the best of what we have to offer. They are activists, organizers, and bold champions for the progressive agenda — and they will fight hard for climate action, Medicare for All, and a fair minimum wage.
These candidates are currently running in open and/or newly drawn congressional seats. **Their races are winnable — but only if we do our part.** [**Can you contribute $3 or any amount to help us send Maxwell, Sydney, Kesha, Erica, Andrea, and Michelle to Congress? Every dollar will help us reach our goal before tomorrow night’s deadline.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13741?refcode=em20220515-1260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1260%2E420207%2EeIp0X7)
Thank you in advance for supporting our efforts to elect these bold progressives. Together, we will grow this movement — _and we will win._
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220515-1260-footer&t=23&refcode2=1260_420207_eIp0X7&akid=1260%2E420207%2EeIp0X7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=1260%2E420207%2EeIp0X7)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1260%2E420207%2EeIp0X7)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Team Wiley
subject: Coming This Tuesday

https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/vote [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/vote]https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/vote [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/vote]
Wiley’s primary election is in just two days, which means it’s all hands on deck, all systems go for the next 48+ hours.
We’re really proud of the campaign Wiley’s run over the past several months.
Because of his strong record on the issues that matter most to working families, Wiley’s been endorsed by NCAE teachers, the Sierra Club, AFL-CIO workers, Equality NC, and the News & Observer. North Carolina leaders like Congressman G.K. Butterfield have put their faith in Wiley, and he’s ready to fight for real change in Washington.
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/endorsements [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/endorsements]
We’ve spent the last several months talking to voters all over the district. We have a lot of problems to solve in our country, and that starts with electing the right people to do the job. Wiley’s ready to roll up his sleeves and:
➡️ Protect a woman’s right to choose
➡️ Fight back against voter suppression and gerrymandering
➡️ Make corporations pay their fair share and lower the tax burden on the middle class
➡️ Push for Medicaid expansion and increased access to affordable, high-quality healthcare.
Can we count on your support for Wiley by Tuesday May 17th? [http://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/vote]

Folks, the National Republican Senatorial Committee just booked **$53 million in TV ads to try to buy back the Senate majority.** We can’t afford to let that happen. Senate Republicans are blocking critical legislation to codify _Roe v. Wade_ — and if they reclaim the majority, **Mitch McConnell says they could even pass a nationwide ban.** The future of abortion access, our economy, and the health of our planet is on the line. We need to expand our Senate majority so Democrats can build on our work to protect the freedoms and futures of New Mexicans and folks across the country. clean_body: Folks, the National Republican Senatorial Committee just booked $53 million in TV ads to try to buy back the Senate majority. We can’t afford to let that happen. Senate Republicans are blocking critical legislation to codify Roe v. Wade — and if they reclaim the majority, Mitch McConnell says they could even pass a nationwide ban. The future of abortion access, our economy, and the health of our planet is on the line. We need to expand our Senate majority so Democrats can build on our work to protect the freedoms and futures of New Mexicans and folks across the country. But we’re up against a ton of GOP spending and we can’t do it without your support. Before midnight, will you chip in $10 or any amount toward our campaign’s mid-quarter goal to help us expand our Senate majority and deliver results? name: Erica Smith (iPhone)
subject: On my break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Hi, it’s Erica. ❤️
I’ve been meeting with voters all day, and it’s been great to talk with so many people in the final days leading up to our election! I have a few moments to spare, so I wanted to connect with you.
My team just informed me that despite our best efforts we haven’t been able to stop the lies and misinformation coming from my opponent:
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/55125?t=1&akid=1186%2E3698%2E7Bm6s9)
(_This whole ad is full of lies, that’s why some TV stations have taken it down — unfortunately, it’s still running in many areas_)
I’ve been a proud Democratic county chair, school board member, and state Senator. I’m the ONLY candidate in this race who has worked with Governor Roy Cooper to protect reproductive rights, expand Medicaid, and raise teacher pay.
In Congress, I’ll fight for reproductive freedom, health care for all, raising the minimum wage, bold climate action, and more.
While we’re getting our positive message out to voters, my opponent and his allies think that this race can be bought with millions in corporate super PAC money and smear campaigns. [**Please chip in $5 before the primary on Tuesday to show them that this seat can’t be bought.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/55125?t=2&akid=1186%2E3698%2E7Bm6s9)
Thank you for your support,
Erica
— Sent from my iPhone

Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)

Peter, I know your inbox is flooded with emails from my team — so this message is just five sentences long.

**I’m running for Congress to bring a strong Latino voice to my community, and I need your help.** MAGA Republicans are fixated on CA-13 as their ticket to flipping the House majority red... _but I won’t stand for it._

**[Peter, please rush $3 toward my must-hit $10,000 mid-month deadline before 11:59 PM. body:
FWD: Do you agree that the radical left has been a disaster? Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9a3bb2d1d27e4c98/1ded936405eb8709c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter I wanted to make sure you saw this message from the team. If we don’t get America’s future back on track, we’re not going to _have_ a future. Our children are depending on us like never before, and it’s critical that we do something to preserve the greatest nation that has ever existed. I’m working hard in Congress to push back on the radical left agenda that is destroying America, and I can’t do it without you. **[Please rush a donation of $7,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9a3bb2d1d27e4c98/74a5fab96831e6a8c3d6b838967d376c/34143)[ $20.22, ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9a3bb2d1d27e4c98/59fbd40f727ed8c0c3d6b838967d376c/34143)[or any amount to help me save our country. >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9a3bb2d1d27e4c98/13d079c575edbb90c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** We need to get our national debt under control, unleash American energy companies, and stop over-regulations that are strangling businesses. I will never stop fighting for America, and every person’s chance to achieve their American Dream. Thanks for your help,
Kevin Hern PS – Below, please find secure contribution links: $7 - **[https://secure.winred.com/kevinhern/pg-e-future-at-stake/amount=7](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9a3bb2d1d27e4c98/80b7c3555b0067b6c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** $20.22 -[ **https://secure.winred.com/kevinhern/pg-e-future-at-stake/amount=20.22**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9a3bb2d1d27e4c98/f5f4cf9c239daa58c3d6b838967d376c/34143) DONATE ANY AMOUNT - **[https://secure.winred.com/kevinhern/pg-e-future-at-stake](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9a3bb2d1d27e4c98/f7d4cf05ccc01b17c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9a3bb2d1d27e4c98/c817ff9ad892378ac3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, The left has been a DISASTER since they took over Washington almost a year and half ago. Inflation is higher than it’s been in over 40 years, gas prices have hit record highs, and American families are struggling like they haven’t in decades. **_That’s why we need conservative fighters like Kevin Hern in Congress._**
---
[**DONATE $20.22 TO SEND KEVIN HERN BACK TO CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9a3bb2d1d27e4c98/72cc26444e20568dc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Kevin is on the front lines fighting for fiscal responsibility, working to get our national debt under control and making sure our children aren’t saddled with mountains of debt. He knows what it means to work your way up and achieve the American Dream, and he wants every child in this nation to have the same opportunity that he did. The future of America is at stake. Please support true conservative fighters like Kevin by giving generously now!
---
[**SUPPORT KEVIN HERN FOR CONGRESS**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9a3bb2d1d27e4c98/af57eded093863ebc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

subject: Mount Joy Borough Mayor Tim Bradley endorses Barletta for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
---
**Mount Joy Borough Mayor Tim Bradley endorses Barletta for Governor**
---
Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, announced yet another key endorsement in Lancaster County as Mount Joy Borough Mayor Tim Bradley formally endorsed Barletta's campaign. Bradley comes on board Barletta's team as State Senator and former gubernatorial candidate Scott Martin (R-Lancaster) publicly endorsed Barletta earlier in the day citing the need for the party to unify behind a candidate capable of winning a general election.
"It would be great to have a former mayor in the governor’s office, because Lou Barletta understands what our cities, counties, and towns face on a daily basis," said **Mayor Tim Bradley.** "This election represents an opportunity to get Pennsylvania back on the right track, but only if we nominate a Republican candidate who can beat Josh Shapiro in the fall. Lou Barletta is that candidate and I strongly and enthusiastically endorse him.”

clean_body: | | | | Mount Joy Borough Mayor Tim Bradley endorses Barletta for Governor Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, announced yet another key endorsement in Lancaster County as Mount Joy Borough Mayor Tim Bradley formally endorsed Barletta's campaign. Bradley comes on board Barletta's team as State Senator and former gubernatorial candidate Scott Martin (R-Lancaster) publicly endorsed Barletta earlier in the day citing the need for the party to unify behind a candidate capable of winning a general election. "It would be great to have a former mayor in the governor’s office, because Lou Barletta understands what our cities, counties, and towns face on a daily basis," said Mayor Tim Bradley. "This election represents an opportunity to get Pennsylvania back on the right track, but only if we nominate a Republican candidate who can beat Josh Shapiro in the fall. Lou Barletta is that candidate and I strongly and enthusiastically endorse him.” | | | | =

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0515 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0515]
Hi Peter, it’s me, Penny Lane!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0515 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0515]
I’m just one of the non-humans around the office these days (see below for some of my friends)!
My office friends are all talking about Wade having a really big race coming up, and it’s different from the ones against the squirrels in the backyard.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0515 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0515]
The team has worked so hard throughout the past year, and they have the whole house at work making sure Wade wins this race – they even have me writing emails now!
As I have tons of experience winning races against squirrels and other dogs in the neighborhood, I can understand why they wanted my help so badly. Although I don’t know as much about these kinds of races, I’m pawsitive that Wade has everything it takes to win his.
So, even though I’m the one who’s supposed to get the treats, I wanted to make sure Wade gets a special treat for being the best human ever ahead of his big race on May 24th.
I don’t have anything to give him but slobbery kisses, so I need your help. Will you toss me a few bones to help Wade, and help him win his race next week? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0515]
TOSS A BONE! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0515]
I’ve seen how much work the team has put into winning this race and have heard how much they love Georgia’s First District – maybe as much as they love me! I hope you can help me make Wade’s day!
Thanks for being one of Wade’s best friends.
Wags and woofs,
Penny Lane
Director | Animals for Wade

subject: sorry to bother you on a Sunday evening

body:

| | Folks Oregonians love our dogs, and whenever Doyle is out and about in the community, she connects with voters and their four legged family members. Peter,

In case you didn't know - it's nearly Primary Election Day here in Georgia.

This is the first major test of our campaign's strength. We've spent thousands of hours preparing for the Republican Primary for U.S. Senate on May 24th, and now the rubber is meeting the road.

We've got to be ready for absolutely anything the Democrats throw our way. Despite the favorable outlook for Republicans nationwide, it's clear that _**the worst mistake we can make is to assume we've got anything in the bag.**_

**I wrote to you recently about our primary goal (raising $100,000 online before 7 am on May 24th). Peter, we've made some progress towards our goal - but we're not on track to reach our goal at the current pace.**

**All this is to say: we need your immediate help.**

Our Democrat opponent is raking in more than $164,000 PER DAY. _Surely, we can raise $100,000 over the next 9 days - right?_

**The only way for us to hit our goal is to ramp up today's pace by raising an additional $9,500 before midnight. [To accomplish this, we're asking you to chip in $3, $5 or $11 before the top of the next hour.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b59e32ab418e4d82b1175720a46db9ae&_e=UyELSLEUJtcCA-lsuYXSqFmPm66Ab312yGrF8f9w2nLvCdhDu2lsJe_WT_Yf4ekg8Sy84gRyvBGgZQofrUtAlrgbq-rd9jJLBkuk9voU2Bdat6LSVyAIbJW2IbMdVsWrj2JM1XHC7q0hE7WBgPiMtMkC9RAQeCrwFo6RhRx1bRLapfPNQdvoGZhLN64YE9v4ZSnu69_ArxojOfQjR2aC8ibVJjPC02atWO4xno3W6Jx0LytKQDtmrMZ35BRieH0jYNbs8Poa4nE6VdJv0iCJYvL_01q67duARrFuIuP-F4IkgbboBroJtgQWvLYkWf3i6IB7kJyAEyIetNDAgkXx44l3AAvk-QF9Chrk-XpUct1wqrPjZ7pTsDbiyQNeQ4hp8C2AkS2l6ze9qZ9_qHdY356YTEHhYr0l9qwsIkD6sGlciAuQVmRZMtkSV0FgmIFWpAc9L0agQq8X2rytnpB-F3GbgCb56y-lU-gEkO-gU0hfqnVVPPGW4Berjf0Bsbxv)**

| **EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**SUGGEST CONTRIBUTION:** $5
**DEADLINE:** Tuesday, May 24th at 7am
---

Your support today is critical. This isn't a game, gimmick, or ploy. We really need your help, Peter.

We're 9 days from our primary election, and our Democrat opponent is already spending nearly $1 million each week to win the general election 6 months away. We need your help RIGHT NOW.

We've got to be ready for absolutely anything the Democrats throw our way. Peter, we've made some progress towards our goal - but we're not on track to reach our goal at the current pace. All this is to say: we need your immediate help. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Bernie re-introduced Medicare for All!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Bernie
re-introduced Medicare for All in the Senate!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106839?refcode=em20220515-23384&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=23384%2E1203867%2EytYzYK ]Tweet from Senator Bernie Sanders reads: Estimates show that nearly 27
million Americans and their families lost their health care coverage when
they lost their jobs due to COVID-19. Let me be clear: health care is a
human right, not a job benefit. Yes. It’s time for Medicare for All.

He held the first ever full committee hearing on Medicare for All in the
Senate on Thursday, which is an important step towards true universal
health care in America. It’s a historic moment for our movement that will
be made even bigger if we do two things in the next 9 days: elect Summer
Lee and elect Jessica Cisneros.

Summer and Jessica will fight alongside Bernie for Medicare for All.
Corporate, anti-M4A Democrats are spending millions to stop our
progressive Justice Democrats from winning and joining the Squad in
Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106839?refcode=em20220515-23384&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23384%2E1203867%2EytYzYK ]At such a big moment for M4A, can you chip in $3 to
help elect more Medicare for All advocates to the House? We can only pass
M4A if we build a coalition in Congress to join Bernie and the Squad.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106839?refcode=em20220515-23384&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23384%2E1203867%2EytYzYK ]Contribute $3

We know the fight for Medicare for All won’t be easy — we’ve been at this
fight alongside Bernie and Justice Democrats in Congress for years. And
it’s one of the biggest fights between the people and corporate power in
this country.

Tens of thousands of people die each year at the hands of the private,
for-profit health care system in America. If we passed Medicare for All,
and established health care as a human right, everyone would be able to
get the care they need.

Health insurance executives and health care companies spend millions
lobbying against Medicare for All, because they want to continue profiting
from our broken system. And corporate Democrats join Republicans to
endlessly smear M4A, because they all want to keep raking in campaign
donations from corporate health care PACs.

The same political establishment is spending more money than ever to stop
Summer, Jessica and other Justice Democrats from joining the fight for M4A
in Congress. We only have 2 days left to help lift Summer past $3 million
of Super PAC attack ads, and 9 days left to help Jessica defeat the only
anti-abortion Democrat in the House.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/106839?refcode=em20220515-23384&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=23384%2E1203867%2EytYzYK ]So, we have to ask: can you contribute $3 right now to
help us send fighters for M4A to Congress? The establishment is doing
everything it can to stop us, so we need our grassroots supporters to step
up!

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=23384%2E1203867%2EytYzYK ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=23384%2E1203867%2EytYzYK ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220515-23384-footer&t=1026&refcode2=23384_1203867_ytYzYK&akid=23384%2E1203867%2EytYzYK

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=23384%2E1203867%2EytYzYK

[ ]Tweet from Senator Bernie Sanders reads: Estimates show that nearly 27 million Americans and their families lost their health care coverage when they lost their jobs due to COVID-19. Let me be clear: health care is a human right, not a job benefit. Yes. It’s time for Medicare for All. He held the first ever full committee hearing on Medicare for All in the Senate on Thursday, which is an important step towards true universal health care in America. It’s a historic moment for our movement that will be made even bigger if we do two things in the next 9 days: elect Summer Lee and elect Jessica Cisneros. Summer and Jessica will fight alongside Bernie for Medicare for All. Corporate, anti-M4A Democrats are spending millions to stop our progressive Justice Democrats from winning and joining the Squad in Congress. [ ]At such a big moment for M4A, can you chip in $3 to help elect more Medicare for All advocates to the House? We can only pass M4A if we build a coalition in Congress to join Bernie and the Squad. [ ]Contribute $3 We know the fight for Medicare for All won’t be easy — we’ve been at this fight alongside Bernie and Justice Democrats in Congress for years. And it’s one of the biggest fights between the people and corporate power in this country. Tens of thousands of people die each year at the hands of the private, for-profit health care system in America. If we passed Medicare for All, and established health care as a human right, everyone would be able to get the care they need. Health insurance executives and health care companies spend millions lobbying against Medicare for All, because they want to continue profiting from our broken system. And corporate Democrats join Republicans to endlessly smear M4A, because they all want to keep raking in campaign donations from corporate health care PACs. The same political establishment is spending more money than ever to stop Summer, Jessica and other Justice Democrats from joining the fight for M4A in Congress. We only have 2 days left to help lift Summer past $3 million of Super PAC attack ads, and 9 days left to help Jessica defeat the only anti-abortion Democrat in the House. [ ]So, we have to ask: can you contribute $3 right now to help us send fighters for M4A to Congress? The establishment is doing everything it can to stop us, so we need our grassroots supporters to step up! In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

Hello,
After I tested positive for COVID this week, my team set a goal of raising another $15,000 so that we could launch more digital ads.
This must be done because nothing is more effective than in-person conversations with voters. But out of caution for the health and safety of others, we had to cancel a number of events with Iowa voters, many of which will be hard to reschedule.
Against Chuck Grassley – who has been in Washington for 47 years – every conversation with voters is going to matter. Especially with Mitch McConnell raising millions into Super PACs to spend attacking me.
**In order to make up for the in-person campaigning I can’t do for the next several days, we need to launch additional digital ads so we can still get our message out to Iowa voters. But that's going to require additional, unplanned for, resources.**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important. clean_body: Hello, After I tested positive for COVID this week, my team set a goal of raising another $15,000 so that we could launch more digital ads. This must be done because nothing is more effective than in-person conversations with voters. But out of caution for the health and safety of others, we had to cancel a number of events with Iowa voters, many of which will be hard to reschedule. Against Chuck Grassley – who has been in Washington for 47 years – every conversation with voters is going to matter. Especially with Mitch McConnell raising millions into Super PACs to spend attacking me. In order to make up for the in-person campaigning I can’t do for the next several days, we need to launch additional digital ads so we can still get our message out to Iowa voters. But that's going to require additional, unplanned for, resources. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I am feeling well, and I can’t wait to get back out there talking with voters once I am able to. But this could become a setback if we don’t raise additional funds to keep reaching voters. I’m so grateful for everything you do, Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.) clean_body: Time is running out! | URGENT! It’s Ted Budd, and I have to ask... what more can you do to help?? This race is one of the MOST IMPORTANT ones in the entire country, and we must reach our fundraising goal in order to WIN. | This is the MOST critical time in our campaign. Everything that we’ve been doing has been leading up to this moment, and we either WIN or LOSE on Tuesday. It’s black and white. It’s me or McCrory. You decide. The future of North Carolina is at stake and we can’t let Trump-Hater, two-time failed candidate Pat McCrory win. It’s clear that he would lose a THIRD time. Recent polling has Cheri Beasley (the AOC of North Carolina) beating him 44% - 39%! We can’t let that happen. Thanks for your support! Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. To support our campaign, please click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDH71PPGrEzdfegloc-4ZZqW99zJc5MzSVzm_NrFMisweTmMwHq_7Xb0U1QiZD-lwuunZrR6nVggzuwjf-GROjeKZ95ZyINDIKVRk1XQsPfxY4jCk1juhSKEz7-D7vXbFWNzjdd5aLv-6k_Z_m5TbxAS5Pqp2TZ8ypUz_GcT5HhlJPDhVlE2XEyImNpIxdqwvj26Y10CnYBXLtbuwJxknt8Kk4o9praWxZvtGYMOHcnvK/3m2/exvAegNVQW23rusCRhn9xA/h0/-FoNxir6V1zaAdTOjoVwi73OejhACrXQIogHFQiProA)

Hi Peter, Yesterday, I participated in the National Day of Action to ensure leaders know we must codify Roe. I attended the events in both Longview and Vancouver, standing with others supporting reproductive justice. It was a great turnout, and I left those rallies with a renewed commitment. People want leaders who will protect their right to make decisions about their bodies and respect their privacy. It's clear that the American people do not want a small minority of extremist leaders to take away their rights. Unfortunately, we now must fight to make sure our children have the same rights all have had for the last 50 years. I'm running for Congress against GOP Rep. Jaime Herrera Beutler, who is notoriously inaccessible to her constituents and A-OK with removing your rights because she does not share them! Yet as polling shows, our real opponent is a Trump-aligned, far-right Republican who wants to tear our country apart. **Roe v. Wade is just the tip of the iceberg - we know they're going after birth control, LGBTQ+, and inter-racial marriage rights next. We're in for one of the biggest fights of our lives, and I want you to know I'm not backing down.** Right now, I need your help to get my name on the ballot. We're STILL $1,130 away from our week's goal to raise funds for covering the cost of our 2022 candidate filing fee tomorrow. (Politics is still pay to play.) If you're ready to join me in the fight for leadership that puts people over politics and actually cares about Healing Washington of the partisan games that only divide us further, I need you with me now. **[Please, we're halfway through Q2 now, and this is a make-or-break moment for us. Will you give $22 or any amount you can to help get a Democrat's name on the ballot in WA-03?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdG1fUgG8aFKTw4TdAFcV3OYIkIXLeXYGdiD76HGOclWZYG428h3SLdZNmun5o9X552C4T58iA6YIw7njhoFYyM10xIjOaO1UvJ_ezoPyFZAdOXC7fDg_RmWHwQSWAkQdw-RR12PtNXPT3NG7Gme5lsYfiR7B54869bGYqzONKr-4sVyeNC1K4LY73Ku2pSHOiShvJ5EnXfT3Uu3u0iz7gQ1RRRyJ7COtUu3OXu15jHz3kua7anpU1v696zNL0YWBaK5Gp16Rrm6Cs_uK9WD8MMtXTfnrNcIydt01Si-yc2vENjNbw0QLg0_VkSQZ3R8biwM9hBUdoG-mZgCf7PXzQ/3m2/exvAegNVQW23rusCRhn9xA/h1/tASEmoCXvJBjE7ZdDMmSpa4-JoqyQDMjD4-jGaHf-t8)**

clean_body: | | Hi Peter, Yesterday, I participated in the National Day of Action to ensure leaders know we must codify Roe. I attended the events in both Longview and Vancouver, standing with others supporting reproductive justice. It was a great turnout, and I left those rallies with a renewed commitment. People want leaders who will protect their right to make decisions about their bodies and respect their privacy. It's clear that the American people do not want a small minority of extremist leaders to take away their rights. Unfortunately, we now must fight to make sure our children have the same rights all have had for the last 50 years. I'm running for Congress against GOP Rep. Jaime Herrera Beutler, who is notoriously inaccessible to her constituents and A-OK with removing your rights because she does not share them! Yet as polling shows, our real opponent is a Trump-aligned, far-right Republican who wants to tear our country apart. Roe v. Wade is just the tip of the iceberg - we know they're going after birth control, LGBTQ+, and inter-racial marriage rights next. We're in for one of the biggest fights of our lives, and I want you to know I'm not backing down. Right now, I need your help to get my name on the ballot. We're STILL $1,130 away from our week's goal to raise funds for covering the cost of our 2022 candidate filing fee tomorrow. (Politics is still pay to play.) If you're ready to join me in the fight for leadership that puts people over politics and actually cares about Healing Washington of the partisan games that only divide us further, I need you with me now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let's do this. -Brent | | Brent Hennrich is running for U.S. Congress against inaccessible and out-of-touch GOP Rep. Jaime Herrera Beutler and a far-right Trump-endorsed MAGA Republican. Brent is leading in the polls right now, but we need your help to keep him there. His grassroots campaign will unseat an entrenched incumbent and flip WA-03 Red to Blue with your support today. Will you please contribute now? Thank you! | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2022 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: this is absolutely crucial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi Peter, I just wrapped up a meeting with some of my campaign staff, and because you're a valued member of this grassroots team, I wanted to give you an update about where things stand before our critical FEC fundraising deadline in the coming days.
Here's what you need to know: Mitch McConnell is hell-bent on taking back the Senate and just needs to flip one seat to pull it off – and his allies already have $44 MILLION in the bank to protect Republican incumbents and go on the offensive. Competing for every single seat matters immensely if Democrats hope to hang on to Senate control, **which is why our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) is absolutely crucial.**
You see, Sen. Grassley is more vulnerable than he's been in his entire decades-long career. Earlier in our campaign, polling showed that almost 2 out of every 3 likely Iowa voters didn't want to reelect him. NOW, new polling from The Des Moines Register shows Sen. Grassley at the highest record disapproval rating EVER in an Iowa poll. Democrats have never had a better opportunity to flip this seat blue – and as the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue, I have every intention of defeating Sen. Grassley and lifting up the voices of working-class families in the Senate.
Those tens of millions of dollars Mitch McConnell's allies have raised? They can tap into that campaign war chest at a moment's notice to destroy our momentum and protect Sen. Grassley. The Senate GOP campaign arm and Fox News have already attacked candidates like me. **We've got to build up resources to compete and show our strength so we set out an ambitious $75,000 FEC fundraising goal – and we still need to raise $5,000 before 11:59 p.m. tonight to stay on track. We have a ways to go, so I would sure appreciate your support (seriously, whatever you can contribute) using this link: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45357231/345595139/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk744-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODcwYmQxMC1iMGQ0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r-31v4843t4eBX8W_u1kUEAcXimeW8q7RAPWjuUMPNE=)**
This is personal for me. Working families are _my_ family, and Sen. Grassley has failed us for far too long. It's time for a change and time for better leadership, which is exactly why I'm determined to win. Thanks for fighting by my side.

Abby

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We're 9 days from our primary election, and our Democrat opponent is already spending nearly $1 million each week to win the general election 6 months |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=59f5d81f4b714b138bf398487b37535c&_e=Q81T8TuRKE1I4fuJcB27MiJup3p4aWFP8XnN2U9fmcwbvg3KaG13xWi4Mfzgzn5wwnNC86ztMBK6zcZsUcA6SoG0DFHNlTPudDJZlzXgyWR0-TnON6IAAAF41gx1RhG8c_tcWIUtTUtimE7J7lvIbL2jrLHadzlhU9I7FWI_ePnN-uVxtKoPc3LZXUppdhWT9lzGDk0SlbGFJAFJIWzD5ytA5kxf9Xd__2WaTsOqgJMjnWFN9eNHUb-9VXqzoJ2-0Awr9SNyS_ZCANA64hDy8yeF6Hn3js4y5WRXDel9b3tXDyduP_hsNNP34bxEvUqApTz9sNYsRV48xGhB-tzPfkKYVnyEheu-oYXIObo80b2Jjof4sNjiq_XH_IMb0C0hZ8GS3I7z7cK2tQwJ_pHbw8-MWvAP30frIjobaz9oSLJrgKSQsvwGrOI3mYUkAOPS2AIAG8HofvjVlJUAf6xFnHXcT-7nxpVfE0szIdcibm43aip9StDEUHYTT0tRUKKf)

---
Peter,

In case you didn't know - it's nearly Primary Election Day here in Georgia.

This is the first major test of our campaign's strength. We've spent thousands of hours preparing for the Republican Primary for U.S. Senate on May 24th, and now the rubber is meeting the road.

We've got to be ready for absolutely anything the Democrats throw our way. Despite the favorable outlook for Republicans nationwide, it's clear that _**the worst mistake we can make is to assume we've got anything in the bag.**_

**I wrote to you recently about our primary goal (raising $100,000 online before 7 am on May 24th). Peter, we've made some progress towards our goal - but we're not on track to reach our goal at the current pace.**

**All this is to say: we need your immediate help.**

Our Democrat opponent is raking in more than $164,000 PER DAY. _Surely, we can raise $100,000 over the next 9 days - right?_

clean_body: We're 9 days from our primary election, and our Democrat opponent is already spending nearly $1 million each week to win the general election 6 months | Peter, In case you didn't know - it's nearly Primary Election Day here in Georgia. This is the first major test of our campaign's strength. We've spent thousands of hours preparing for the Republican Primary for U.S. Senate on May 24th, and now the rubber is meeting the road. We've got to be ready for absolutely anything the Democrats throw our way. Despite the favorable outlook for Republicans nationwide, it's clear that the worst mistake we can make is to assume we've got anything in the bag. I wrote to you recently about our primary goal (raising $100,000 online before 7 am on May 24th). Peter, we've made some progress towards our goal - but we're not on track to reach our goal at the current pace. All this is to say: we need your immediate help. Our Democrat opponent is raking in more than $164,000 PER DAY. Surely, we can raise $100,000 over the next 9 days - right? The only way for us to hit our goal is to ramp up today's pace by raising an additional $9,500 before midnight. | EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com SUGGEST CONTRIBUTION: $5 DEADLINE: Tuesday, May 24th at 7am Your support today is critical. This isn't a game, gimmick, or ploy. We really need your help, Peter. We're 9 days from our primary election, and our Democrat opponent is already spending nearly $1 million each week to win the general election 6 months away. We need your help RIGHT NOW. If you're unable to give today, I want to thank you for considering this request in the first place. I know you can't give every time we send an email, but we're grateful you are part of Team Herschel. Best, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

And with only 36 hours to go before Election Day, I just found out these super PACs are DOUBLING DOWN and rushing even more money against me. name: Brian Burley
subject: Reminder: Baugh Committed Election Fraud
body:
Let me be blunt - there is a better chance of raining pigs in November than of a Scott Baugh victory against Katie Porter.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zXVxqYUSXwewXvN1nrAWh4K3Bdkre5DnIn0DfY5S8ex1lwa_EnnEsRslKZRCOuMyDxKg4vISUu78_y5Lds3UpB3YEXN81UJsmS-7N-SocBT4-yA62yH1axMuDieNsag2O9P3doKmSQX2Sk7BmTXT8AFyMJgplP_dRL-RdcdBIGc0YMrxTWGuOubzvXBaNgzvWUNuWkt5buHx61COkMkOqQ==&c=3Mn4_08DnZNv6ILJ65cG7sXFQAnXww2BVU9QTU2pMlI1WLNXO2C6LQ==&ch=ZhfRYYAqKRv2K8vBJgEPsKqeBreaZJU6JlcbwsjChf-nZ2gpCSMfeQ==)
---
---
| "Voters are going to look for somebody with a clean background, who has no personal indiscretions".
Those are the words uttered by my opponent Scott Baugh decades ago. Baugh ran as a Democrat decoy against our incumbent Dana Rohrabacher in 2018. Scott cost us this seat four years ago and now he has come back to do it again.
Integrity matters. I don't have baggage - I don't even have a speeding ticket. I can win in November against Katie Porter.
I can win because I understand the struggles of everyday people in our district.
Baugh on the other hand is a career politician and out of touch lobbyist. He was indicted on election fraud and then later plead guilty to 11 violations of our state election law. Baugh was ordered to pay a fine of $48k - one of the biggest fines ever doled out out by State of California for election violations.
Most people would be banned from running for elected office in California for this track record.
But not Scott Baugh. Crooked and criminal career politicians like Scott play by their own rules.
Most voters unfortunately do not research their candidates. They go based off name recognition, party establishment endorsements or fall for distraction tactics.
Voters get emails or postcards like this and assume it's purely politics.
It is not purely politics and I am not mudslinging. This is the truth and the facts can be read at [vote4integrity.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zXVxqYUSXwewXvN1nrAWh4K3Bdkre5DnIn0DfY5S8ex1lwa_EnnEsYbje3Ko9eOamAO9sMbTvRRyeAZTsvDt-8wcYwenZqe-Efer8OfsedjCQwB7w9E-y78g8HrgZWVpFO054CM_yzMW8q7ek845AA==&c=3Mn4_08DnZNv6ILJ65cG7sXFQAnXww2BVU9QTU2pMlI1WLNXO2C6LQ==&ch=ZhfRYYAqKRv2K8vBJgEPsKqeBreaZJU6JlcbwsjChf-nZ2gpCSMfeQ==)
This is the future of our country that is at stake. Watch the below video which documents every step of the corruption and backroom deals that Scott Baugh is known for.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zXVxqYUSXwewXvN1nrAWh4K3Bdkre5DnIn0DfY5S8ex1lwa_EnnEsYbje3Ko9eOauYdrP4tp2nxOWKQ-v-0MdVGevhd-B4zaOMrjDh62agZ8Patk9DwvlQaR6IC7Jt0XE7dxAMSKFl_2-H2GoUzhhAI3Zq_t7RM-QrLlJDhrXX5LMmTfxbPxmg==&c=3Mn4_08DnZNv6ILJ65cG7sXFQAnXww2BVU9QTU2pMlI1WLNXO2C6LQ==&ch=ZhfRYYAqKRv2K8vBJgEPsKqeBreaZJU6JlcbwsjChf-nZ2gpCSMfeQ==)
---
| | [HELP BRIAN FINISH THE JOB AGAINST THE ESTABLISHMENT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zXVxqYUSXwewXvN1nrAWh4K3Bdkre5DnIn0DfY5S8ex1lwa_EnnEsRslKZRCOuMyDxKg4vISUu78_y5Lds3UpB3YEXN81UJsmS-7N-SocBT4-yA62yH1axMuDieNsag2O9P3doKmSQX2Sk7BmTXT8AFyMJgplP_dRL-RdcdBIGc0YMrxTWGuOubzvXBaNgzvWUNuWkt5buHx61COkMkOqQ==&c=3Mn4_08DnZNv6ILJ65cG7sXFQAnXww2BVU9QTU2pMlI1WLNXO2C6LQ==&ch=ZhfRYYAqKRv2K8vBJgEPsKqeBreaZJU6JlcbwsjChf-nZ2gpCSMfeQ==)

| Let me be blunt - there is a better chance of raining pigs in November than of a Scott Baugh victory against Katie Porter.
Baugh's special interest donors do not like him - behind closed doors they admit that they owe him their support this time around for past favors.
Scott Baugh's campaign staff do not even like him - they leaked their defense letter to my campaign months ago when Baugh first announced his run. A letter from former OCDA Tony Rackauckas is supposed to be Baugh's defense from taking any responsibility.
[Rackauckas was fined $21k for failing to report payments to Baugh's non-profit.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zXVxqYUSXwewXvN1nrAWh4K3Bdkre5DnIn0DfY5S8ex1lwa_EnnEsYbje3Ko9eOaV4vITqxErzcbKKBRLDXFLatctW5GcD8nstuEMD2ahu9Fj6YkBgBwXE17p43tndWnYUI-3TUKApGFf84SkUy-gxVgXmW2omsLjvvorlrooKZWm_DBl4y8_A_YbB5SkyNlguXliewoXpdFpum1PU1FIiOOYZQszIrbdBL_0KKLr8oGz_H127BmcFI_qVZ3IOnTJX13Y19sdC9vO-pGBpj6HhKjMYItGDrd&c=3Mn4_08DnZNv6ILJ65cG7sXFQAnXww2BVU9QTU2pMlI1WLNXO2C6LQ==&ch=ZhfRYYAqKRv2K8vBJgEPsKqeBreaZJU6JlcbwsjChf-nZ2gpCSMfeQ==) Isn't it interesting that Scott would pick such a impartial character to write his defense?
If we want to win in November it won't happen with the failed corrupt leaders of yesterday. It is time to give voters options that they can believe in.
Porter's dream is to go against a flawed candidate with baggage like my opponent. Porter has over $17 million in the bank - a huge fundraising haul. Imagine the hay day Porter would have attacking Baugh. Why would we essentially hand over this conservative district to her without a candidate who can put up a fight?
I am the fighter that will beat Porter in November. My campaign represents A New Conservative Movement in California that we ALL can rally behind.
Baugh represents the old guard politics of the establishment OCGOP. An establishment that has lost us nearly every seat over the past decade. An establishment that has pushed Republicans out of the state as they have prioritized liberal candidates like Baugh that disguise themselves as Republicans.
But the establishment is worried. Recent polling shows that their corrupt and criminal Yes-Man is in trouble.
No one has put in the work that my team has but I need your help to get across the finish line with a victory.
Do you want to win in November? If so, then I am you're candidate. I will always fight on behalf of you and on behalf of what is right.
We must win this seat and use it as a building block to Start A New Conservative Movement in California!
Donate your best gift at the link below!
California is worth fighting for. Help me save our district and then our state!
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: An enormous step backwards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HaPjxakSdhM9g_wMl2zRgsCLeJfsSGhmkUT7zQ8gAQc=/cXVt6oAWwQLE-b8yYRuN2Fyo4s8KrSbKKeEkF_HITYY=)
Friends --
If this draft Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe is true, it's an enormous step backwards for our country.
Arizonans have the right to make their own choices about abortion and when to start a family.
Today, _Roe v. Wade_ is the law of the land and I'll do everything I can to protect that right. But I cannot continue that fight if we lose this November.
So, I need to ask for your help:
**Please split a contribution of $5, $10, or whatever you can afford between my campaign and Congressman Stanton to help us defend our seats. It all adds up and I cannot do it alone:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Stanton-Kelly**](https://act.myngp.com/el/HaPjxakSdhM9g_wMl2zRgsCLeJfsSGhmkUT7zQ8gAQc=/6TgB2oOv856I234cp1_-OtXZX-Gl2eEOH3vQGKqTMK4=?refcode=X_051522_KellyRoevWade)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HaPjxakSdhM9g_wMl2zRgsCLeJfsSGhmkUT7zQ8gAQc=/6TgB2oOv856I234cp1_-OtXZX-Gl2eEOH3vQGKqTMK4=?refcode=X_051522_KellyRoevWade)
---
The right to choose is sacred, and I am going to stand up to defend that right against those who seek to take it away.
All my best,
_-- Mark Kelly_
_ _

* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HaPjxakSdhM9g_wMl2zRgsCLeJfsSGhmkUT7zQ8gAQc=/9lapafioexuKVlI1mdwP7RiNqeJ6KaY-3AqGgbGO2h4=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HaPjxakSdhM9g_wMl2zRgsCLeJfsSGhmkUT7zQ8gAQc=/YO6S74psTdZ0rNDBshICo3prDJ4HiMtNcsATXiqJiP0=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HaPjxakSdhM9g_wMl2zRgsCLeJfsSGhmkUT7zQ8gAQc=/CYQOBhs3_YaNweBzrZqPP5cB9FDbycsgrHnmsOGlEOo=)
---|---|---
A tireless advocate for Arizona, Greg was elected to Congress in 2018. Since then, he has built a reputation for working across the aisle and getting things done in Congress. As the former Mayor of Phoenix, he knows the issues of his state and district inside and out. You can learn more about his work at [StantonForArizona.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/HaPjxakSdhM9g_wMl2zRgsCLeJfsSGhmkUT7zQ8gAQc=/cXVt6oAWwQLE-b8yYRuN2Fyo4s8KrSbKKeEkF_HITYY=). **In 2022, Greg is running in one of the toughest races in the country. [Will you help him keep up the fight for Arizona by chipping in?](https://act.myngp.com/el/HaPjxakSdhM9g_wMl2zRgsCLeJfsSGhmkUT7zQ8gAQc=/GrmWAX9bk0-ycsy-ZBS4fNp8L8pIrx0qkz6VR4aFxjE=?refcode=X_Footer)** | Paid for by Stanton for Congress

Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

clean_body: = Friends -- If this draft Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe is true, it's an enormous step backwards for our country. Arizonans have the right to make their own choices about abortion and when to start a family. Today, Roe v. Wade is the law of the land and I'll do everything I can to protect that right. But I cannot continue that fight if we lose this November. So, I need to ask for your help: Please split a contribution of $5, $10, or whatever you can afford between my campaign and Congressman Stanton to help us defend our seats. It all adds up and I cannot do it alone: The right to choose is sacred, and I am going to stand up to defend that right against those who seek to take it away. All my best, -- Mark Kelly = | = | = ---|---|--- A tireless advocate for Arizona, Greg was elected to Congress in 2018. Since then, he has built a reputation for working across the aisle and getting things done in Congress. As the former Mayor of Phoenix, he knows the issues of his state and district inside and out. Peter,

In case you didn't know - it's nearly Primary Election Day here in Georgia.

This is the first major test of our campaign's strength. We've spent thousands of hours preparing for the Republican Primary for U.S. Senate on May 24th, and now the rubber is meeting the road.

We've got to be ready for absolutely anything the Democrats throw our way. Despite the favorable outlook for Republicans nationwide, it's clear that _**the worst mistake we can make is to assume we've got anything in the bag.**_

**I wrote to you recently about our primary goal (raising $100,000 online before 7 am on May 24th). Peter, we've made some progress towards our goal - but we're not on track to reach our goal at the current pace.**

**All this is to say: we need your immediate help.**

Our Democrat opponent is raking in more than $164,000 PER DAY. _Surely, we can raise $100,000 over the next 9 days - right?_

**The only way for us to hit our goal is to ramp up today's pace by raising an additional $9,500 before midnight. [To accomplish this, we're asking you to chip in $3, $5 or $11 before the top of the next hour.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=0b94a8f7023c4b78a81b18cf82fb9182&_e=h1mGqmGUkSddhRHPxtRGvojelg9wO1V6SizoWC1zrw2qrSgi0Yu8S1dEAFTrI3KPgHeDTmrxNYIdGQyDlC8LNMScmTTFr-hWFRkTyMO_cS2MHMpfs4fyWxIfUaL1xKOtOdZOBEauRjf3_nkZBUbD3ZZt_utv2oMG_FIs95bNd_beNQrrB1JWyiQvjinOaFoFIsdCqI-BdR9C7ufEqRRGOJxIh4IRJJmaitTrTMJlAhqhEkpNyK1BFTVDTA_oTc3CmUyaRTmQzhko_PLb_ywIyYhrdtCebu6fwvDkVxdMt4Lj2WKCWIVAljWvbXMD1fKkPmTmcmadgXEpRR335NKJAQeigqalMcxyGI4Qh09-mIBf3wZJKq8OJsBivX5g7XAr_Pum5lIuYZvTxMB2H01TcYiEvGx18goDYnWo-3SJShM7RQ8vo-rXjNy5XAuWgR3zuBuP8hSklRyqW-IbnsOCeS6zPXnFq4KGt_FZh43yCV7YVkD5qg5Q4z4e3ppNG5g1)**

| **EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**SUGGEST CONTRIBUTION:** $5
**DEADLINE:** Tuesday, May 24th at 7am
---

Your support today is critical. This isn't a game, gimmick, or ploy. We really need your help, Peter.

We're 9 days from our primary election, and our Democrat opponent is already spending nearly $1 million each week to win the general election 6 months away. We need your help RIGHT NOW.

**[Will you help me secure the Republican nomination and launch a strong general election campaign with a donation of $3, $5, or $11 right now?](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=0b94a8f7023c4b78a81b18cf82fb9182&_e=h1mGqmGUkSddhRHPxtRGvojelg9wO1V6SizoWC1zrw2qrSgi0Yu8S1dEAFTrI3KPgHeDTmrxNYIdGQyDlC8LNMScmTTFr-hWFRkTyMO_cS2MHMpfs4fyWxIfUaL1xKOtOdZOBEauRjf3_nkZBUbD3ZZt_utv2oMG_FIs95bNd_beNQrrB1JWyiQvjinOaFoFIsdCqI-BdR9C7ufEqRRGOJxIh4IRJJmaitTrTMJlAhqhEkpNyK1BFTVDTA_oTc3CmUyaRTmQzhko_PLb_ywIyYhrdtCebu6fwvDkVxdMt4LSsG0asV2EJSYHPIT5kn5Q2TwlWIPHVR0nXuUnn3bhqonBiGhcoP6zhjjcoIl6CDUrLHdT3Dm6P1NAWEwFL6s3q9u9kQnxSQAveI74JNx-BRgC4WRECV5nJu6bITvqVQZYH4I-2OYKFWutwmWCRpoN0F_dt14_oOfKBz8hVeKdk35SUyQvFuP6gBVASu3PNAhIw9VYW-6ta4krnmnezqfW)**

If you're unable to give today, I want to thank you for considering this request in the first place. I know you can't give every time we send an email, but we're grateful you are part of Team Herschel.

Best,

Despite the favorable outlook for Republicans nationwide, it's clear that the worst mistake we can make is to assume we've got anything in the bag. I wrote to you recently about our primary goal (raising $100,000 online before 7 am on May 24th). Peter, we've made some progress towards our goal - but we're not on track to reach our goal at the current pace. All this is to say: we need your immediate help. Our Democrat opponent is raking in more than $164,000 PER DAY. Surely, we can raise $100,000 over the next 9 days - right? The only way for us to hit our goal is to ramp up today's pace by raising an additional $9,500 before midnight. | EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com SUGGEST CONTRIBUTION: $5 DEADLINE: Tuesday, May 24th at 7am Your support today is critical. This isn't a game, gimmick, or ploy. We really need your help, Peter. We're 9 days from our primary election, and our Democrat opponent is already spending nearly $1 million each week to win the general election 6 months away. We need your help RIGHT NOW. If you're unable to give today, I want to thank you for considering this request in the first place. I know you can't give every time we send an email, but we're grateful you are part of Team Herschel. Best, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .
