name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Others Talk About Doing Things. I've Actually Done Them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Brice Wiggins for Congress
body:
The Campaign for Congress Is Heating Up. It’s Time For a Republican With A Record of Accomplishment to Replace Palazzo | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bricewiggins/campaign-updates-8986097?e=698f056321)
---
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f4e6bc0729&e=698f056321)
---
Hello, I’m Brice Wiggins, and I hope by now you know I am all in on running for Congress. A vote for Wiggins is a vote for a Congressman who knows the process and has used it to get things done for you. Let’s make it happen in the Republican Primary on June 7. Vote for Wiggins! As your Congressman, I will work to:
* Fix the economy
* Curb inflation
* Lockdown our borders
* Protect our rights & resources
* Bolster economic development in Mississippi

Everyone I talk to _(and I've talked to thousands)_ , says they’re fed up with how we are being represented in DC. As a Congressman, you are the window into who we are as a state and district. We are about Christian morals, high standards, and hard work in South Mississippi. You can bet I will uphold that standard and will rise above the DC swamp.Our campaign to clean up DC won’t be easy, but I know how to win a tough fight–and I’m ready to show up for Mississippi, in person. You’ll find my record and policy videos with my positions on many topics everyone is concerned about [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=a066439788&e=698f056321) \- including this one about [**Protecting the Rights of the Unborn.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=a4bd88d791&e=698f056321)
|
---
_**“Voting is the expression of our commitment to ourselves, one another, this country, and this world.”**_ _**—Alexander Hamilton**_
|
---
# Campaign Trail Highlights
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2fb3fe5429&e=698f056321)
---
|
# Walkin’ with Wiggins
Taking Grassroots campaigning to another level by coming to a neighborhood near you! [**#WalkinWithWiggins**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2704bdc36b&e=698f056321) is going door to door from the Pine Belt to the Coast to earn your vote on June 7th.[**WATCH HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=31892074f4&e=698f056321) to see where we’ve been and other highlights from this past week below.
---
## Ocean Springs Education Foundation Fundraiser
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
A good time for a great cause - [**OSEF**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d4527fd7dd&e=698f056321) does a fabulous job supporting teachers, students, and education in general. No wonder OSSD is one of the top in the state!
| | | | | |
## Forrest Co. Republican Executive Committee Meeting
Thank you for having me and all the Republican Party Officials working to ensure an efficient and secure election on June 7th. [**WATCH**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ace8dac0ba&e=698f056321) to learn how I will stand up for the integrity of U.S. elections in Congress.
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=36f9030a1c&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | |
---
|
## Birds of a Feather, Flock Together
We’re lucky to have great friends in Hattiesburg supporting my efforts to become our next Congressman on June 7th.
---
| | | | | |
## Free Flowin’ Festival
I enjoyed some quality food, music, and company at [**Free Flowin' Fest**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ff97c82837&e=698f056321) in my hometown of Pascagoula last weekend. Thank you to all who played a part in yet another successful celebration for our community!
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=a6ac19ac7e&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=009a09ffc8&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Taggart Family Visit in Moss Point!
I spent an afternoon in Moss Point going door-to-door asking for your vote. The biggest win was when Allison said [**YES**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f1415014a2&e=698f056321) while visiting with the Taggart family, and she hopes you do too on June 7th!
---
|
---
# In the Media
| | | | | |
## Taking Action: New Eviction Law
I was proud to be the Primary Sponsor of this bill in this year’s legislative session. Now the Governor has signed it into law. To read the full article, click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=60834f6621&e=698f056321).
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=be40864f52&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
| | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=4b3e33f2da&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=46c9b0774c&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2b23bb6341&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=dc4fe5bfe8&e=698f056321)| [](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=0c8afcf422&e=698f056321)
---|---|---|---|---|---
|
---
# Final Note...
As a leader, serving others and taking action to create real change that positively impacts the people I am elected to represent is my mission. Mississippi, I’m ready to work for you and with you to build a nation we can once again be proud of.I hope you will consider my passion and strong record of getting things as I ask for your vote and support on June 7.**Join us in Pascagoula Thursday at the Legendary Longfellow House Fundraiser,**[**click HERE for details.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ddbc36333f&e=698f056321) If you are unable to attend, please consider donating to help us cross the finish line to victory. Thank you again for your consideration in this primary election for Congressman of the 4th District.
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ba0457ed10&e=698f056321)
---

Sincerely,
|
---
# Primary Election Voting Information
### The Primary Election is on June 7.
Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2cfeee66f7&e=698f056321) for the Secretary of State Voter Information Guide for Details.
### Are you registered to vote? Find out [HERE](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=f0358d856f&e=698f056321).
### Out of town on June 7th?
IN-PERSON ABSENTEE VOTING - Visit your [**County Circuit Clerk’s Office**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6c629d22fa&e=698f056321) to absentee vote in person from April 23 to June 4.MAIL-IN ABSENTEE VOTING - Contact the Circuit Clerk’s Office located in the county of your residence and request an Official Application for Absentee Elector’s Ballot be mailed to you. The Application and Ballot may be mailed together depending on how close to the election date is when the ballot is requested.*Mail-in absentee ballots must be postmarked on or before Election Day and received on or within five (5) business days of the election, June 14th, for them to count.
### [Click HERE for a step-by-step guide for Absentee Voting.](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=51343984af&e=698f056321)
|
---
Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=8fcaa73cd1&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
### Keep Up With Us!
| | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=df67719f25&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d1377ccf15&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e43ea20dd7&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=0c2bad8a1b&e=698f056321)| [](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6934a1d85d&e=698f056321)
---|---|---|---|---|---
| [CALL OUR CAMPAIGN](tel:6013853420)
---
**601-385-3420**
| | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7a06bcafdb&e=698f056321)

Our mailing address is:
Brice Wiggins for CongressP.O. Box 1611Ocean Springs, MS 39566
[Add us to your address book](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc&e=698f056321&c=4a508773ee) or [unsubscribe](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc&e=698f056321&c=4a508773ee)

name: Team Hartzler
subject: Weekly Campaign Update

Another Biden Crisis, new endorsements, and a HUGE event announcement! Read below to find out what happened over the last week on Vicky Hartzler's Senate Campaign!
---
|
---
_**ENDORSEMENT: Family Policy Alliance**_ Vicky earned the endorsement of Family Policy Alliance, which said of the endorsement, "Vicky Hartzler is the clear choice as the most pro-life, pro-family candidate in the Missouri Senate race. Congresswoman Hartzler is one of the strongest national voices against woke politics and curriculum in our kids' schools. And she has proven time and again that she has what it takes to win in Missouri. Family Policy Alliance fully endorses her for the U.S. Senate."
---
|
---
---
|
---
_**STATEMENT: The Nationwide Baby Formula Shortage**_ In response to the nationwide baby formula shortage, Vicky issued the following statement: “While Washington Democrats are busy pushing radical abortion on-demand policies and marginalizing women’s sports, Biden refuses to work for our nation’s mothers in addressing the current baby formula shortage crisis. As a mom who relied on baby formula when our daughter was a baby, my heart goes out to every mom struggling to find milk for her baby. For the first time in his presidency, Biden should stand up for women, work to solve our supply chain issues, and quit blaming everyone else for the White House’s continued incompetence on the kitchen table issues affecting Missourians.”
---
|
---
_**IN THE NEWS: Fox News**_ Vicky appeared on Fox News to discuss the potential overturn of Roe v. Wade, and the left's attempts to bully the justices into submission. Vicky's message: Intimidation of Supreme Court Justices cannot stand.
The voice of the people should be heard, and decisions about life should be made at the state level. Watch the clip below:

_**ENDORSEMENT: Christian Times Magazine**_ Vicky earned the endorsement of Christian Times Magazine. Also announced is an in-depth interview, which will be published next month! Stay tuned!
---
---
|
---
_**EVENT: Faith and Freedom Summit with David Barton**_ Congresswoman Vicky Hartzler is teaming up with historian and best-selling author David Barton. Barton is the founder of WallBuilders, a national, pro-family organization that presents America’s forgotten history and heroes, with an emphasis on our constitutional heritage. During this one-day event, David will help us to explore Faith and Freedom within the United States alongside Congresswoman Vicky Hartzler.
WallBuilders is an organization dedicated to presenting America’s forgotten history and heroes, with an emphasis on the moral, religious, and constitutional foundation on which America was built – a foundation which, in recent years, has been seriously attacked and undermined. **RSVP HERE:[https://www.eventbrite.com/e/faith-and-freedom-summit-with-david-barton-and-vicky-hartzler-tickets-330239644667](http://links.hartzlerforsenate.org/u/click?_t=1feb8b824d3a4bea8a2ff68de85e7950&_m=9933363c021f404b83326f9a255307e4&_e=ZUhiFj7PsjPM7jXdS4LSk0VnZ2UVxwgYTSRRXbvB4R25Wmpw7VR7fOEpzgN32G2vxPaE6MS8vagiUQOgltLaxoyyx9CMBUGvICNxK1GO9lB0ZIOxVg8z0fwM8YWzyBppSR55Z9Xv6jPhPI6ekrEo228hFRVcxj8jBULCUIYHE_X-Q3M3QYRJAyhhuiUsgfXmM4c7uhwwvHVyukrTeJz8F7ymx6CTU5mdInJFjm4stnPSzeXredDtvhQCp4Cyj5ig9SG9aPTFZOCp7RKSVrheLpD7IU8aCEWM8Zv3ODaHajmWgQcGI9ieDmHi9tIZQUvhwRoi2sPBZXW9pQzPDCRSwyEIkKzNk8vwRQfOSuFZML2V3StDDpGQDzPP60erEwy3PpL8WP80ki2Aac0DFCBPuaFXXqujEzkzhXbg4yd3aD514984Q10UttYd5Euy8NjbI2zus4-xOiMLnCSJ8yEKSQ%3D%3D)**.

Hi Peter Willis,
It’s Sunday so we’ll make this brief:
Our primary was officially pushed from June 28 to August 23, which means eight more weeks of campaigning. The good news is it gives us more time to spread Melanie’s message. The bad news is this race just became a whole lot more expensive.
_While we depend entirely on grassroots donations, our opponents are funded by deep-pocketed lobbyists and special interests — around 10% (some even less than 2%!) of their donations are from small-dollar donors!_
**We’re a grassroots campaign who knows that raising the most amount of money doesn’t mean you have the most support.[But campaigns do take significant resources to run, so we’re asking: will you give a grassroots donation of $10 or more right now to power us to the primary?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3DrGHMq1vYWA9yWdrA6UCU_OFFwVTyksOkY-4_9IcdfVv1o9E-eRbPHk_VlXAdspDk5hMQaF0Yn6tveODZP3v7qkSR5FUmkUIHwh7yhD8nVcyn2JebcqUnoIAI5BColqAKA_Jg7BQkgYZO0J1A_BL0v0MhXNa1WoAlPd3nyQlQtvaqZcZLfxrVUNp0bmZ_XdkTyX3NF-ZFD-X9sSe12p0b-yCCd08nJrFdyhf8I3aSqdqkOJ6ruUf9kYqFFrvWqsGt7GqmSKY---H7EH0hA94d8L-jA4v0ym8MvFfOON0ssVIidjbEwwDtw7uAC2RPSNAPnN-qULkyB-HgCTJxHM3qkwEHhQAO5UokWe5lkcss380QvwfA_qrLwNVeGMv4LSi_Z/3m2/5jkAYd8PTreFUILH5u70DQ/h1/0onBf6NH32eONRO0pFtrMeLfNLkFjA4NUjKLzwHYv1s)**

With enough people power, we can make Melanie the Democratic nominee for NY-03, win in November, and send her to Congress where she’ll fight for a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and expansion of the Supreme Court.
Thanks for fighting alongside us!
Team Melanie

Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. clean_body: | | | | Hi Peter Willis, It’s Sunday so we’ll make this brief: Our primary was officially pushed from June 28 to August 23, which means eight more weeks of campaigning. The good news is it gives us more time to spread Melanie’s message. The bad news is this race just became a whole lot more expensive. While we depend entirely on grassroots donations, our opponents are funded by deep-pocketed lobbyists and special interests — around 10% (some even less than 2%!) of their donations are from small-dollar donors! We’re a grassroots campaign who knows that raising the most amount of money doesn’t mean you have the most support. With enough people power, we can make Melanie the Democratic nominee for NY-03, win in November, and send her to Congress where she’ll fight for a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and expansion of the Supreme Court. Thanks for fighting alongside us! Team Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. name: Adam Schiff
subject: This new challenge will make a difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=256%2E5257348%2E0PGda6 ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

Back in 2020, my Republican opponent spent over $4 million to try and stop
us. Not only that, but Fox News talking heads, top Trump advisors, and
Trump himself did everything they could to try and smear my name and
spread lies about our work.

They weren’t able to overcome our people-powered movement two years ago,
but this cycle we have a different kind of challenge than we had before.

I’m running in a new district, and tens of thousands of voters who have
never seen my name on the ballot are seeing it right now on their mail-in
ballots, and others will see it on Election Day. That’s just three weeks
from now in the California jungle primary. We need to finish strong in
that race, because immediately after our primary, we begin the general
election campaign and redouble our efforts to defend the House majority
across the country.

While this gives me the opportunity to represent tens of thousands of new
constituents, it also gives the GOP an opportunity to use misinformation
to paint a false picture of me. I’m going to be counting on your help in
the months ahead.

Derek, there’s so much that we’re doing right now to introduce
me to our new voters — knocking on doors, making phone calls, mailing out
campaign literature, and running digital ads across our district just to
name a few.

To ensure our team has the resources they need to successfully cut through
the GOP’s misinformation and spread our campaign’s core message from my
primary election through November, I’m asking: Can you start a monthly
contribution of $10 today? Our movement is fueled by supporters like you.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220515_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&recurring=true&t=1004&refcode2=256_5257348_0PGda6&akid=256%2E5257348%2E0PGda6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220515_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&recurring=true&t=1008&refcode2=256_5257348_0PGda6&akid=256%2E5257348%2E0PGda6 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220515_PM1_V1_S1&email=&recurring=true&t=1009&refcode2=256_5257348_0PGda6&akid=256%2E5257348%2E0PGda6 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Together, we’ll get the word out to thousands of new constituents, beat
our Republican opponents, and defend the House majority.

Thanks for everything you do,

— Adam

body:
| | | Peter, I just spoke with my finance team, and I wanted to share what they said to me:

**We need to raise $9,927 before TONIGHT at 11:59 PM if we’re going to meet our mid-month goal.**

_Let me break down why this deadline is so important:_**1\. The Democrats are enabling Joe Biden’s incompetency. The whole party can’t be trusted to lead, and republicans need to step up.** **2\. We have the momentum to take back the Senate this November - but unless we raise the funds to get out the vote, we won’t be able to win in November.** **3\. The Democrat Party is more radical than EVER, and if we don’t defeat them, they’ll erase American history and tear apart our way of life.**
We only have hours to go, and I’m counting on you to act NOW so we can meet this critical goal.

[**Pitch in before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so we can meet our critical mid-month goal and TAKE BACK THE SENATE from the party of Sleepy Joe. **](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c53824ce7a7e4b99ad3073d6c2af885c&_e=6LjVkgtNRZCtrvW2bIelUIkggkNWFA8QtAHobe8IiDYpflx2o3zPnUgSEm0N5DiB9konMOAFCaUrfbvH8raz_Vea7eAuHWCgUf3YF6MwuhiERNd9X1wgg9e4oX73O0g_ugSx20wqD0rtMD8-FNB1zBT7pJJeuYKNwfwzVc4pIApPT1gFN7r_XXRfN03fuAANVQkqejZnneUy6T3BGYsWoiq-DalEL8_TysfTevJ01j6OKI4782OJpobY3BG_sJ5yMHGXcvoZzVBfqKKLSWc4CcoBUS6xVf92BgMSVEWwneKEE0KKW4lZo97iQAvwkJUA0nsI2GHnVS5qBDxDlOMcHAE4pvC6wUqqLR9iE_rMkdWsmW_a0TmAF02APr2k-dRw3ahM69hKzhmH_xxKWFVy-e_1psh7Gy5041uv7k3w53I%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, I just spoke with my finance team, and I wanted to share what they said to me: We need to raise $9,927 before TONIGHT at 11:59 PM if we’re going to meet our mid-month goal. Let me break down why this deadline is so important:1\. The Democrats are enabling Joe Biden’s incompetency. The whole party can’t be trusted to lead, and republicans need to step up. 2\. We have the momentum to take back the Senate this November - but unless we raise the funds to get out the vote, we won’t be able to win in November. 3\. The Democrat Party is more radical than EVER, and if we don’t defeat them, they’ll erase American history and tear apart our way of life. We only have hours to go, and I’m counting on you to act NOW so we can meet this critical goal. Thank You, Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. clean_body: | | | | | I talked to Carla, and she said you hadn’t donated yet, so I wanted to bump this email in your inbox. Sincerely,Alec Jones, Campaign ManagerSands for U.S. Senate _______________________________________________________Begin forwarded message: From: Carla SandsDate: Saturday, May 14th, 2022 Subject: Liberals, Liars, & Losers When I launched my bid to become the next United States Senator from Pennsylvania last year... I never anticipated how many liberals, liars, and losers I would be up against to win the Republican nomination... First, David McCormick, a China-loving liar and neocon, put his name in the hat and decided he wanted to buy the race... Then Dr. Oz, a lifelong Turkey First, pro-choice, tax & spend liberal entered with the hopes that his celebrity status would make him a shoe-in... And finally, Kathy Barnette, a professional campaign loser jumped in, hoping to scam hardworking conservatives like you out of hundreds of thousands of dollars with a campaign she knew she had no chance of winning. Without your immediate support of my campaign, one of these DISASTROUS candidates will go onto lose the general election to a far-left extremist. Friend, election day is 3 days away... And we cannot afford to wait for your support any longer. I hope you’ll step in before it’s too late. Yours truly, Carla Sands | | | Paid for by Sands for Senate

**PA's "No. 1 Conservative" State Rep. Daryl Metcalfe endorses Barletta for Governor**
---
Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, announced yet another state legislator endorsement today as State Rep. Daryl Metcalfe (R-Butler) formally endorsed Barletta's campaign. Widely regarding as the [_most conservative member_](https://u21878114.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=QtzNBLELhLe7xI3pbs-2B5EgepurjKldj-2BDpxokMWcIOPuvX7MDD3KwhyU2o0FTwtwxZr8_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6XUUx1cOJegsd1-2BY-2BwbNHYZxGtkPUUvI3v0ZVq7NIFu47M9zjJOG3MPD4b4ns2o9C9n0XXQvJNuRygiQP50oz2UBfzralFfavMaDSJK2MCt3-2F6Rk-2BlPYnQvDhAEvVVcJDH4bz0I2PC459ecI2f-2Fy9uiLOIRbwmBprKu224dUKf9eF6YJHSRaXetviI0kuQ1fiHytYrEgusZJ12sj9vJ2wDwa9bRsOqOEetYH1uJd2UsNGylwLvBKx3tm-2F3Y-2BrakNeeowGGtLLxYoSP8TdEUHRDVL9qHvF2oxlrNapgGmM-2Bhdo-2BWbrjzDroTeplT3H9mDlz747aatEFy9tQzcF-2BGTTebza0NNveAQF6szFMzr3Mbbn0B-2FGV1-2B3uWbYHphZdrESK6rrld2Ri9CUbD2MlMAoJ40ZU2Mzazift7QlmVKBx486Bu-2FLWVPfxWK7EkFWRCJPhmHP0XUgPHAWKMeE4Kh6s1Bkg159bULk4wHvp9QMMU9mBZ-2BchExLqyuyN2vKV6erYspAaODQr6pS-2BJQlDE3tZ4497urQDlPFviPvZBngY3D7WtxTA1Oqfb9BaRR9SliwdkOO0KMgqV59PD2xZikoN8xdn7jCkXGhIQpifiKhwV93hPrl6XaPDh5hBUCWsXGVwep0Zc2vnRU392HRlpsr8Gl2FzmS88EOxQic27ekQNXFlH7uUA7vD-2B1uvUCnl0EtUpO52nE5luVoFmBrtABqPG1f5-2Bjzo8loSRwYXn-2FieFlZJHimMDv7Lo-2Fyww-2BVtaWj2cZpLNGLQEj4EaaX7CF6rh1spoloLMxkuwFB-2BdltdtCNGzDhiNev7wwb3mBxBTnk-2FksQM1FMu3XLq-2BcsSspwHGYiM1jsIZm3yuHYdH-2FV1mE-3D) of the PA legislature, Metcalfe comes on board Barletta's team as a wave of elected officials from across the Commonwealth have rallied behind Barletta citing the need for the party to unify behind a candidate capable of winning a general election.
“We have a rare opportunity this year to correct the direction of the Commonwealth, but only if we nominate a Republican who can win in November," said **State Rep. Daryl Metcalfe**. "I first worked with Lou, while he was a mayor, in the fight against the illegal alien crime that was and is harming Pennsylvanians. From my experience of working with Lou, and knowing other candidates, Lou Barletta is the best one for the job! I believe Lou is the candidate who can unite our party and defeat Democrat Josh Shapiro in the fall. I endorse my friend Lou Barletta for governor and I encourage all my fellow Republicans to support him as well.”

Peter,

Have you seen the headlines?

Voters across Georgia are turning out in record-breaking numbers to vote early in the 2022 primary election. We’re hard at work rallying Republican voters here in GA-14 to restore our voice in Washington – and we’re not letting up for a minute.

The final day of early voting is coming up fast this Friday.

And we’re just NINE DAYS away from Election Day on May 24th!
https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/pg_e_less-than-two-weeks?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_PG-e-less-than-two-weeks-2hp-20220506-a_20220513&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG-e-less-than-two-weeks-2hp-20220506-a&utm_agency=PG
Supporters like you have helped us build winning momentum. I can’t thank you enough.

All eyes are on this race, and we’re giving our all to WIN BIG and SEND MTG PACKING.

If you haven’t cast your ballot yet, please head out to vote early this week (https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/advancedVotingInfo.do) , return your absentee ballot, or mark your calendar to head to the polls on Tuesday, May 24th.

And please rush a FINAL primary contribution to help us get out the vote! (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/pg_e_less-than-two-weeks?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_PG-e-less-than-two-weeks-2hp-20220506-a_20220513&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG-e-less-than-two-weeks-2hp-20220506-a&utm_agency=PG)

Together, I know we can come out on top in this race and then defeat the Democrat campaign machine this November.

Thank you, again, for being part of our fight-to-win grassroots team.

- Jennifer

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: I can’t believe it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is our most important goal yet.
#
Did you see John’s email this morning, Derek?
At 7am sharp, he launched our 48-Hour Primary Fund — our last chance to raise as much money as possible ahead of Tuesday’s primary election.
**As the hours and minutes continue to tick down until the polls open Tuesday morning, we wanted to make sure we asked one more time:[Can you make a donation of $5 or more today to help us meet our most important fundraising goal yet?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220515-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220515-5839&refcode2=5839_434096_Qb5RaW&akid=5839%2E434096%2EQb5RaW)**
Your support will help us reach and mobilize as many voters as possible through advertising, canvassing, phone banking, and texting.
We may be crushing it in the polls all while running a historically large campaign, but we can’t leave anything to chance. On this campaign, we always put in our all, and right now that means sprinting towards our primary with as much momentum as possible.

name: Secretary Ryan Zinke
subject: Why I'm supporting Mike Durant
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
body:
Endorsement Alert

|
---
Fellow Patriot,

Navy SEAL Ryan Zinke here, reaching out in support of a bonafide American Hero, Mike Durant.

Mike Durant is a 22-year Army veteran, a businessman, and a father of six. In 1993, the Black Hawk helicopter he was piloting was shot down during the Battle of Mogadishu. Mike survived the ensuing firefight, and survived 11 days as a prisoner of a Somali warlord. You may recognize this story from the movie _Black Hawk Down_.

Like me, Mike has fought for our freedom before and has the scars to prove it. Now he’s signing up for one more tour of duty to defend America from the radical Left.

[**Will you join me in supporting Mike Durant today?**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=4b6c9bed881d4d33b53a8029761e7aed&_e=Fdv6JlrbnhOJEjh7j0qrscsotdsRfsz1PSWvEBOxlz5wYyGugS9DlZsPpSGIjMgUWmaxNYNZMHOdfVe1m4P2Hbhli2ER7wsuuy7_OPY1gtFwKwjEU3V1IHVUXqvVqLsO03vXTLaaB1DJCQSHhnPcyXGXAW494Hjg38hxmy6woVd9sS11S6o9Bdv-Aw9_T8OolB-8xx67eE1T7OECi5Pu_22kniWJlo4XaZPB9zqDxa8hg6ffx3ZWf0NDw8I8qbqG2WdqYzEmAPY0tUbaGQDHtz8GsbPWxi524_sXHK2lMjz5dYz5d-pvI2RNq3DajneifHHRCUYBh5aRXpC_qKBzXixWuEAPTzT0uiZ59j-kw8jOxyky0ur5V2mDb3_Cqp3CCqJLuie10U0l3IVAZxUkpMYEe41uOyQAK3ZClmCNsJULi8EnI68oQvKsONHaG3Mss9ptyv9Q69ojjhSITvIYh-l_xkHc4thecqHDEGOjSIrU1dZ9AZOPl-D8Swt24MAspeGk2rOXhQ1ew9TKL2z84g91UZ5R3Ioh9AwKONfLJps%3D) | [**CHIP IN FOR MIKE DURANT**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=4b6c9bed881d4d33b53a8029761e7aed&_e=Fdv6JlrbnhOJEjh7j0qrscsotdsRfsz1PSWvEBOxlz5wYyGugS9DlZsPpSGIjMgUWmaxNYNZMHOdfVe1m4P2Hbhli2ER7wsuuy7_OPY1gtFwKwjEU3V1IHVUXqvVqLsO03vXTLaaB1DJCQSHhnPcyXGXAW494Hjg38hxmy6woVd9sS11S6o9Bdv-Aw9_T8OolB-8xx67eE1T7OECi5Pu_22kniWJlo4XaZPB9zqDxa8hg6ffx3ZWf0NDw8I8qbqG2WdqYzEmAPY0tUbaGQDHtz8GsbPWxi524_sXHK2lMjz5dYz5d-pvI2RNq3DajneiurKe4789P5hW-JLODkTDKo0wW1I3fz9si68uugOFvfbJNl48bU-2QOVUvmMLeXIc6i_InRHV3A-mE9hDNGYx5zDgOupAycZW_m589j2G0x5pnVM79H8retaAWyMRUW_o0x_MTuaOyrYZ64rdAmheVVzp5pmPIz7C83LaRjbcbtr3A03c6QAI4isWs-QFlB7b6CG3G-TisyKpYQHF-X2v0qhY7paXvyXYoY2TQCDTNzA%3D)
---

2022 is our year to take back the US Senate and our freedom here in America. _Mike Durant is the right leader to take on Joe Biden in the United States Senate._ _**After surviving 11 days as a prisoner of war, you can rest assured that he is afraid of nobody, especially Joe Biden.**_

Mike Durant believes in God, Family, and Freedom & has the guts to stand up against the Radicals seeking to uproot our proud traditions. That’s why we need him in the Senate.

America needs battle-tested leaders. America needs Mike Durant. [**Will you join me in support of this American Hero?**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=4b6c9bed881d4d33b53a8029761e7aed&_e=Fdv6JlrbnhOJEjh7j0qrscsotdsRfsz1PSWvEBOxlz5wYyGugS9DlZsPpSGIjMgUWmaxNYNZMHOdfVe1m4P2Hbhli2ER7wsuuy7_OPY1gtFwKwjEU3V1IHVUXqvVqLsO03vXTLaaB1DJCQSHhnPcyXGXAW494Hjg38hxmy6woVd9sS11S6o9Bdv-Aw9_T8OolB-8xx67eE1T7OECi5Pu_22kniWJlo4XaZPB9zqDxa8hg6ffx3ZWf0NDw8I8qbqG2WdqYzEmAPY0tUbaGQDHtz8GsbPWxi524_sXHK2lMjz5dYz5d-pvI2RNq3Dajneivn0j2dHWe_yT99teU8NoWO4xfMb_ZBQJn_2FXdGrE0cHV86vEn32qZP8EIjCRMgJbjgDY7bLMZPFCFUzO9g-BsqJQYNprqKFBmeofkavnsr0JcqGAHVl3aFds4M28T_k6pzvLoVFk1A1pAPGjT2auGqqAYI8S1eOQHxIP8trMuH3D8FmJDmIKQz3Fr5xbk9rcJ_7L3n_rMzGGylSW9IELRRYvswEmHehE7GoBEyS-mA%3D)

For God and Country,

[](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=4b6c9bed881d4d33b53a8029761e7aed&_e=Fdv6JlrbnhOJEjh7j0qrscsotdsRfsz1PSWvEBOxlz5wYyGugS9DlZsPpSGIjMgUWmaxNYNZMHOdfVe1m4P2Hbhli2ER7wsuuy7_OPY1gtFwKwjEU3V1IHVUXqvVqLsO03vXTLaaB1DJCQSHhnPcyXGXAW494Hjg38hxmy6woVd9sS11S6o9Bdv-Aw9_T8OolB-8xx67eE1T7OECi5Pu_22kniWJlo4XaZPB9zqDxa8hg6ffx3ZWf0NDw8I8qbqG2WdqYzEmAPY0tUbaGQDHtz8GsbPWxi524_sXHK2lMjz5dYz5d-pvI2RNq3Dajnei39cNza3pU8LOWMtVYMz2prnG2shLLPDIciT8CUeHCCsJbmoX22WX_twbp5F-qKuym1dMk5m58u6yjz3QBtF9FGV1KXNDP_0Ga_e93jmfEi9Myb83c95Bp8o3mHo4auEfIY1JEtBlGvRIBr7oy1rcNDu1r7nRovFDnrV0eDB-NLF3z9X074IUaEGLiRnQ-0Y2Dlnwzu9cHlBGgNUklha5CXpPIUK1DJz2keDzKuZoyUs%3D)

name: Tyler, Team Budd
subject: URGENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
NC needs you

|
---
Friend,

_**We NEED your help, and we need it ASAP!**_

Travis from the Budd Finance Team just called me and told me we are NOT where we need to be right now if Ted Budd is going to win the primary election. The election is SO CLOSE, and unfortunately, we’re still short on funds. The clock is ticking, and we need to make every single goal.

[**Can you donate anything RIGHT NOW?**](http://links.buddfornc.com/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=40975e2c5cd94ee6b3601b153d4dabdb&_e=szR12eOx0sPKi43pcUjCK8k-OCMCqGqonCHun9hyA-Z2vCp-u_qyqoewirplLf87waZoJc33JmYauvYjCckJacSJzGap7PzZ6q0DCDj5XXtJc3Mkj7DQWxIsxRZX2Thuc5TVdrhEVjwa82PFQl6hURFs_ylOwaxg511k7BofoD8pFQ-CWAEtpu0to0CNq2qpxV3QiKie3_1JeTFptC1iUe-4r7owg5XfHcl2p53CH8wzAKXJOOMz_RZ21I46qM1L9haGlej0Pod7uuwXNxZ8uIvW7hNgzf2HvGkWW2L8wnHrxOf1eVEEcO9GyCpnUMoHj6aIkSge-jByslbd-k-2QDcsYb1ijA850VQZvOxcDr2DEXsvWNqi6OqzzKPpuXfjABhc5gWxK63CFOQOYdEPT-WS_CSd9ZtikIRxLxT-TQUUiddA4iIR850YAaLc14JsFYYLgvT7q0AAaT9jDwHH_Q%3D%3D)
| [**DONATE NOW**](http://links.buddfornc.com/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=40975e2c5cd94ee6b3601b153d4dabdb&_e=szR12eOx0sPKi43pcUjCK8k-OCMCqGqonCHun9hyA-Z2vCp-u_qyqoewirplLf87waZoJc33JmYauvYjCckJacSJzGap7PzZ6q0DCDj5XXtJc3Mkj7DQWxIsxRZX2Thuc5TVdrhEVjwa82PFQl6hURFs_ylOwaxg511k7BofoD8pFQ-CWAEtpu0to0CNq2qpxV3QiKie3_1JeTFptC1iUe-4r7owg5XfHcl2p53CH8wzAKXJOOMz_RZ21I46qM1L-pnLURXfmYqoNxIKsBYyeI9JafLl9lhlrQ8lI6MfhNYR3z0itvtgvicNU3-smXTdNXmhZxgJvs0_cYNV09HdA70aMKw1O0YrDFxUj1_hIwHkOS0K49URA_IMibFrV7r6lEJoAAtnUSD6mfYmD76m2S4yQhTW4IUKfUOP7hbpGZfpfiL7hJ6yjBCKM8zNhKhngqr6kPgf37Vb0vjVs0rlNw%3D%3D)

clean_body: NC needs you | Friend, We NEED your help, and we need it ASAP! Travis from the Budd Finance Team just called me and told me we are NOT where we need to be right now if Ted Budd is going to win the primary election. The election is SO CLOSE, and unfortunately, we’re still short on funds. The clock is ticking, and we need to make every single goal. | Election Day is coming up on May 17th. We cannot risk falling short of our goals. We cannot let down Congressman Ted Budd – we’re counting on him to bring America First policies to North Carolina. Ted is endorsed by President Trump, Lieutenant Governor Mark Robinson, Newt Gingrich, Senator Ted Cruz, and Congressman Jim Jordan. Ted Budd is the right choice for North Carolina. In November, if Lying Pat McCrory loses to Cheri Beasley, would you sit there and wonder what more you could’ve done? Would you regret not chipping in for Ted Budd? For North Carolina, Tyler, Team Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. name: Beto HQ
subject: Checking in about yesterday’s goal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We can catch up, but we need your support.
#
Here’s where things stand.
**→ First:** We set a goal to raise $250,000 before Trump took the stage in Texas yesterday.
**→ Then:** Our deputy campaign director reached out this morning to share that we _just barely_ missed our goal.
**→ Now:** We need your help to catch up before midnight tonight and here’s why:
**So much is on the line in this election.** Greg Abbott is stripping people of their reproductive rights, and using fear and hatred to divide our communities. Beto has a unifying, positive vision for Texas and will work for every Texan — Republicans, Democrats, Independents, and non-voters alike.
[**Will you help us make up ground on our fundraising today by making your first contribution to help elect Beto in November?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220515-2?refcode=ema20220515-189493&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=189493_444211_ydTZ15&akid=189493%2E444211%2EydTZ15)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220515-2?refcode=ema20220515-189493&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=189493_444211_ydTZ15&akid=189493%2E444211%2EydTZ15)**
A recent poll showed Beto statistically tied with Greg Abbott — we can win this race. With your support, we’re building the biggest organizing operation that Texas has ever seen to make history in this state.
Every dollar that you’re able to contribute helps us open more offices, reach more voters across Texas’ 254 counties, and get the word out about Beto’s positive vision for Texas.
[**You can help Beto win this election, but it’s crucial that we reach every fundraising goal that we set. Please contribute $3 right now to help us hit $250,000 before midnight tonight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220515-2?refcode=ema20220515-189493&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=189493_444211_ydTZ15&akid=189493%2E444211%2EydTZ15)
Thank you,
— Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220515-189493-footer&t=22&refcode2=189493_444211_ydTZ15&akid=189493%2E444211%2EydTZ15)**
